questions.questionText: 關於立體定位導引乳房真空輔助切片(ST VAB),以下何者為是？

options.text: 準確度和mammographic-guided needle wire localization接近.
檢查台主要以prone table及upright兩種；upright table可輔以側睡床.
因為VAB可能會取出相當大比例之病灶，所以常需要置放tissue marker (或clip)於切片處.
呈上(C),有時clip會因accordion效應(手風琴效應)而migration.

questions.explanation:
- 最常見的indication是nonpalpable , mammography可見的BI-RADS category 4 or 5之鈣化點。
- ST VAB診斷惡性之敏感度約95~96 %。
- 若ST VAB取出之檢體病理結果為DCIS，但切片後影像上已無殘餘鈣化，需進一步處置
- 若ST VAB病理結果為atypical ductal hyperplasia，則需進一步開刀。
- 由stereo pair及0度 scout view可計算出target之3維位置。
- 99%可取到足夠代表性的樣本。
- 要是針對mammography可見之病灶做切片，尤其是鈣化。
- 置放標示夾(tissue marker clip)於切片處，是為了將來可能要開刀時之標示部位用。

questions.questionText: Which of the following of Digital mammography(DM) and digital breast tomosynthesis(DBT) is **incorrect** ?

options.text: If a cancer is visible on only one view, it is more likely to be visible on the MLO view than the CC view.
Not all cancers are easily detected, so suspicious lesions seen on only one view should be thoroughly evaluated.
Although the false-negative rate of DBT screening is less than that of screening with DM alone, some cancers are still difficult to detect or nondetectable with DBT.

questions.explanation:
From : Review of True-Positive and False-Negative Results at Digital Breast Tomosynthesis Screening
A:
If a cancer is visible on only one view, it is more likely to be visible on the CC view than the MLO view.
For example, the axillary tail of the breast is more optimally viewed on the MLO view than the CC view, but the inferior medial breast is less well seen on MLO views. Portions of the breast high on the chest wall, as well as the most lateral portions of the breast, are less well seen on CC views
11% of cancers were seen better or only on the DBT MLO view.
15% of lesions were seen better on the DBT CC view.

questions.questionText: About thoracic infections in immunocompromised patients, which description is wrong?

options.text: Respiratory tract is the most frequent site of infection in patients infected with human immunodeficiency (HIV).
The incidence of Pneumocystis jiroveci pneumonia has greatly decreased in developed countries as a result of widespread use of prophylaxis and highly active antiretroviral therapy.

For the solid organ transplant recipients, most common infection during the first month following transplantation is opportunistic infection due to receiving maximal immunosuppression. Through the first 6 months, patients are at greatest risk for nosocomial infections.
HIV infection is the greatest single risk factor for developing tuberculosis.

questions.explanation:
- Risk of infection during the **1st month** following transplantation is usually related to **surgery and hospitalization**, and to a lesser extent by immunosuppressive agents. Nosocomial bacterial infections, similar to those in the general population, predominate.
- Through the **first 6 months**, patients receive maximal immunosuppression and are at greatest risk for **opportunistic infection**.
- Beyond 6 months, adequate allograft function in most patients enables reduction in immunosuppression levels

questions.questionText: Which of the following statements applies to T1 mapping in myocardial fibrosis?

options.text: Diffuse myocardial fibrosis usually causes an increase in both native T1 and ECV.

An increase in ECV can reflect other processes associated with extracellular matrix expansion than diffuse myocardial fibrosis.

questions.explanation:
全對
A. 正確。 [[2016 Cardiac T1 Mapping and Extracellular Volume (ECV) in clinical practice - a comprehensive review.pdf]] 在myocarditis有提到。[[2016 R State of the Art - Clinical Applications of Cardiac T1 Mapping.pdf]]提到很多diffuse fibrosis都會造成native T1值增加，但和正常人有overlapping所以不好用。
B. 正確。 [[2016 Cardiac T1 Mapping and Extracellular Volume (ECV) in clinical practice - a comprehensive review.pdf]] 有提到前半，且比post-contrast T1好。[[2016 R State of the Art - Clinical Applications of Cardiac T1 Mapping.pdf]]則提到後半，ECV和collagen volume fraction的一致性比native T1更好。
C. 正確

questions.questionText: Which of the following statements best describes the prognostic value of T1 mapping?

options.text: ECV may represent a risk marker for death, hospitalization for heart failure, or both.
It has been shown that the prognostic value of native myocardial T1 is higher than that of ECV.
ECV correlates with left ventricular ejection fraction.
The prognostic value of ECV stands against scientific evidence as myocardial fibrosis does not affect mechanical, vasomotor, or electrical function of the heart.

questions.explanation:
正確。用一些統計方法，可用ECV算出病人at risk for death, hospitalization for heart failure, or both.
B: 錯誤。文中提到 Data regarding the prognostic value of native T1 are limited. 而ECV至少在組織學的correlation比native T1更好。文中提到在預後和LVEF不相上下。所以T1 higher應該是錯的。也有人認為ECV跟正常人難以區分，其預後價值仍待商確。
C: 錯誤。ECV和LVEF在預測預後都有效果。但文中沒提到兩者是否有correlation。
D: 錯誤。myocardial fibrosis is **associated** with mechanical, vasomotor, and electrical dysfunction.
回覆根據[[2016 R State of the Art - Clinical Applications of Cardiac T1 Mapping.pdf]]

questions.questionText: An MRI appearance of homogeneous low T1-and T2-weighted signal with enhancement is **MOST** typical of which foot and ankle mass?
questions.reference: Imaging Evaluation of Foot and Ankle Pathology. AJR 2008;190:S18-S22. doi:10.2214/AJR.07.7023（2018 交換考題詳解 p.344 引用）
questions.explanation:
- T1 跟T2都 homogeneously低訊號，想到fibrous tissue。most commonly seen in fibrous masses containing **mature** collagen.
	 - Fibrosing masses containing immature fibrous tissue or fibroblasts can have intermediate signal intensity.
	 - Fibrosing masses include plantar fibromatosis and fibroma of tendon sheath. **Option C is the best response.**
 - Morton's neuromas typically have intermediate signal that is **isointense to muscle on T1**-weighted and **low signal on T2**-weighted sequences with variable enhancement (RadioGraphics 1998; 18:1481 –1498)
 - Lipomas: fat signal intensity. They typically have **high T1-and T2**-weighted signal and low signal on **fat-suppressed** sequences.
 - Ganglion cyst: The typical appearance of a ganglion cyst on MRI is a well-defined mass with **low T1-and high T2**-weighted signal.
	 - Uncomplicated ganglion cysts do not have central enhancement, although a thin rim of enhancement may surround the ganglion.
	 - If a suspected ganglion cyst has **central enhancement, then malignancy must be excluded**.
 - Hemangiomas have **mixed** signal on T1-and T2-weighted sequences because of the presence of vessels, fat, and fibrous tissue (Semin Musculoskelet Radiol 2005; 9:227 –242).
	 - The vascular portions of hemangiomas homogeneously enhance.
	 - Densely calcified masses can have low T1-and T2-weighted signal, but would not be expected to enhance.

AJR 2011 Jun;196(6 Suppl):S77-85.

    - 在myxoid lesion 顯影不明顯，有可能被當成cystic component。(C不適合)
- 但是，如果lesion有 enhancing nodules，要優先考愈neoplasm。

questions.questionText: Which one is **not** lysosomal disorder?
questions.explanation:
Kearns-Sayre syndrome是一種**粒線體**疾病，多為偶發(sporadic)，因粒線體MTTL1基因(mitochondrial tRNA (leucine)-1 gene)發生缺失(deletion)所導致。可分成三類：
-  Pearson syndrome：最嚴重，大部分組織中都有粒線體基因缺失，常合併pancytopenia、貧血、胰臟衰竭(exocrine pancreatic failure)。
- Kearns-Sayre Syndrome：受影響的範圍較小，僅在某些組織中找到缺失的粒線體基因，患者最常見的症狀即為外眼肌麻痺及眼底色素沉積。  缺失多在肌肉及CNS。
- 慢性漸進性外眼肌麻痺(Chronic progressive external ophthalmoplegia; CPEO)：僅限肌肉受影響，症狀多為外眼肌麻痺、雙側眼瞼下垂，及輕微的近側肌肉病變(mild proximal myopathy)。

　　KSS患者通常在幼年(＜20歲)即因眼外肌麻痺及視網膜色素變性，而影響到視力，並常合併有多個系統；包括：中樞神經、心臟及內分泌等系統的異常。由於一開始的症狀表現並不明顯，患者常因此延誤就醫及診斷。

questions.reference: Osborn AG. Diagnostic Imaging: Brain, I-3-9（2018 交換考題詳解 p.341 引用）
questions.explanation:
**Perimesencephalic subarachnoid haemorrhage (PMSAH)** is a distinct pattern of subarachnoid haemorrhage (SAH), which is centred on the basal cisterns around the midbrain.
- 95% of cases have a normal cerebral angiogram and the source of bleeding is not identified; the cause is thought to be a venous bleed. This is referred to as **non-aneurysmal perimesencephalic SAH**.
- The other 5% of cases are due to a vertebrobasilar aneurysm and the prognosis is worse. Rare causes include arteriovenous malformation, dural arteriovenous fistula, trauma and vascular tumours.
Specifically, there are criteria for non-aneurysmal perimesencephalic SAH, which if fulfilled, in the presence of a negative CTA negates the need for DSA:
- SAH in perimesencephalic cisterns anterior to midbrain
- if SAH extension into the anterior interhemispheric fissure, not extending into all of the fissure
- if SAH extension into the medial Sylvian fissures, not extending into the lateral fissure
- if layering interventricular extension, no frank intraventricular haemorrhage
- no intraparenchymal haemorrhage

questions.questionText: Which of the following statements about sonography artifact is **wrong**.

options.text: **Tissue harmonic imaging** is helpful with large body habitus or “noisy” tissues such as an echogenic liver.
**Reverberation** is useful in creating the “comet tail” artifact characteristic of adenomyomatosis of the gallbladder wall.
Color Doppler can be used to accentuate the **reverberation** effects of adenomyomatosis.
**Acoustic shadowing** is the result of nonuniformity of the ultrasound beam at the periphery of the transducer.
**Mirror image** artifact is the result of the ultrasound beam “bouncing” off two strong specular reflectors before returning to the transducer.

questions.explanation:
A. Yes. 胖的人要開harmonic
BC. Yes.
D. 錯誤.
- Side lobes: result of **nonuniformity** of the ultrasound beam at the **periphery** of the transducer.
- Acoustic shadowing: A signal void behind structures that strongly absorb or reflect ultrasonic waves. This happens most frequently with solid structures, such as in bone or stones.  通常是物質有強烈吸收/反射，以致後方無訊號
E. Yes. Reverberation也是 bouncing

questions.explanation:
- The chemical composition of red marrow in young adults is approximately **40% water**, 40% fat, and 20% protein.

   - patellofemoral groove (femoral trochlea): <1%
   - weight-bearing surface of the tibia: uncommon
2. ankle (talus)(4%): predominantly superomedial corner of the talus
3. elbow(6%) (capitellum)
4. others(15%): shoulder (glenoid)...

questions.questionText: 下列關於 Rheumatoid arthritis 及 Seronegative spondyloarthropathy (SPA)的影像學比較，SPA 較常發生的是：
questions.explanation:
An enthesis is the point where a ligament or tendon attaches to bone. (The plural form is entheses.)
Enthesopathy (en-THEE-sawp-a-thee) is the medical name for any disease or disorder affecting an enthesis.

questions.questionText: Which is the most common location for chondromyxoid fibroma?
questions.explanation:
-  Classical site: **tibia上1/3**(25%), with small tubular bones of the foot
-  Distal femur, and pelvis/sacrum being other relatively common locations.

questions.questionText: Which of the following is **not** the predisposing factor for osteosarcoma?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.119；Orthopedic Imaging: A Practical Approach, 6th edition, P1772.
questions.explanation: Paget disease、fibrous dysplasia、體外游離輻射線照射(external ionizing irradiation)皆為已知續發性骨肉瘤之危險因子(predisposing factor)，故「以上皆非」為錯誤敘述(即三者皆為危險因子，非「無」危險因子)。

questions.questionText: Concerning dysfunctional dialysis access grafts, the underlying abnormality is MOST frequently found:

S1: Right IPA, RGA, LGA
S23: Left IPA, left IMA, LGA

questions.questionText: Which of the followings is wrong about renal angiomyolipomas (AML) in tuberous sclerosis?

options.text: Most common benign tumors in tuberous sclerosis.
Less common than renal cysts in renal features of tuberous sclerosis.
They tend to occur at younger age compared with those in general population.
They tend to be multiple and larger compared with those in general population.

questions.explanation: more common. AML(53-75%)>renal cyst(18-53%)

questions.questionText: Which of the following statement is **false**?

options.text: The anterior division of the renal artery supplies both upper and lower portions of the kidney.
The segmental branches divided into interlobar arteries between the pyramids.
The arcuate arteries anastomose extensively with each other at the base of the pyramids.
The renal vein is anterior to the renal pelvis.
The left renal vein is anterior to the aorta.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.138；Applied Radiological Anatomy: The renal tract and retroperitoneum chapter.
questions.explanation: They form individual arcs which do not anastomose.

questions.questionText: Pelvic congestion syndrome (PCS) is a cause of chronic pelvic pain, its typical image finding includes all of the following except

options.text: dilated, torturous, enhancing tubular structures near the uterus and ovary.
on T1-weighted images, varices may appear as flow voids.
Ultrasound shows slow (less than 3cm/s) venous flow in cranial direction in left ovarian vein.
more than 50% of women with PCS have associated cystic ovaries.

questions.explanation:
Criteria for the sonographic diagnosis of varices includes:
- (1) the visualization of dilated ovarian veins **>4 mm** in diameter,
- (2) dilated tortuous arcuate veins in the myometrium that communicate with bilateral pelvic varicose veins,
- (3) **slow** blood flow (**< 3 cm/s**), and reversed caudal or **retrograde** venous blood flow particularly in the left ovarian vein
- CT: parauterine vein > 4mm, gonadal vein > 8mm
US or Venogram: gonadal vein > 5mm

questions.questionText: 下列何者為**非**?

options.text: The collagen vascular diseases that most commonly involve the lung are rheumatoid arthritis, progressive systemic sclerosis, systemic lupus erythematosus, polymyositis and dermatomyositis, mixed connective tissue disease, and Sjögren syndrome.
Interstitial lung disease and pulmonary arterial hypertension are the main causes of mortality and morbidity among patients with collagen vascular diseases

The two thoracic manifestations with the greatest clinical importance in patients with collagen vascular diseases are interstitial lung disease and pulmonary arterial hypertension, which are responsible for a large part of the mortality and morbidity in this patient group
A lesser degree of involvement of the parenchyma immediately adjacent to the pleura is unusually seen in NSIP.

questions.explanation:
1. immediate subpleural sparing - a relatively specific sign
2. can be symmetrically or diffusely distributed in all zones or display a basal predominance
3. mostly bilateral and symmetrical (~86% 14) but can be bilateral and asymmetrical in (10%) and rarely unilateral (3%)
4. mostly subpleural in distribution (~68%) but can be random (21%), diffuse (8%), and rarely central in distribution (3%)

questions.questionText: The **extrapleural space** which manifest as the intercostal stripe representing a combination (from most inner layer to most outer layer) of structures. Please choose the correct one.

options.text: Visceral pleura, parietal pleura, epipleural fat, endothoracic fascia, innermost intercostal muscle.
Parietal pleura, epipeural fat, endothoracic fascia, innermost intercostal muscle, inner intercostal muscle.
Parietal pleural, epipleural fat endothoracic fascia, innermost intercostal muscle.
Visceral pleura, parietal pleura, epipleural fat, endothoracic fascia.

questions.explanation: From Multidetector CT for Evaluation of the Extrapleural Space. Radiographics 2017;37:1352-1370

questions.questionText: Which one of the following radiographic feature is most likely to see in Tetralogy of the fallot ?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.125；Grainger & Allison's Diagnostic Radiology, Chapter 20, 423-446.e1.
questions.explanation:
法洛氏四合症(Tetralogy of Fallot)胸部X光典型呈「靴狀心(boot-shaped heart)」——右心室肥厚合併肺動脈幹凹陷、心尖上翹，同時因肺動脈狹窄致肺血流減少而肺紋理減少(非增加)。Rib notching為主動脈狹窄(coarctation)特徵；hilum腫大非本病典型特徵。

見 [[tetralogy-of-fallot]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following features about type 3 gastric carcinoid tumors is **wrong**?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.110；RadioGraphics 2017;37:516-536.

questions.questionText: Which of the following findings suggests colon cancer rather than diverticulitis?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.130；McGraw-Hill Specialty Board Review: RADIOLOGY, Written Exam GI Q2.
questions.explanation:
Regional lymphadenopathy is more commonly seen with cancer than with diverticulitis. Halo sign is indicative of diverticulitis, and mural thickening and pericolonic inflammatory change can be seen in both cancer and diverticulitis.
Ascites is not a discriminator.

questions.questionText: All of the following are considered vascular metastases on liver imaging, except:
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.130；McGraw-Hill Specialty Board Review: RADIOLOGY, Written Exam GI Q3.
questions.explanation: Lung carcinoma is usually associated with hypovascular metastases to the liver

questions.questionText: About meningioma, which description is far from truth?

options.text: Angiography：common show tumor blush and A-V shunting
If marked peritumoral edema, malignant in nature should be considered.

: sunburst or spokewheel appearances.
- cavenous hemangioma: common show tumor blush and A-V shunting.
- [[MRS#Meningioma]]

questions.questionText: 有關 Progressive multifocal leukoencephalopathy 下列敘述何者錯誤?

options.text: A demyelinating disorder caused by John Cunningham (JC) virus.
Around 80% of normal population have antibodies of JC virus but are disease-free due to normal immune response.
Involving periventricular to subcortical white matter, more common at frontal and occipital locations .
Usually presence of mass effect but rarely contrast enhancement.

questions.explanation:
There is little, or no mass effect or enhancement and the subcortical U-fibers are commonly asymmetrically involved subcortical frontal and parieto-occipital regions
- Milky way sign: multiple punctate high T2 signal lesions surrounding the main area
- Barbell sign: parieto-occipital signal abnormality crossing the splenium

questions.questionText: Which of the following is the main route of outflow for the cavernous sinus?
questions.explanation: Superior and inferior petrosal sinuses

questions.questionText: Which one of the following is **wrong**?

options.text: Calcineurin inhibitors can cause posterior reversible encephalopathy syndrome (PRES)
Cocaine and amphetamines can cause PRES as well
The side effects of phenytoin include skull bone thinning and cerebellar atrophy
Subacute combined degeneration of spinal cord can be caused by nitrous oxide during dental procedures
The complications of long-term total parenteral nutrition mainly are due to deposition of manganese

questions.explanation: Both cerebellar atrophy and hyperostosis of the skull can be seen with phenytoin use.

questions.questionText: About pituitary gland, which is **incorrect**?

options.text: Physiologic pituitary enlargement may be caused by puberty or pregnancy/postpartum state.
Pituitary gland consists of ventral adenohypophysis and dorsal neurohypophysis.
In T2-weighted image, hyperintense signal is usually observed at neurohypophysis.
In T1-weighted image, the signal of the normal anterior pituitary lobe appears isointense to pons on sagittal images.

questions.explanation: In ~~T2~~**T1**-weighted image, hyperintense signal is usually observed at neurohypophysis.

questions.questionText: Which one of the following features is wrong about Transient Tachypnea of the Newborn ([[TTNB]])?

options.text: Interstitial opacification most marked in the lower lobes

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.123；Grainger & Allison's Diagnostic Radiology, Chapter 76, 1778-1803.e2.
questions.explanation:
normal chest radiograph by 48-72 hours post-partum
Transient tachypnoea of the newborn, also known as retained fetal fluid or wet lung disease, presents in the neonate as tachypnoea for the first few hours of life, lasting up to one day. The tachypnoea usually resolves by within 48 hours.

questions.questionText: Features of hepatic focal fat deposition, which one is **wrong**?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.8；Radiographics. 2006 Nov-Dec;26(6):1637-53. Fatty liver: imaging patterns and pitfalls.
questions.explanation:
局部脂肪沉積/sparing 好發於膽囊窩旁、porta hepatis（門脈周圍）、鐮韌帶/葉裂旁等特定區域，A、B、C 皆為正確好發部位，故本題選 D（以上皆正確，無錯誤選項）。

見 [[fatty-liver]]

questions.questionText: Features of abdominal wall hernia, which one is **wrong**?

options.text: Inguinal hernia is the most common type
Femoral hernias are more common than inguinal hernia
Umbilical hernia are particularly common in women
Parastomal hernias are subtype of incisional hernia

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.9；RadioGraphics 2005;25(6):1501-20. Abdominal wall hernias: imaging features, complications, and diagnostic pitfalls at multi-detector row CT.
questions.explanation:
腹股溝疝為最常見的腹壁疝型別，股疝反而遠少於腹股溝疝，故「股疝較腹股溝疝常見」為錯誤敘述。臍疝好發女性、造口旁疝屬 incisional hernia 亞型皆為正確敘述。

見 [[groin-hernia]]

questions.questionText: Concerning dysfunctional dialysis access grafts, the underlying abnormality is MOST frequently found:
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.10；Vogel PM, Parise C. Comparison of SMART Stent Placement for Arteriovenous Graft Salvage versus Successful Graft PTA. J Vasc Interv Radiol 2005;16:1619-26.
questions.explanation: 透析用人工血管（AV graft）功能不良最常見的病灶位置是靜脈吻合端（venous anastomosis）的內膜增生狹窄，遠多於動脈吻合端、graft 中段或中心靜脈。

questions.questionText: Concerning transhepatic arterial chemoembolization (TACE) of hepatocellular carcinoma, which one of the following is TRUE?

options.text: TACE is the only treatment option for hepatocellular carcinoma.
TACE will prolong survival compared to systemic infused chemotherapy.
The effectiveness of TACE depends greatly on the choice of drugs used.
Thrombosis of the portal vein will increase the effectiveness of TACE

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.11；Georgiades CS, et al. J Vasc Interv Radiol 2005;16:1653-9；Brown DB, et al. J Vasc Interv Radiol 2005;16:1661-6.
questions.explanation:
TACE 相較全身輸注化療可顯著延長不可切除 HCC 病人的存活期。TACE 並非唯一治療選項（尚有手術/消融/移植/全身治療等）、療效非主要取決於藥物選擇、門脈血栓為相對禁忌而非增效因子。

見 [[tace]]

questions.questionText: 關於digital breast tomosynthesis (DBT)及full-field digital mammography(FFDM)之比較，以下何者為非？

options.text: FFDM(2D)和DBT(3D)同時施行時，陽性預測值(PPV)會比單獨2D時低
2D+3D同時施行，需切片之比率可能比單獨2D時高.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.12（官方答案鍵標 C，並註記 D 也有爭議）；Friedewald SM, et al. JAMA 2014;311(24):2499-2507.
questions.explanation:
Friedewald 2014 JAMA：DBT+FFDM 併用之 PPV1 較單獨 FFDM 更高（3.6% vs 1.8%），非更低，故 C 為錯誤敘述。recall rate 併用略低於單獨 FFDM（10.7% vs 10.3%，未達顯著）、癌偵測率併用較高（3.8‰ vs 1.8‰）。

> [!warning] 官方詳解在此題答案欄註記「D也錯」，惟依 JAMA 2014 原始數據 D（切片比率可能較高）與 PPV 上升方向一致，暫依官方標示 C 為準，待醫師確認。

見 [[breast-tomosynthesis]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following descriptions about Fournier gangrene is WRONG?

options.text: CT is essential to identify the extent of disease
In most cases, primary focus of infection could not be identified.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.15；Dahnert W. Radiology Review Manual, p.767.
questions.explanation:
多數 Fournier gangrene 病例的原發感染源「可被找到」，最常見為肛門直腸來源（perianal fistula/abscess），其次泌尿生殖道或會陰創傷；故「大多數找不到原發灶」為錯誤敘述。

見 [[fournier-gangrene]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT the common complication of ADPKD?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.16；Katano K, et al. Clinical Nephrology 2011;75(Suppl 1):S24-S26.
questions.explanation:
ADPKD 常見併發症為囊腫感染、囊內出血、尿路結石；沾黏（adhesion）並非 ADPKD 病理本身的典型直接併發症。

見 [[adpkd-complications]]

questions.questionText: A CT scan with findings of a 4.3 cm nodule at right upper lobe with a contralateral 2.0 cm hilar lymphadenopathy and multiple metastatic bilateral pleural nodules with bilateral pleural effusion and one metastatic nodule at left adrenal gland. Which of the following clinical TNM classification according to AJCC 8th edition is correct for the above description?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.26；AJCC Cancer Staging Manual 8th Edition, Lung Cancer chapter.
questions.explanation:
4.3 cm 結節落於 >4–5cm 區間為 T2b；對側肺門淋巴結腫大依規則一律為 N3（非 N2）；雙側肋膜多發轉移結節/積液符合 M1a，另有左腎上腺單一轉移符合 M1b。

> [!warning] 官方詳解本題答案欄僅標示「A C?」（存疑未定案）。依 N 分期邏輯（對側肺門淋巴結應為 N3）僅 C 選項符合；惟同時具 M1a 與 M1b 特徵時分期表未列對應單一類別,暫依此邏輯記為 C,待醫師對照原始 AJCC 8th 規則與原始考卷確認。

見 [[lung-cancer-tnm-staging]]

questions.questionText: About description of pulmonary vasculitis, which one is **wrong**?

options.text: Temporal (giant cell) vasculitis was classified as large vessel disease.
Behcet's Disease was classified as small vessel disease.
Wegener's Granulomatosis was also classified as immune complex associated vasculitis.
Microscopic Polyangiitis was also classified as immune complex associated vasculitis, usually P-ANCA is present in 80%

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.27；W. Richard Webb, Thoracic Imaging, 3rd edition, p.552.
questions.explanation:
Behcet's disease 侵犯動靜脈側任何口徑血管，屬獨立的 variable vessel vasculitis 類別，非小血管疾病。

見 [[pulmonary-vasculitis-classification]]

questions.questionText: 有關 CXR for acute dyspnea，下列何者為非？

options.text: 由cardiac size, vessel distribution, pleural effusions 來區分cardiogenic 或 non cardiogenic pulmonary edema.
pneumothorax was more obvious in forced expiratory film.
CXR had important role in diagnosis of pulmonary embolism, usually abnormal.
lateral view was more sensitive than AP view to show pleural effusion.

questions.explanation:
CXR 對肺栓塞診斷既非敏感亦非特異，不能單靠 CXR 通常異常來診斷 PE，故本敘述錯誤。

questions.questionText: What is the standard treatment of malignant SVC syndrome?

options.text: Endovascular treatment is only undertaken with benign disease.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.31；Radiology 2013;266(3).
questions.explanation:
血管內支架置放（stenting）為惡性 SVC 症候群的標準治療，快速緩解症狀；血管內治療亦適用於惡性病灶，非僅限良性。

questions.questionText: May-Thurner syndrome means?

options.text: Entrapment of the left renal vein between the superior mesenteric artery and the aorta
Third portion of the duodenum is compressed between the superior mesenteric artery and the aorta
Compression of the celiac artery by the median arcuate ligament
Left common iliac vein is compressed between the right common iliac artery and fifth lumbar vertebra

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.32；AJR November 2012, Volume 199, Number 5.
questions.explanation:
May-Thurner syndrome：左髂總靜脈被夾於右髂總動脈與第五腰椎間受壓。A為nutcracker syndrome、B為SMA syndrome、C為median arcuate ligament syndrome，皆為不同壓迫症候群。

見 [[may-thurner]]

questions.questionText: Complex cystic breast masses 下列何者為非？

options.text: Complex cystic breast masses demonstrate both anechoic (cystic) and echogenic (solid) components at ultrasonography.
Common benign findings include fibrocystic changes, intraductal or intracystic papilloma without atypia, and fibroadenoma.
Common atypical findings include atypical ductal hyperplasia, atypical papilloma, atypical lobular hyperplasia, ductal carcinoma in situ and lobular carcinoma in situ.
Malignant findings include, infiltrating ductal carcinoma, and infiltrating lobular carcinoma.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.33；RadioGraphics. 2007 Oct;27 Suppl 1:S53-64.
questions.explanation:
常見異型（atypical）表現應為 ADH、非典型乳突瘤、ALH、LCIS，不含原位乳管癌（DCIS）；DCIS 應歸類為惡性表現。

見 [[breast-cystic-lesions]]

questions.questionText: Segment 5 of liver may drain into the following veins, except?

questions.questionText: About Ogilvie's syndrome, which is wrong?

options.text: Probably due to imbalance in the regulation of colonic motor activity
May cause bowel perforation or ischemia

questions.explanation:
Ogilvie's syndrome 是結腸（非小腸）的假性阻塞。

questions.questionText: Annular pancreas 中有多少是incomplete type?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.39；AJR Am J Roentgenol. 2009 Aug;193(2).

questions.questionText: Which of the following is the most common anatomical variant of the pancreas?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.39；Fundamentals of Body MRI, 2012, P132.

questions.questionText: What is the most significant complication of wandering spleen?

options.text: Compression of the inferior vena cava by the spleen

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.39；Poster No.C-2817, ECR 2010.
questions.explanation:
脾臟懸韌帶鬆弛致脾蒂拉長，最顯著併發症為脾臟血管蒂扭轉（splenic torsion）致缺血梗塞。

見 [[wandering-spleen]]

questions.questionText: 下列關於Dual Gradient-Echo In-Phase and Opposed-Phase Hepatic MR Imaging的敘述，何者錯誤?

options.text: A dual gradient-echo technique is very helpful in the visualization of T2* effects and allows to detect hemochromatosis or hemosiderosis.

The displayed intensity on opposed-phase images is the absolute value of the difference between fat and water signals. So tissue that consists of mostly fat protons (eg, subcutaneous fat) shows only little or no obvious drop in signal intensity.
Metallic objects demonstrate a larger susceptibility artifact on the image with shorter echo time.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.41；RadioGraphics, Vol. 26, No. 5.
questions.explanation:
磁化率偽影大小與 TE 成正比（Susceptibility Artifact Size ∝ TE），TE 越長偽影越大，故「較短 TE 偽影較大」為錯誤敘述。

見 [[chemical-shift-artifact]]

questions.questionText: 關於Small bowel obstruction (SBO)，下列敘述何者錯誤?

options.text: The transition point is determined by identifying a caliber change between the dilated proximal and collapsed distal small bowel loops.
The pathognomonic CT findings of gallstone ileus are pneumobilia, ectopic gallstone and SBO.
Neoplasm could cause SBO. Small bowel involvement by metastatic cancer is more common than involvement by primary small bowel adenocarcinoma.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.42；RadioGraphics, Vol. 29, No. 2.
questions.explanation:
A/B/C 敘述皆正確：transition point 定義、gallstone ileus 三徵象、轉移癌造成 SBO 較原發小腸腺癌常見。

questions.questionText: Ovarian dermoid cyst 最主要的診斷依據為何種組成成份?

questions.questionText: 下列何者不屬於 mixed uterine sarcoma?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.45；Gynecol Oncol (2009), doi:10.1016/j.ygyno.2009.09.023.
questions.explanation:
子宮肉瘤公認分類含 MMMT（carcinosarcoma）、leiomyosarcoma、adenosarcoma；angiosarcoma（血管肉瘤）並非子宮肉瘤的公認分類成員。

見 [[uterine-position-and-sarcoma]]

questions.questionText: Spontaneous abdominal hemorrhage 的原因不包含下列何者?

options.text: 以上皆是 spontaneous abdominal hemorrhage 的可能原因

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.45；AJR October 2009, Volume 193, Number 4.
questions.explanation:
破裂性肝癌、破裂性腎血管肌脂肪瘤、破裂性卵巢囊腫、子宮外孕破裂皆為自發性腹內出血的可能原因。

見 [[spontaneous-abdominal-hemorrhage]]

questions.questionText: 關於 chondroblastoma，下列何者為非?

options.text: 特徵為發生在 epiphysis or apophysis

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.47；J Bone Joint Surg Am. 2000 Aug;82-A(8):1140-5.
questions.explanation:
Chondroblastoma 為罕見（rare）良性軟骨源性腫瘤，非常見腫瘤。

見 [[chondroblastoma]]

questions.questionText: 下列何者為非?

options.text: 因為impaction,而造成glenoid labrum depressed fracture，形成所謂Hill-Sachs lesion.
Anterior dislocation 常合併rotator cuff injury.
The most common pathogens of osteomyelitis is S. aureus

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.47；Ann R Coll Surg Engl. 2009 Jan;91(1):2-7.
questions.explanation:
Hill-Sachs lesion 是因肱骨頭撞擊前下盂緣造成的肱骨頭後外側壓迫骨折，非盂唇（glenoid labrum）本身的凹陷性骨折。

見 [[shoulder-dislocation]]

questions.questionText: Acromioclavicular joint space wider than __mm is abnormal.
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.48；Acta Orthop Scand. 1983 Jun;54(3):431-3.
questions.explanation:
肩鎖關節間隙 >6 mm 視為異常，提示 AC 韌帶斷裂。

見 [[ac-joint-injury]]

questions.questionText: 在 odontoid fracture 分類中，何種type為unstable?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.48；Tintinalli's Emergency Medicine: A Comprehensive Study Guide, 7e.
questions.explanation:
依本題來源 Tintinalli's Emergency Medicine，Anderson-D'Alonzo type II 與 type III 皆列為 unstable（b+c）。

> [!warning] 此分類與部分骨科 Tier 1 文獻（如 Acta Biomed 系列，見 [[odontoid-fracture]]）認為 type III 因骨折面積大、血供佳而相對穩定、易癒合的描述有出入，屬文獻分歧，建議對照原始考卷與兩方文獻脈絡確認。

見 [[odontoid-fracture]]

questions.questionText: 海馬鉤疝脫(uncal herniation)容易壓迫那一對腦神經?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.50；Textbook of Clinical Neurology, 3e, Part1, Chapter1.
questions.explanation:
海馬鉤疝脫最容易壓迫第三對腦神經（動眼神經）。

見 [[brain-herniation-syndromes]]

questions.questionText: 病患右手大拇指酸麻刺痛,那個神經被壓迫最有可能?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.50；Clin Orthop Relat Res. 2010 Jul;468(7):1739-1745.
questions.explanation:
大拇指皮節對應 C6 神經根，故右手大拇指酸麻刺痛最可能為 C6 神經根壓迫。

見 [[cervical-radiculopathy]]

questions.questionText: Which one of the following is the most common intra-axial posterior fossa neoplasm in adults?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.51；Neuroimaging Clin N Am. 2016 Nov;26(4):493-510.
questions.explanation:
成人顱內軸內後顱窩腫瘤以轉移瘤（metastasis）最常見。

見 [[posterior-fossa-neoplasm-by-age]]

questions.questionText: What is pachymeninges?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.54；RadioGraphics, Vol. 27, No. 2.
questions.explanation: 放射影像文獻（RadioGraphics）採功能性二分法：pachymeninges 為硬腦膜＋蜘蛛膜（dura + arachnoid），leptomeninges 為軟腦膜（pia）。此分類與部分基礎解剖教材（leptomeninges=arachnoid+pia，pachymeninges=dura 單獨）不同，屬文獻脈絡差異，見 [[meninges-anatomy]]。

questions.questionText: On conventional MRI, all of the following are direct signs of cerebral veinous thrombosis involving the sagittal sinus, except?

options.text: Bright signal in the sinus on T1-weighted images.
Isointense signal in the sinus on T1-weighted images.
Absence of signal in the sinus on FLAIR images.
Exaggerated signal loss in the sinus due to increased susceptibility effect on T2-weighted gradient-echo images.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.59；Neurol Int. 2011 Nov 29.
questions.explanation:
急性血栓 T1 等訊號、亞急性血栓 T1 高訊號、T2*GRE 因磁化率效應訊號誇大流失皆為公認直接徵象；FLAIR 上「無訊號」並非標準直接徵象描述。

見 [[cerebral-venous-thrombosis-mri]]

questions.questionText: In xenon inhalation CT, the xenon gas is inhalated?

options.text: as a mixture with room air

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.60；Neurosurg Clin N Am. 1996 Oct;7(4):605-16.
questions.explanation:
Xe/CT 標準吸入方式為氙氣與氧氣混合（常見比例約28%氙+40%氧+32%室內空氣）。

見 [[xenon-ct-perfusion]]

questions.questionText: 下列那個不是 Diffusion MRI artifacts?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.61；J Magn Reson Imaging. 2006 Sep;24(3):478-88.
questions.explanation:
渦電流、動作偽影、鬼影皆為 Diffusion MRI 常見偽影。

見 [[mri-flow-and-diffusion-artifacts]]

questions.questionText: 下列何者不會影響flow-related enhancement?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.62；Magnetic Resonance Imaging - E-Book: Physical and Biological Principles, P334.
questions.explanation:
TR 長短、flip angle 大小、slice thickness 厚薄皆會影響 flow-related enhancement 強度。

見 [[mri-flow-and-diffusion-artifacts]]

questions.questionText: About breast MR imaging, which one is incorrect?

options.text: MR imaging can be helpful for further investigation of a persistent one-view finding, particularly in the absence of a US correlation.
In general, breast MR imaging is helpful in affecting the management of probably benign or indeterminate calcifications.
A positive MR imaging should increase clinical suspicion and potentially guide tissue diagnosis, particularly when US is negative.
A negative or benign MR imaging finding reinforces the likelihood that an ambiguous finding is not clinically significant.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.63；Breast MR Imaging for Equivocal Mammographic Findings: Help or Hindrance? RadioGraphics 2016;36:page 944.
questions.explanation:
乳房 MRI 對可能良性/無法確定鈣化的處置並無幫助，因其陰性預測值不足。

見 [[breast-mri-clinical-utility]]

questions.questionText: Calcifications with suspicious morphology have an increased risk for malignancy, which of the following has the highest risk for malignancy?

options.text: Fine linear or fine linear branching

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.64；A pictorial Review of Changes in the BI-RADS Fifth edition. RadioGraphics 2016;36:page 624.
questions.explanation:
可疑鈣化型態依惡性風險由低到高：amorphous < coarse heterogeneous < fine pleomorphic < fine linear/fine-linear branching（風險最高）。

見 [[breast-calcifications]]

questions.questionText: About the internal thoracic lymphadenopathy in breast cancer, which one is correct?

options.text: Factors that increase the likelihood of internal thoracic node metastases include medial location, nonpalpable tumor, age less than 35 years and lymphovascular invasion.
Nodal enlargement >5mm is the best clue to metastatic involvement at US, CT or MR imaging.
US-guided FNAB can be a safe and effective method for internal thoracic node sampling when clinically desired.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.65；Internal Thoracic Lymphadenopathy in Breast Cancer. RadioGraphics 2017;37:page 1025.
questions.explanation:
內乳淋巴結轉移風險因子、增大>5mm之偵測線索、US導引FNAB取樣安全性皆為正確敘述。

見 [[internal-thoracic-lymphadenopathy]]

questions.questionText: Which of the typical features of usual interstitial pneumonia is not true?

options.text: Involves the mid and upper zones of the lung

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.68；Radiopaedia, Usual interstitial pneumonia.
questions.explanation:
UIP/IPF 為 subpleural + basal predominant（周邊＋基底為主），非中上肺野為主。

見 [[ipf]]

questions.questionText: Which rib malformation has the following imaging characteristic: anterior portion of the rib is duplicated and most often the fourth rib?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.69；Traumatic Rib Injury: Patterns, Imaging Pitfalls, Complications, and Treatment. RadioGraphics 2017;37:page 633.
questions.explanation:
Bifid rib（分叉肋）特徵為肋骨前段重複分叉，最常見於第四肋。

見 [[rib-congenital-anomalies]]

questions.questionText: About pulmonary tuberculosis, which of the following is not true?

options.text: Primary tuberculosis has radiologic findings include lymphadenopathy, consolidation, pleural effusion, and military nodules.
Postprimary tuberculosis has consolidations that are predominant in the apical and upper lung zones, nodules and cavitation.
Classic nontuberculous mycobacterial infection is characterized by lower lobe cavitary lesions and centrilobular and tree-in-bud nodules.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.70；Pulmonary Tuberculosis: Role of Radiology in Diagnosis and Management. RadioGraphics 2017;37:page 633.
questions.explanation:
典型（空洞型）非結核分枝桿菌感染特徵為上肺葉（非下肺葉）空洞病灶合併中心小葉與樹芽狀結節，影像可與後原發性結核幾乎無法區分。

見 [[pulmonary-tuberculosis-imaging]]

questions.questionText: The common osseous chest wall malignancies include?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.70；Imaging Evaluation of Malignant Chest Wall Neoplasms. RadioGraphics 2016;36:page 1287.
questions.explanation:
胸壁骨性惡性病灶最常見為轉移與多發性骨髓瘤；本題選項中骨性惡性代表為 multiple myeloma（其餘為軟組織惡性腫瘤）。

見 [[chest-wall-tumors]]

questions.questionText: Which CT artifacts of coronary CT will not be improved by increased tube potential?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.72；Artifacts at Cardiac CT: Physics and Solutions. RadioGraphics 2016;36:page 2066.
questions.explanation:
Slab/banding artifact 成因為掃描期間對比劑強化變化，與 tube potential 無關；beam hardening、metal/streak artifact、quantum mottle 皆可由增加 tube potential 改善。

見 [[cardiac-ct-artifacts]]

questions.questionText: The diagnostic characteristics of perimembranous defects include?

options.text: Fibrous continuity between the leaflets of the aortic and tricuspid valves
The presence of a membranous septum remnant at the posterior aspect of the defect

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.74；Septal Atriventricular Junction Region: Comprehensive Imaging in Adults. RadioGraphics 2016;36:page 1966.
questions.explanation:
膜周型缺損診斷特徵含主動脈瓣下位置、主動脈-三尖瓣纖維連續、膜部間隔殘餘，皆為正確敘述。

見 [[vsd-types]]

questions.questionText: Which of the imaging characteristics of amyloidosis is not true?

options.text: Nodular parenchymal amyloidosis may manifest as solitary or multiple pulmonary nodules.
The predominant late gadolinium enhancement pattern in amyloidosis is diffuse, subendocardial or transmural delayed enhancement.
Usually, long segment tracheal widening is encountered at imaging.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.77；Amyloidosis: Modern Cross-sectional Imaging. RadioGraphics 2015;35:page 1382.
questions.explanation:
長節段氣管狹窄（非增寬）並非典型必見表現；其餘（結節型肺侵犯、心臟瀰漫性/心內膜下或跨壁延遲增強、基底周邊肺分布）皆為正確敘述。

見 [[pulmonary-amyloidosis]]

questions.questionText: When using contrast-enhanced US to approach focal liver mass, which of the following will have "portal venous or late phase washout"?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.78；Contrast-enhanced US Approach to the Diagnosis of Focal Liver Masses. RadioGraphics 2017;37:page 1391.
questions.explanation:
Cholangiocarcinoma 屬非肝細胞性惡性病灶，呈快速且強烈的門脈期/延遲期 washout；hemangioma 與 FNH 為良性持續強化。

見 [[contrast-enhanced-ultrasound]]

questions.questionText: Neuroendocrine tumors (NETs) of the appendix are often difficult to visualize at cross-sectional imaging. Which of the following is incorrect?

options.text: Often small in size with a mean diameter of less than 1cm
75% of NETs involve the distal appendix, while 25% occur at the base and may cause appendicitis.
The lesions typically manifest as small submucosal masses or nodular wall thickening.
NETs typically have poor enhancement and may contain calcifications, mimicking appendicoliths.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.79；Neoplasms of the Appendix: Pictorial Review with Clinical and Pathologic Correlation. RadioGraphics 2017;37:page 1060.
questions.explanation:
闌尾 NET 典型呈明顯（avid）強化，非弱強化。

見 [[appendix-anatomy]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is not the factors influencing the development of extra-hepatic collateral arteries supplying HCC?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.80；Chemoembolization of Hepatocellular Carcinoma with Extrahepatic Collateral Blood Supply: Anatomic and Technical Considerations. RadioGraphics 2017;37:page 964.
questions.explanation:
多發病灶（multifocal lesions）並非肝外側枝動脈發展的公認因子；腫瘤>5cm、曾手術、肝外浸潤皆為公認因子。

見 [[tace]]

questions.questionText: Which of the advantages for CT imaging in infective endocarditis is not true?

options.text: When prosthetic material, central lines or devices are present
Complex infections with air or gas
Complete hemodynamic imaging or repeated follow-up imaging

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.76；Infectious Diseases of the Heart: Pathophysiology, Clinical and Imaging Overview. RadioGraphics 2016;36:page 981.
questions.explanation:
完整血流動力學評估或重複追蹤影像是 MRI（而非 CT）在感染性心內膜炎的角色；人工材料存在、含氣感染、冠脈/黴菌性動脈瘤評估皆為 CT 之優勢情境。

見 [[cardiac-infection-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following organs have the highest rate of heterotopic pancreas?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.82；Heterotopic Pancreas: Histopathologic Features, Imaging Findings, and Complications. RadioGraphics 2017;37:page 486.
questions.explanation:
異位胰臟最常見於胃（胃竇大彎側，幽門6cm內），其次為十二指腸與近端空腸。

見 [[heterotopic-pancreas]]

questions.questionText: About translocation RCC, which of the following is true?

options.text: It is the most frequent type of RCC in children.
Generally has a heterogeneous appearance owing to solid and cystic components with hemorrhage, necrosis and calcifications.
The retroperitoneal lymph node involvement is common, even with small tumors.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.84；Renal Tumors of Childhood: Radiologic-Pathologic Correlation Part 2. The 2nd Decade. RadioGraphics 2017;37:page 1539.
questions.explanation:
Translocation RCC 為兒童/青少年最常見RCC亞型、呈異質性外觀、即使腫瘤小仍常見腹膜後淋巴結侵犯，皆為正確敘述。

見 [[renal-cell-carcinoma]]

questions.questionText: Ultrasound diagnostic criteria for renal artery stenosis can be divided into direct signs and indirect signs. Which of the following belongs to the direct signs?

options.text: Doppler US artifacts caused by turbulence (aliasing)
Acceleration time (time to peak systole) > 70 msec

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.85；Radiologic Assessment of Native Renal Vasculature: A Multimodality Review. RadioGraphics 2017;37:page 140.
questions.explanation:
因紊流造成的Doppler US假影（aliasing）為狹窄處本身的直接徵象；pulsus parvus et tardus、acceleration index、acceleration time皆為狹窄遠端的間接徵象。

見 [[renal-artery-stenosis]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following tumors has microscopic fat?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.86；Fat-containing Retroperitoneal Lesions: Imaging Characteristics, Localization, and Differential Diagnosis. RadioGraphics 2016;36:page 718.
questions.explanation:
Adrenal adenoma、adrenocortical carcinoma、pheochromocytoma 皆可含微觀脂肪成分。

見 [[adrenal-lesions]]

questions.questionText: When angiography shows direct fistulous formation between a single artery and a single draining vein with coexistence of pseudoaneurysms, what is the classification of the renal AV shunts?

options.text: Type I Nontraumatic renal AV shunts
Type II Nontraumatic renal AV shunts
Type III Nontraumatic renal AV shunts

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.87；Renal Arteriovenous Shunts: Clinical Features, Imaging Appearance, and Transcatheter Embolization Based on Angioarchitecture. RadioGraphics 2016;36:page 586.
questions.explanation:
單一動脈對單一引流靜脈的直接瘻管形成，合併假性動脈瘤，定義為外傷性腎動靜脈瘻管。

見 [[renal-av-shunt-classification]]

questions.questionText: The clinical features of hypertrophic osteoarthropathy (HOA) include?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.88；Hypertrophic Osteoarthropathy: Clinical and Imaging Features. RadioGraphics 2017;37:page 158.
questions.explanation:
杵狀指、長管骨骨膜增生、關節積液合併滑膜絨毛增生，皆為 HOA 公認的臨床特徵。

見 [[hypertrophic-osteoarthropathy]]

questions.questionText: About pectoralis major, which of the following statements is false?

options.text: Clavicular head is more commonly torn.
The bicipital groove is a key structure in the US evaluation of the pectoralis major.
At imaging, edema or fluid within the deltopectoral groove and anterior to the coracobrachialis muscle should prompt suspicion of pectoralis major injury.
US findings of pectoralis major tendon injuries include disruption, absence, and retraction of the tendon and muscle fibers, as well as hematoma.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.89；US and MR imaging of Pectoralis Major Injuries. RadioGraphics 2017;37:page 177.
questions.explanation:
胸骨頭（sternal head，占肌肉體積約80%）較常撕裂，非鎖骨頭。

見 [[pectoralis-major-injury]]

questions.questionText: About metabolic bone disease, which of the following is false?

options.text: Osteoporosis is the most common metabolic bone disease.
Osteomalacia is inadequate or abnormal mineralization of osteoid in cortical and trabecular bone.
In 95% of patients with hyperparathyroidism, skeletal findings are most readily recognized in the spine.
Renal osteodystrophy refers to the complex of findings observed in the setting of chronic renal insufficiency.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.91；Imaging Findings of Metabolic Bone Disease. RadioGraphics 2016;36:page 1872.
questions.explanation:
95%副甲狀腺機能亢進病人的骨骼變化最容易在「手部」（橈側中節指骨骨膜下骨吸收）辨識，非脊椎。

見 [[metabolic-bone-disease-imaging]]

questions.questionText: About injured pediatric athlete in upper extremity, which of the following statements is false?

options.text: Pediatric athletes are related to the presence of the cartilaginous physes and apophyses required for skeletal growth.
Little league's shoulder is an overuse injury, which is usually seen in baseball pitchers aged 11-16 years old.
Gymnast's wrist develops when there is repetitive trauma to the distal wrist in flextension.

questions.explanation:
Gymnast's wrist 是因手腕反覆處於「伸直（extension）」而非「屈曲（flexion）」姿勢下，遠端橈骨骨骺板受壓迫性創傷所致。

見 [[pediatric-athlete-upper-extremity-injury]]

questions.questionText: Temporal lobe involvement with sparing of the lentiform nuclei is typical in ______?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.93。
questions.explanation:
HSV 腦炎典型侵犯顳葉並保留豆狀核，為其診斷特徵性影像表現。

見 [[herpes-simplex-encephalitis]]

questions.questionText: Which the following one is incorrect in description of ductal ectasia of breast?

options.text: Ductal ectasia is most commonly found in the subareolar regions of both breasts on mammography
Calcifications may be present within or around ducts
MRI showed retroareolar tubular structures may be bright when filled with proteinaceous or bloody fluid on T1WI
All of the above are correct

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.95；Diagnostic imaging breast, page 45.
questions.explanation:
雙側乳暈下好發位置、管內外鈣化、MRI T1WI因蛋白性/血性液體可呈高訊號，皆為正確敘述。

見 [[breast-cystic-lesions]]

questions.questionText: Which the following one is incorrect in description of Ductal carcinoma in situ (DCIS) of breast?

options.text: Calcifications are the most common findings
30-67% DCIS patients eventually develop invasive carcinoma in same region
Presence of fine linear or branching calcifications is highly suggestive of DCIS, usually high-grade
All of the above are correct

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.96；Diagnostic imaging breast, page 104.
questions.explanation:
鈣化為DCIS最常見表現、30-67%病人最終發展侵襲性癌、細線狀/分支狀鈣化高度提示高級別DCIS，皆為正確敘述。

見 [[breast-calcifications]]

questions.questionText: Which the following one is incorrect in description of Invasive lobular carcinoma of breast?

options.text: The best diagnostic clue is developing focal asymmetry with distortion and palpable thickening
Ultrasounds can be nearly anechoic with posterior enhancement
All of the above are correct

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.96；Diagnostic imaging breast, page 144.
questions.explanation:
ILC 最佳診斷線索為局部不對稱合併結構扭曲與可觸摸增厚、鈣化少見（1-11%），皆正確。

> [!warning] 選項C「近乎無回音伴後方回音增強」與 ILC 典型US表現（不規則低回音、邊界不清、後方聲影/shadowing，而非後方增強）不一致——後方增強通常提示囊性/液性病灶而非ILC典型的浸潤性實質病灶。本題原始詳解本身之補充註解亦僅提及「低回音伴後方聲影」，未支持「近乎無回音伴後方增強」之描述。官方標示答案為D（以上皆正確），暫依官方為準，惟此選項C與文獻存在明顯矛盾，建議醫師對照原始考卷確認。

見 [[invasive-lobular-carcinoma]]

questions.questionText: Which the following one is incorrect in description of Marfan syndrome?

options.text: Diagnosis of Marfan syndrome based on Ghent criteria which includes cardiovascular (major criteria), ocular (major criteria) and pulmonary (minor criteria) abnormalities
Annuloaortic ectasia and ascending aortic dissection are the two major criteria.
Mitral valve prolapse is the most prevalent valvular abnormality seen in 35-100% of patients
All of the above are correct

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.97；Diagnostic imaging chest page. II 2-32.
questions.explanation:
Ghent分類心血管/眼科為主要標準、肺部為次要標準（無獨立肺部主要標準）；環主動脈擴張與升主動脈剝離為兩大主要標準；MVP為最常見瓣膜異常(35-100%)，皆正確。

見 [[marfan-syndrome]]

questions.questionText: Which the following one is incorrect in description of pulmonary artery sarcoma?

options.text: Pulmonary artery sarcomas are often arose from central or peripheral pulmonary arteries, but also could be in smaller vessels and capillaries.
CECT may show filling defect in central or peripheral pulmonary vessels with enhancement
All of the above are correct

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.97；Diagnostic imaging chest page. II 4-70.
questions.explanation:
肺動脈肉瘤好發中央/周邊肺動脈亦可侵犯更小血管、胸部平片常正常、CECT見填充缺損合併強化，皆正確。

見 [[pulmonary-artery-sarcoma]]

questions.questionText: Which the following one is incorrect in description of fibrous tumor of the pleura?

options.text: CECT revealed obtuse angle of pleural lesions with homogeneous enhancement when tumors < 6 cm
MRI shows low signal intensity in T1WI & T2WI
Fibrous tumor of the pleura might be related with Doege-Potter syndrome
All of the above are correct

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.98；Diagnostic imaging chest page. III, 1-37.
questions.explanation:
腫瘤<6cm與胸膜呈鈍角均質強化、MRI T1/T2皆常低訊號、可併發Doege-Potter症候群，皆正確。

見 [[solitary-fibrous-tumor-pleura]]

questions.questionText: Which the following one is incorrect in description of Non-Hodgkin lymphoma?

options.text: Superior mediastinal nodes (pre-vascular and para-tracheal) are predominantly involved in approximately 75% of patients
Intrathoracic involvement in 50% of newly diagnosed cases.
Calcification rarely seen prior to treatment
All of the above are correct

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.98；Diagnostic imaging chest page. II, 1-26.
questions.explanation:
上縱膈淋巴結約75%為主要侵犯部位、約50%新診斷病人有胸腔內侵犯、治療前鈣化罕見，皆正確。

見 [[thoracic-lymphoma-hd-nhl]]

questions.questionText: Which the following one is incorrect in description of Hodgkin disease?

options.text: Most commonly involves anterior, superior mediastinal nodes and prevascular and para tracheal lymph nodes are most commonly affected.
Nodes rarely calcify prior to treatment
CT is the modality of choice for initial staging and follow-up monitoring of HD
All of the above are correct

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.99；Diagnostic imaging chest page. II, 1-22.
questions.explanation:
最常侵犯前上縱膈血管前/氣管旁淋巴結、治療前罕見鈣化、CT為初始分期與追蹤監測首選，皆正確。

見 [[thoracic-lymphoma-hd-nhl]]

questions.questionText: Which the following one is incorrect in description of Extravasation Of Contrast Med?

options.text: The reported incidence of intravenous contrast media extravasation related to power injection for CT has ranged from 0.1% to 0.9%
The acute tissue injury resulting from extravasation of iodinated contrast media is possibly related primarily to the hyperosmolality of the extravasated fluid.

An immediate surgical consultation is indicated for any patient in whom one or more of the following signs or symptoms develops: progressive swelling or pain, altered tissue perfusion, change in sensation in the affected limb, and skin ulceration or blistering.
All of the above are correct

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.100；ACR Manual on Contrast Media page. 20.
questions.explanation:
外滲通報發生率約0.1-0.9%、急性組織傷害主因為高滲透壓、出現進行性腫痛/灌流改變/感覺改變/皮膚潰瘍水泡時應立即照會外科，皆正確。

見 [[contrast-media-safety]]

questions.questionText: Which the following one is incorrect in description of AKIN definition of Acute Kidney Injury within 48 hours after a nephrotoxic event?

options.text: Absolute serum creatinine increase ≥0.3 mg/dL (>26.4 μmol/L)
A percentage increase in serum creatinine ≥50% (≥1.5-fold above baseline).
Urine output reduced to ≤0.5 mL/kg/hour for at least 6 hours.
All of the above are correct

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.101；ACR Manual on Contrast Media page. 36.
questions.explanation:
AKIN(Acute Kidney Injury Network)診斷標準為48小時內符合下列任一項：肌酸酐絕對值上升≥0.3 mg/dL、或相對上升≥50%(≥1.5倍基礎值)、或尿量≤0.5 mL/kg/hr達6小時以上，三者皆為AKIN定義之診斷條件，故皆正確。

見 [[contrast-induced-aki]]

questions.questionText: What is the major preventive action to mitigate the risk of CIN prior to contrast medium administration?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.102；ACR Manual on Contrast Media page. 41.
questions.explanation:
預防CIN最主要措施為靜脈輸液擴容(volume expansion/hydration)，為現行實證醫學最廣被接受之預防方法；利尿劑、N-acetylcysteine、碳酸氫鈉皆缺乏充分實證支持作為常規預防手段。

見 [[contrast-induced-nephropathy-prevention]]

questions.questionText: Which the following one could be the adverse reactions to GI tract water-soluble iodinated contrast media?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.102；ACR Manual on Contrast Media page. 62.
questions.explanation:
腸胃道水溶性碘顯影劑可能之不良反應包括：過敏樣反應、甲狀腺功能改變(碘吸收所致)、菌血症(灌腸操作相關的暫時性菌血症，文獻報告發生率不一)，三者皆有可能發生。

見 [[gi-contrast-media-adverse-reactions]]

questions.questionText: 以下有關游離輻射的健康效應，何者正確？

options.text: 確定效應：因為游離輻射導致組織或器官之功能損傷而造成之效應，可能有劑量低限值，超過這個值才會發生。
機率效應：指致癌效應及遺傳效應，沒有劑量低限值，劑量越大越可能發生。
急性曝露或年有效劑量達到100毫西弗（mSv），每10000人中可能有55人，因此得到癌症；每10000人中可能有2人，出現遺傳效應。

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.103；輻射災害第一線應變人員手冊 page 65.
questions.explanation:
確定效應具劑量閾值、超過閾值才發生且嚴重度隨劑量上升；機率效應(致癌/遺傳)無劑量閾值、劑量越大機率越高但嚴重度不變；急性曝露達100 mSv時，每萬人約55人可能致癌、2人可能出現遺傳效應(此為輻射防護常用之風險係數估計值)，三者敘述皆正確。

見 [[radiation-stochastic-effects]]、[[radiation-deterministic-effects]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following storage disease not demonstrating ventricular hypertrophy?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.106；RadioGraphics 2013;33:1977-2001.
questions.explanation:
Gaucher disease為最常見的溶酶體儲積症，主要侵犯骨髓/脾/肝(巨脾/巨肝)，不造成心室肥厚；Fabry disease(溶酶體儲積症，α-galactosidase缺乏)與Danon disease(肝醣儲積症，LAMP2基因突變)皆可造成心室肥厚(尤其左心室)，故不表現心室肥厚者為Gaucher disease。

見 [[cardiac-storage-disease]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following descriptions about pericardial germ cell tumors is wrong?

options.text: Most are located anteriorly and to the left
They can be diagnosed in utero.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.108；RadioGraphics 2013;33:1613-1630.
questions.explanation:
心包性生殖細胞瘤(pericardial germ cell tumor，多為畸胎瘤teratoma)好發於心包前方偏「右」側，而非偏左側，故「most located anteriorly and to the left」為錯誤敘述；腫瘤源自心包、可產前診斷、常見鈣化(依常見度：多囊性>脂肪>鈣化)皆為正確描述。

見 [[pericardial-germ-cell-tumor]]

questions.questionText: Which description about the pancreatic features of von Hippel–Lindau syndrome is wrong?

options.text: Pancreatic cysts are the most common finding and usually multiple and asymptomatic.
Serous cystadenomas do not communicate with the pancreatic duct.
VHL-associated pancreatic NETs can be multiple.
VHL-associated pancreatic NETs manifest at an older age compared with that of sporadic NETs.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.109；RadioGraphics 2018;38:849-866.
questions.explanation:
VHL相關胰臟神經內分泌腫瘤(NET)好發於「較年輕」年齡(非較年長)，此為與偶發性(sporadic)NET的重要差異，故本敘述錯誤。胰臟囊腫為最常見表現(多發且無症狀)、漿液性囊腺瘤不與胰管相通、VHL相關NET可為多發，皆正確。

見 [[von-hippel-lindau-disease]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following arteries is most likely to be associated with hiccups as the complication during TACE?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.111；RadioGraphics 2017;37:963-977.
questions.explanation:
膈下動脈(inferior phrenic artery)緊鄰橫膈，栓塞化療藥物灌注時易刺激橫膈神經而誘發呃逆(hiccups)，為TACE經膈下動脈供血栓塞時常見之併發症。

見 [[tace]]

questions.questionText: Which of the followings about hepatic carcinoid tumors is wrong?

options.text: Primary hepatic carcinoid tumors are rare.
Liver is the most common site of carcinoid metastasis
Female is more common than male for acquiring primary carcinoid tumors
Primary carcinoid tumors have poorer prognosis than hepatocellular carcinoma.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.112；RadioGraphics 2017;37:516-536.
questions.explanation:
原發性肝臟類癌腫瘤(primary hepatic carcinoid tumor)之預後「較」肝細胞癌(HCC)為佳(非較差)，此為本題錯誤敘述。原發性肝臟類癌極罕見、肝臟為類癌轉移最常見部位、女性好發皆為正確描述。

見 [[hepatic-carcinoid-tumor]]

questions.questionText: Which of the followings is wrong about renal cell carcinoma (RCC) in von Hippel-Lindau disease (VHL)?

options.text: RCC can arise from renal cysts in VHL disease.
There is no correlation between cyst size and malignancy.
Ultrasound is more sensitive than CT to detect smaller RCC (<2cm).
RCC occurs in VHL disease at a younger age than general population.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.113；RadioGraphics 2008;28:65-79.
questions.explanation:
偵測較小腎細胞癌(<2cm)時，CT較超音波更敏感(非超音波較敏感)，此為本題錯誤敘述。VHL疾病中RCC可源自腎囊腫、囊腫大小與惡性度無相關性、VHL之RCC發病年齡較一般族群年輕，皆為正確描述。

見 [[von-hippel-lindau-disease]]

questions.questionText: Which of the followings is wrong about pheochromocytomas in VHL disease compared with those in general population?

options.text: They tend to be multiple lesions.
Ectopic site can be at carotid body.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.114；RadioGraphics 2008;28:65-79.
questions.explanation:
VHL疾病相關嗜鉻細胞瘤惡性比例「極低」(約1-5%，非高比例，與一般常提及之10%法則相比更低)，此為本題錯誤敘述。VHL相關嗜鉻細胞瘤發病年齡較輕、多發性病灶、可出現異位部位(如頸動脈體)皆為正確描述。

見 [[von-hippel-lindau-disease]]

questions.questionText: The retrocaval ureter occurs when the IVC is formed by which of the followings?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.116；RadioGraphics 2008;28:669-689.
questions.explanation:
下腔靜脈正常發育由subcardinal與supracardinal靜脈系統形成，right posterior cardinal vein正常應退化消失；若異常由right posterior cardinal vein殘留參與形成下腔靜脈腎段，輸尿管會被夾在此異常靜脈與正常靜脈之間，形成retrocaval ureter(輸尿管走行於下腔靜脈後方)。

見 [[retrocaval-ureter]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is wrong about retroperitoneal fibrosis?

options.text: At presentation, about 50% of patients with autoimmune pancreatitis have retroperitoneal fibrosis.
It can cause abdominal aortic aneurysm.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.117；RadioGraphics 2015;35:2007-2025.
questions.explanation:
自體免疫胰臟炎(autoimmune pancreatitis)患者於診斷時合併後腹膜纖維化之比例約為「20%」(非50%)，故本敘述錯誤。後腹膜纖維化為慢性發炎過程、可導致腹主動脈瘤(炎性腹主動脈瘤IAAA)、可導致腎積水，皆為正確描述。

見 [[retroperitoneal-fibrosis]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following about osteochondroma is wrong?

options.text: Usually stop growing after bone maturity

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.118；Orthopedic Imaging: A Practical Approach, 6th edition, P1535.
questions.explanation:
骨軟骨瘤最常好發部位為「幹骺端(metaphyseal region)」，典型背向骨骺生長，並非好發於骨骺(epiphysis)，故本敘述錯誤。具軟骨帽、惡性變機率低但可能發生、骨骼成熟後通常停止生長，皆為正確描述。

見 [[osteochondroma]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following bone lesions usually demonstrates different feature of the margin from the others?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.118；Orthopedic Imaging: A Practical Approach, 6th edition, P1375-1377.
questions.explanation:
纖維性發育不良(fibrous dysplasia)典型邊緣為厚硬化緣(rind sign)，與其他三者(棕色瘤、巨細胞瘤、淋巴瘤)常見之邊緣型態不同——原發性骨淋巴瘤最常見型態為溶骨性(lytic)、滲透性骨破壞併寬廣移行帶(wide zone of transition)，棕色瘤與巨細胞瘤亦多呈邊緣不清之溶骨性病灶，唯獨fibrous dysplasia以硬化緣(rind sign)為特徵。

見 [[fibrous-dysplasia]]

questions.questionText: Which of the followings is not the common differential diagnosis for parosteal osteosarcoma?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.119；Orthopedic Imaging: A Practical Approach, 6th edition, P1809.
questions.explanation:
⚠️ 官方詳解本題答案欄未給出明確答案(僅標示「D??」表達不確定)。依常見骨旁骨肉瘤(parosteal osteosarcoma)之影像鑑別診斷清單，通常包含parosteal osteoma、myositis ossificans、sessile osteochondroma等表面型骨性病灶；fibrous dysplasia為髓內病灶，通常不列為此鑑別診斷清單常見項目，故推測D較符合題意，惟官方本身標示存疑，建議醫師對照原文確認。

見 [[parosteal-osteosarcoma]]

questions.questionText: A 45 year old woman present with gradual visual loss and proptosis. The Head CT shows enhancing tumor surrounding the non-enhancing optic nerve results in the so-called tram-track sign. Which one of the following is the most likely diagnosis?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.120；Grainger & Allison's Diagnostic Radiology, Chapter 66, 1556-1589.e1.
questions.explanation:
漸進性視力喪失合併眼球突出，CT見強化腫瘤包繞不強化之視神經、形成「軌道徵(tram-track sign)」，為視神經腦膜瘤(optic nerve meningioma)之典型影像特徵；視神經腫瘤本身(如optic nerve glioma)通常會使視神經本身增粗且強化，非周邊包繞型態。

見 [[optic-nerve-meningioma]]

questions.questionText: Which one of the following intracranial tumor is the most likely to see in Von Hippel–Lindau Disease?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.122；Grainger & Allison's Diagnostic Radiology, Chapter 56, 1316-1344.e2.
questions.explanation:
血管母細胞瘤(hemangioblastoma)為VHL疾病最典型之中樞神經系統腫瘤，好發於小腦、腦幹、脊髓；可為多發性。Medulloblastoma、lymphoma、ependymoma皆非VHL之特徵性顱內腫瘤。

見 [[von-hippel-lindau-disease]]

questions.questionText: Which one of the following is most likely to cause a jugular foramen mass
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.122；Grainger & Allison's Diagnostic Radiology, Chapter 67, 1590-1647.e1.
questions.explanation:
副神經節瘤(glomus jugulare/paraganglioma)為頸靜脈孔(jugular foramen)最常見之腫瘤，具富血管特徵與T2 salt-and-pepper徵象。Meningioma可侵犯頸靜脈孔但非最常見原發部位；medulloblastoma、astrocytoma非典型頸靜脈孔腫瘤。

見 [[glomus-jugulare]]

questions.questionText: A 2 years old child presents with beta thalassaemia, and skeletal survey is performed. Which one of the following radiographic features is favoring thalassaemia?

options.text: Hair-on-end appearance with widening of the diploic space is the skull.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.123；Grainger & Allison's Diagnostic Radiology, Chapter 79, 1891-1930.e2.
questions.explanation:
重型海洋性貧血(thalassaemia major)因骨髓代償性造血增生，顱骨呈「hair-on-end」放射狀骨針樣外觀合併板障間隙增寬，為典型影像特徵。額竇擴大、乾骺端透亮帶、眼眶向外側(非向內)移位皆非典型海洋性貧血特徵。

見 [[thalassemia-skeletal-survey]]

questions.questionText: A neonate presents with vomiting and failure to pass meconium within 24 hour. Which one of the following radiographic features is favoring meconium ileus?

options.text: Contrast enema refluxes into the narrow terminal ileum, where pellets of meconium are outlined.
Contrast enema showing diffusely dilated colon.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.124；Grainger & Allison's Diagnostic Radiology, Chapter 77, 1804-1847.e4.
questions.explanation:
胎便性腸阻塞(meconium ileus)典型灌腸攝影可見顯影劑逆流至狹窄的迴腸末端，並勾勒出胎便糰塊(pellets of meconium)輪廓，同時可見未使用之微結腸(microcolon)；target sign為腸套疊之超音波特徵；瀰漫性結腸擴張非本病典型(反因遠端阻塞而呈microcolon)；coffee bean sign為乙狀結腸扭轉之KUB特徵。

見 [[meconium-ileus]]

questions.questionText: About contrast media extravasation, which statement is wrong?

options.text: The use of deep brachial intravenous catheters seems much more safely
May have swelling, tightness, stinging, or burning pain
There is no agreement among physicians on the best treatment of intravenous contrast agent extravasation

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.126；Safe use of contrast media: What the radiologist needs to know. RadioGraphics 2015;35:1738-1750.
questions.explanation:
深部肱靜脈導管(deep brachial intravenous catheters)因位置較深、外滲時較不易早期察覺，相對於「較安全」，其外滲風險反而「顯著較高(markedly higher relative risk)」，故本敘述錯誤。外滲可能出現腫脹/緊繃/刺痛/灼熱感、醫師對最佳處置尚無共識、僅少數病人需外科介入，皆為正確描述。

見 [[contrast-media-safety]]

questions.questionText: The higher incidences of primary malignant cardiac tumor is
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.127；MR imaging of cardiac tumors and masses: A review of methods and clinical applications. Radiology. 2013;268(1).
questions.explanation:
心臟原發惡性腫瘤中，血管肉瘤(angiosarcoma)發生率最高，好發右心房。Myxoma為最常見之原發「良性」心臟腫瘤(非惡性)；lymphoma、rhabdomyosarcoma雖亦可發生但發生率低於angiosarcoma。

見 [[cardiac-tumors]]

questions.questionText: About coronary artery aneurysm, which statement is true?

options.text: True aneurysm: vessel wall composed of three layers (adventitia, media, and intima)
Giant aneurysm: > 20mm-150mm in diameter of adults

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.127；Coronary artery aneurysms and ectasia: Role of coronary CT Angiography. RadioGraphics 2009;29:1939-1954.
questions.explanation:
真性動脈瘤血管壁由外膜/中膜/內膜三層構成、囊狀動脈瘤橫徑大於縱徑、成人巨大型冠狀動脈瘤定義為直徑>20mm(2公分)，皆為正確描述。

見 [[coronary-artery-aneurysm]]

questions.questionText: About Kawasaki disease, which statement is wrong?

options.text: Is an chronic self-limited multisystemic panarteritis
Cardiac sequelae include coronary artery dilatation, premature atherosclerosis and stenosis, thrombosis, or occlusion with myocardial infarction
Most affect left main coronary artery

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.127；Coronary artery aneurysms and ectasia: Role of coronary CT Angiography. RadioGraphics 2009;29:1939-1954.
questions.explanation:
川崎病為「急性(acute)」而非「慢性(chronic)」自限性多系統性全血管炎，此為本題錯誤敘述。1967年於日本首次描述、心臟後遺症包含冠狀動脈擴張/早發性動脈粥樣硬化與狹窄/血栓/併發心肌梗塞、最常侵犯左主冠狀動脈，皆為正確描述。

見 [[kawasaki-disease-imaging]]

questions.questionText: In neurofibromatosis type I, findings include the followings except?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.128；STATdx. Copyright © 2018 Elsevier.
questions.explanation:
雙側聽神經鞘瘤(bilateral acoustic schwannoma)為第二型神經纖維瘤病(NF2)之特徵性表現，並非NF1之典型發現。視神經膠質瘤、蝶骨發育不良(sphenoid dysplasia)、神經根神經纖維瘤皆為NF1之典型影像特徵。

見 [[neurofibromatosis-type-1]]

questions.questionText: Perilymphatic nodules in lung include the differential diagnoses except?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.128；STATdx. Copyright © 2018 Elsevier.
questions.explanation:
粟粒性肺結核(miliary TB)之肺結節分布型態為「隨機分布(random distribution)」(血行性散布)，並非淋巴周圍分布(perilymphatic distribution)；矽肺症(pneumoconiosis)、類肉瘤病(sarcoidosis)、淋巴管性癌病(lymphangitic carcinomatosis)皆為典型淋巴周圍分布結節之常見鑑別診斷。

見 [[perilymphatic-nodules-lung]]

questions.questionText: Regarding scimitar syndrome, which of the following is false?

options.text: A subtype of partial anomalous pulmonary venous return
Scimitar vein joins inferior vena cava
Scimitar vein in left medial costophrenic sulcus

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.128；STATdx. Copyright © 2018 Elsevier.
questions.explanation:
彎刀症候群(scimitar syndrome)之彎刀靜脈位於「右側」內側肋膈角(right medial costophrenic sulcus)，非左側，故本敘述錯誤。本病為部分肺靜脈異位回流之亞型、彎刀靜脈注入下腔靜脈、常合併右心房突出，皆為正確描述。

見 [[scimitar-syndrome]]

questions.questionText: Classical findings of intracranial hypotension include the following except?

options.text: Downward displacement of brain through incisura ("slumping" midbrain)

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.129；STATdx. Copyright © 2018 Elsevier.
questions.explanation:
顱內低壓典型影像所見助記為「SEEPS」：Subdural fluid collections、Enhancement of the pachymeninges、Engorgement of the venous sinuses（靜脈竇「充血擴大」，非「萎縮」）、Pituitary hyperemia、Sagging brain。靜脈/硬膜竇為擴大充血而非皺縮，故本敘述錯誤；腦幹經天幕裂孔下垂("slumping")、瀰漫性硬膜增厚強化、硬膜下積液/血腫皆為典型表現。

見 [[spontaneous-intracranial-hypotension]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following fetal risks is associated with MRI imaging?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.129；Association Between MRI Exposure During Pregnancy and Fetal and Childhood Outcomes. JAMA. 2016 Sep 6;316(9):952-61.
questions.explanation:
大型世代研究顯示孕期暴露於MRI（尤其釓顯影劑）與胎兒聽力損失風險相關；心臟缺陷、白血病、發展遲緩則未顯示與MRI暴露有顯著相關性。

見 [[mri-safety-pregnancy]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following polyposis syndromes presents with epidermoid cysts, desmoid tumors, and osteomas?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.130；McGraw-Hill Specialty Board Review: RADIOLOGY, Written Exam GI Q1.
questions.explanation:
Gardner syndrome(屬FAP腺瘤性息肉症候群之亞型)臨床三合徵為表皮樣囊腫(epidermoid cysts)、類纖維瘤(desmoid tumors)、骨瘤(osteomas)，合併大腸腺瘤性息肉。Turcot syndrome合併CNS glioblastoma；Cowden disease為錯構瘤性疾病可侵犯食道；HNPCC與familial polyposis無此三合徵。

見 [[polyposis-syndromes-gi]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following statements about sonography artifact is wrong.

options.text: Tissue harmonic imaging is helpful with large body habitus or "noisy" tissues such as an echogenic liver.
Reverberation is useful in creating the "comet tail" artifact characteristic of adenomyomatosis of the gallbladder wall.
Color Doppler can be used to accentuate the reverberation effects of adenomyomatosis.
Acoustic shadowing is the result of nonuniformity of the ultrasound beam at the periphery of the transducer.
Mirror image artifact is the result of the ultrasound beam "bouncing" off two strong specular reflectors before returning to the transducer.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.132；Problem solving in Abdominal imaging, 1st Edition. Chapter 1, Page 6-8.
questions.explanation:
探頭周邊聲束不均勻造成的偽影為「側葉偽影(side lobe artifact)」，並非聲影(acoustic shadowing)——聲影是高衰減/強反射結構後方訊號顯著減弱之現象，本敘述將兩者混淆，故錯誤。組織諧波成像有助於大體型/回音雜訊多的組織(如脂肪肝)、殘響造成腺肌症comet-tail偽影、彩色都卜勒可加強腺肌症殘響效應、鏡像偽影源自聲束於兩強反射面間反彈，皆為正確描述。

見 [[ultrasound-artifacts]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following statements about sonography artifact is wrong.

options.text: Acoustic enhancement refers to a zone of increased signal seen deep to a structure with low acoustic impedance.
Doppler can e used to increase conspicuity of tissue reflectivity in the form of the color comet tail artifact, also called twinkle artifact.
Tissue harmonic imaging is helpful for thin patient.
Acoustic shadowing is commonly seen with urinary or biliary calculi.
Side lobe artifact is often seen as an apparent septations extending from the side of the gallbladder, the urinary bladder or a simple cyst.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.133；Problem solving in Abdominal imaging, 1st Edition. Chapter 1, Page 6-9.
questions.explanation:
組織諧波成像(tissue harmonic imaging)有助於「肥胖(fat)」體型或回音雜訊多之病人，而非瘦(thin)病人，故本敘述錯誤。聲增強、彩色都卜勒之twinkle(comet tail)偽影、聲影常見於泌尿/膽道結石、側葉偽影於膽囊/膀胱/單純囊腫呈現假性分隔，皆為正確描述。

見 [[ultrasound-artifacts]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following statements about the ultrasound of the liver is incorrect.

options.text: No specific sonographic findings are found in acute hepatitis.
Starry sky pattern means increased periportal echoes coupled with decreased parenchymal echogenicity is sensitive and specific for the detection of acute viral hepatitis.
Marked gallbladder wall thickening is sometimes present in patients with acute hepatitis.
Severe fatty infiltration of the liver often results in hepatomegaly and diffusely increased echogenicity.
Flow reversal in portal vein and collateral venous flow is specific finding for liver cirrhosis.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.134；Problem solving in Abdominal imaging, 1st Edition. Chapter 1, Page 9-12.
questions.explanation:
Starry sky pattern(暗肝配亮門脈)對急性病毒性肝炎之偵測敏感度高但特異度「差」，並非「敏感且特異」，故本敘述錯誤。急性肝炎本身無特異性超音波所見、可合併膽囊壁明顯增厚、嚴重脂肪浸潤常致肝腫大合併瀰漫性回音增加、肝硬化可見門脈血流逆轉合併側枝循環，皆為正確描述。

見 [[acute-hepatitis-us]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following statements about ultrasound of the gallbladder is incorrect.

options.text: Thickening of the gallbladder wall alone should be the specific diagnosis of acute cholecystitis
Congestive heart failure can cause gallbladder wall thickening.
Flow can be absent on color doppler sonography of gallbladder cancer.
Choledocholithiasis is the most common cause of bile duct dilatation in patients with gallstones..
The ultrasound finding of adenomyomatosis is comet tail artifact caused by reverberation from crystals trapped within hypertrophied Rokitansky-Aschoff sinuses.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.135；Problem solving in Abdominal imaging, 1st Edition. Chapter 1, Page 17-21.
questions.explanation:
單獨膽囊壁增厚並「非」急性膽囊炎之特異性診斷依據——瀰漫性膽囊壁增厚可見於肝炎、肝硬化/門脈高壓、腹水、低白蛋白血症、鬱血性心衰竭等多種非膽囊本身病因，故本敘述錯誤。鬱血性心衰竭可致膽囊壁增厚、膽囊癌之彩色都卜勒可無血流訊號、總膽管結石為膽結石病人膽管擴張最常見原因、腺肌症之comet tail偽影源自Rokitansky-Aschoff竇內結晶之殘響，皆為正確描述。

見 [[chronic-cholecystitis]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following statements about ultrasound of the kidney is incorrect.

options.text: Autosomal dominant polycystic kidney disease has a characteristic sonographic appearance of enlarged kidneys with multiple cysts of variable sizes.
Simple cysts have characteristic features of well-defined, anechoic round structures that produce posterior acoustic enhancement..
Typical sonographic appearance of an angiomyolipoma is a well-defined echogenic mass within the renal cortex.
If an echogenic mass has a hypoechoic halo, AML is more likely than RCC.
RCC can be solid or cystic in ultrasound

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.136；Problem solving in Abdominal imaging, 1st Edition. Chapter 1, Page 25-29.
questions.explanation:
超音波上迴音性腫塊若合併「低迴音暈輪(hypoechoic halo)」，「腎細胞癌(RCC)較AML更可能」（非AML較可能），此敘述錯誤——低迴音暈輪常反映假包膜(pseudocapsule)或周圍壓迫之腎實質，為RCC較常見之特徵。體染色體顯性多囊腎典型表現、單純囊腫特徵、AML典型呈腎皮質內邊界清楚迴音性腫塊、RCC可為實質性或囊性，皆為正確描述。

見 [[renal-angiomyolipoma]]

questions.questionText: Which one of the following is wrong?

options.text: Cocaine is the hallmark drug well known for producing both ischemic stroke and intracranial hemorrhage.
The practice of cocaine inhalation is called "chasing the dragon."
Heroin is the hallmark drug associated with leukoencephalopathy.
The key to differentiating heroin-induced leukoencephalopathy from other mimics is involvement of the cerebellum in a clinically nonhypertensive patient.
Alcohol can cause loss of both grey and white matter of brain.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.137；RadioGraphics 2012;32:701-719.
questions.explanation:
「Chasing the dragon」一詞指的是「海洛因(heroin)」吸入之施用方式，並非古柯鹼(cocaine)，故本敘述錯誤。古柯鹼可致缺血性中風與腦內出血、海洛因為leukoencephalopathy之代表藥物、海洛因白質病變鑑別關鍵為非高血壓病人合併小腦侵犯、酒精可致灰質與白質皆流失，皆為正確描述。

見 [[toxic-metabolic-leukoencephalopathy]]

questions.questionText: Which one of the following is wrong?

options.text: Calcineurin inhibitors can cause posterior reversible encephalopathy syndrome (PRES)
Cocaine and amphetamines can cause PRES as well
The side effects of phenytoin include skull bone thinning and cerebellar atrophy
Subacute combined degeneration of spinal cord can be caused by nitrous oxide during dental procedures
The complications of long-term total parenteral nutrition mainly are due to deposition of manganese

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.137；RadioGraphics 2012;32:701-719.
questions.explanation:
苯妥英(phenytoin)之副作用包含顱骨「增厚(hyperostosis)」而非「變薄(thinning)」，合併小腦萎縮，故本敘述錯誤。鈣調神經磷酸酶抑制劑可致PRES、古柯鹼與安非他命亦可致PRES、牙科手術使用笑氣可致脊髓亞急性合併退化、長期全靜脈營養併發症主因為錳沉積，皆為正確描述。

見 [[toxic-metabolic-leukoencephalopathy]]

questions.questionText:
Which of the following statement about the kidney is false?
A. The columns of Bertin extend medially within the substance of the kidney separating the medulla into pyramids.
B. The renal arteries arise from the aorta at the superior margin of L2.
C. Compound calyces are less efficient at preventing intrarenal reflux of urine.
D. The right kidney is usually larger by about 1.5cm than the left kidney.
E. The right renal artery is posterior to the inferior vena cava.

options.text: The columns of Bertin extend medially within the substance of the kidney separating the medulla into pyramids.
The renal arteries arise from the aorta at the superior margin of L2.
Compound calyces are less efficient at preventing intrarenal reflux of urine.
The right kidney is usually larger by about 1.5cm than the left kidney.
The right renal artery is posterior to the inferior vena cava.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.138；Applied Radiological Anatomy: The renal tract and retroperitoneum chapter.
questions.explanation:
正常腎臟頭尾徑約9-13公分，「左」腎本質上較右腎大約0.5公分（非右腎較左腎大1.5公分），男性腎臟略大於女性，故本敘述錯誤。Columns of Bertin向內延伸分隔髓質成錐體、腎動脈於L2上緣起源於主動脈、複合腎盞較不易防止腎內尿液逆流、右腎動脈位於下腔靜脈後方，皆為正確描述。

見 [[renal-anatomy-imaging]]

questions.questionText:
Which of the following statement about the renal tract is wrong?
A. Perirenal fat allows the renal outline to be seen on plain radiographs.
B. A high kV radiograph optimizes the detection of calcification.
C. The ureters are projected over the tips of the transverse processes of L2 to L5.
D. On computed tomography, the renal upper pole is posterior to the lower pole.
E. Prone views aid mid ureteric filling during IVP examination.

options.text: Perirenal fat allows the renal outline to be seen on plain radiographs.
A high kV radiograph optimizes the detection of calcification.
The ureters are projected over the tips of the transverse processes of L2 to L5.
On computed tomography, the renal upper pole is posterior to the lower pole.
Prone views aid mid ureteric filling during IVP examination.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.139；Applied Radiological Anatomy: The renal tract and retroperitoneum chapter.
questions.explanation:
偵測鈣化應使用「低kV」攝影（非高kV），高kV會降低腎實質對比，故本敘述錯誤。腎周脂肪使腎輪廓可於平片顯示、輸尿管投影於L2-L5橫突尖端、CT上腎上極較下極偏後、俯臥姿勢有助IVP檢查中段輸尿管充盈，皆為正確描述。

見 [[renal-anatomy-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Regarding the epithelial ovarian tumors, which of the following statement is false?

options.text: Mucinous cystadenomas tend to be larger than serous cystadenomas at presentation.
Epithelial tumors with low malignant potential demonstrate more proliferation of papillary projections than benign cystadenomas and often seen in younger patients.
The majority of clear cell carcinomas are stage I disease whose prognosis appears to be better than other ovarian cancers.
Psammoma bodies (calcifications) are seen at histologic analysis in up to 30% of malignant serous tumors.
Bilaterality and peritoneal carcinomatosis are seen more commonly in mucinous cystadenomas than serous type.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.140；CT and MRI Imaging of Ovarian Tumors with Emphasis on Differential Diagnosis. RadioGraphics 2002;22(6):1305-1325.
questions.explanation:
雙側性(bilaterality)與腹膜癌病變(peritoneal carcinomatosis)於漿液性(serous)囊腺瘤較黏液性(mucinous)囊腺瘤「更」常見（非黏液性較常見），故本敘述錯誤。黏液性囊腺瘤診斷時通常較大、低度惡性潛能腫瘤乳突增生較良性囊腺瘤多且好發較年輕病人、多數透明細胞癌為stage I且預後較佳、砂粒體見於高達30%惡性漿液性腫瘤，皆為正確描述。

見 [[ovarian-tumors-imaging]]

questions.questionText: About pituitary gland, which is incorrect?

options.text: Physiologic pituitary enlargement may be caused by puberty or pregnancy/postpartum state.
Pituitary gland consists of ventral adenohypophysis and dorsal neurohypophysis.
In T2-weighted image, hyperintense signal is usually observed at neurohypophysis.
In T1-weighted image, the signal of the normal anterior pituitary lobe appears isointense to pons on sagittal images.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.141；STATdx or Radiology Review Manual.
questions.explanation:
神經下垂體(neurohypophysis)之高訊號「亮點(posterior pituitary bright spot)」典型出現於「T1加權」影像（非T2），反映後葉神經分泌顆粒(vasopressin相關)，故本敘述錯誤。生理性腦垂體增大可見於青春期或懷孕/產後、腦垂體由腹側腺垂體與背側神經垂體組成、T1上正常前葉訊號與橋腦等訊號，皆為正確描述。

見 [[sellar-parasellar-lesions]]

questions.questionText: A 10-year-old girl presents with right hip pain. The following X-ray shows sclerosis of femoral head epiphysis. MRI study shows double line sign at femoral head, what's the most likely diagnosis?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.143；Radiology Review Manual, 6th edition, 51.
questions.explanation:
股骨頭骨骺硬化合併MRI「double line sign」（代表缺血性壞死之肉芽組織/硬化交界）為Perthes disease（股骨頭缺血性壞死）之典型MRI表現。SUFE為骨骺滑脫、Panner disease侵犯肱骨小頭、bone infarct好發長骨幹骺端而非骨骺、OCD好發關節面局部軟骨下骨。

見 [[sufe-vs-perthes-disease]]

questions.questionText: A 6-day newborn presents with abdominal distention, bilous emesis and blood streaked stools. CT scan shows small bowel and colon distention, bowel wall thickening and "thumbprinting", pneumatosis intestinalis also noted, what's the most likely diagnosis?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.143；Radiology Review Manual, 6th edition, 861.
questions.explanation:
新生兒腹脹合併膽汁性嘔吐、血絲便，CT見小腸與結腸擴張、腸壁增厚合併「thumbprinting」及腸壁積氣(pneumatosis intestinalis)，為壞死性腸炎(necrotizing enterocolitis, NEC)之典型表現。Hirschsprung disease好發便秘非血便；FAP、Peutz-Jeghers為息肉症候群非新生兒急症；腸套疊雖可有血便但通常無廣泛腸壁積氣。

見 [[necrotizing-enterocolitis]]

questions.questionText: Which statement below is incorrect about ADH?

options.text: This is likely that ADH and DCIS are two close histopathologic entities.
