Any biopsy technique, limited or partial sampling probably the major factor in underestimated of ADH diagnosed on US guided core needle biopsy.
A re-biopsy using a vacuum-assisted biopsy device under US guidance might result in decreasing the upgrade rate of ADH on final surgery.
ADH is effective at predicting upgrade malignancy by MG and US features.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.145；American Journal of Roentgenology. June 2014, Volume 202:1389-1394.
questions.explanation:
目前尚「無法有效」單憑乳房攝影(MG)與超音波(US)影像特徵預測ADH最終病理是否會upgrade為惡性，故本敘述錯誤（應為ineffective而非effective）。ADH與DCIS為組織病理學上相近之兩個實體、任何切片技術之取樣不完整為US導引粗針切片低估ADH之主因、以真空輔助切片(VAB)重新切片可能降低最終手術upgrade率，皆為正確描述。

見 [[breast-premalignant-lesions]]

questions.questionText: Which statement below is incorrect about lobular cancer in situ (LCIS) and Atypical lobular hyperplasia (ALH)?

options.text: LCIS is generally diagnosed in pathologically when there is involvement of more than 50% of lobular acini, less than 50% called ALH.
A pleomorphic variant (PLCIS) strong resembles DCIS in histologically.
LCIS is symptomatic; frequently multifocal, multicentric and can be bilateral in up to 1/3 cases.
Lobular neoplasia can be found associated with DCIS, IDC and ILC.

questions.explanation:
LCIS通常「無症狀(asymptomatic)」，多為偶然發現（非有症狀），此為本題錯誤敘述。LCIS病理診斷以侵犯>50%小葉腺泡為準(<50%稱ALH)、多形性變異型(PLCIS)組織學上近似DCIS、常多發灶/多中心且可達1/3雙側、小葉贅生可與DCIS/IDC/ILC並存，皆為正確描述。

見 [[breast-premalignant-lesions]]

questions.questionText: Which statement below is incorrect about Radial Scar (RS) and Complex Sclerosing Lesions (CSL)?

options.text: Radiating scar without atypia usually needs to wide excision.
Benign proliferative lesions characterized a fibro-elastic core containing entrapped ducts with an intact myoepithelial layer and ductules radiating outwards.
A radial scar which larger than 1cm termed as a complex sclerosing lesion.
It may co-exist with benign pathologies, such as cysts, sclerosing adenosis; or atypical hyperplasia, DCIS and early stage invasive carcinoma.

questions.explanation:
不具異型性(atypia)之放射狀疤痕(radial scar)通常僅需「保守密切追蹤(conservative close follow-up)」，並非需要廣泛切除(wide excision)，故本敘述錯誤。良性增生病灶特徵為纖維彈性核心包夾陷入之導管、伴完整肌上皮層與放射狀排列之小管、大於1公分稱複合硬化性病灶(CSL)、可與囊腫/硬化性腺病或異型增生/DCIS/早期侵襲癌並存，皆為正確描述。

見 [[breast-premalignant-lesions]]

questions.questionText: Which statement below is incorrect about papillomas?

options.text: Solitary papilloma – from a large central duct, common in perimenopausal age, presenting with bloody or clear nipple discharge.
Atypia is more common in central papilloma.
Multiple papilloma – from terminal duct lobular units, peripheral lesions, in younger women, presenting mass.
Papilloma with atypia can be upgraded to malignancy in 67%.

questions.explanation:
異型性(atypia)於「周邊型(peripheral)」乳突瘤較中央型(central)乳突瘤更常見（非中央型較常見），故本敘述錯誤。單發性乳突瘤源自大中央導管、好發停經前後年齡、以血性或清澈乳頭分泌物表現；多發性乳突瘤源自終末導管小葉單位、為周邊病灶、好發較年輕女性、以腫塊表現；合併異型性之乳突瘤最終upgrade為惡性之比例可達67%，皆為正確描述。

見 [[breast-premalignant-lesions]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following statements does NOT apply to myocardial T1?

options.text: Native myocardial T1 is influenced by both intracellular and extracellular processes.
Postcontrast T1 values are higher than native T1 values of the myocardium.
For extracellular volume (ECV) measurements, postcontrast T1 mapping should be performed at steady state, which can be assumed 10-15 minutes after application of the contrast agent.
The isolated use of postcontrast T1 as a biomarker is not recommended due to its sensitivity to confounders including contrast material dose and time point of postcontrast image acquisition.

questions.explanation:
顯影劑注射後(postcontrast)之T1值「較原生(native)T1值為低」（非較高）——顯影劑造成T1縮短(T1 shortening)效應，故本敘述錯誤。原生T1受細胞內外因素影響、ECV量測應於顯影劑注射後10-15分鐘穩態時進行、單獨使用postcontrast T1易受顯影劑劑量與擷取時間點等干擾因子影響故不建議單獨作為生物標記，皆為正確描述。

見 [[myocardial-t1-mapping]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following statements does NOT apply?

options.text: Myocardial edema affects both myocardial T1 and T2.
The presence of additional water leads to an increase in T2 and a decrease in T1.
Myocardial edema accompanies both acute ischemic and acute inflammatory myocardial injury.
Increases in myocardial T1 are not specific to myocardial edema.

questions.explanation:
心肌水腫(edema)造成組織內額外水分增加，會使T2「與T1皆上升」（非T2上升同時T1下降），故本敘述錯誤。心肌水腫同時影響T1與T2、急性缺血性與急性發炎性心肌損傷皆可合併水腫、心肌T1上升並非水腫特異性表現(纖維化/類澱粉沉積等間質擴張亦可致T1上升)，皆為正確描述。

見 [[myocardial-t1-mapping]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following statements applies to ECV and late gadolinium enhancement (LGE)?

options.text: LGE is more sensitive to the presence of myocardial fibrosis than ECV.
Areas without hyperenhancement on LGE images always show normal ECV.
The calculation of ECV requires the acquisition of LGE images.
Areas with high ECV might not show hyperenhancement on LGE

questions.explanation:
瀰漫性纖維化或微觀性間質纖維化可能無法被LGE偵測，但可於ECV影像上顯示——故高ECV區域未必於LGE呈現過度強化，此為正確敘述。LGE對心肌纖維化之敏感度非優於ECV(A錯)、無LGE過度強化區域未必ECV正常(B錯)、ECV計算不需LGE影像(僅需pre/post-contrast T1 mapping計算R1值，C錯)。

見 [[myocardial-t1-mapping]]

questions.questionText: Where is the most common origin site of papillary fibroelastoma?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.154；Thoracic Imaging 2nd edition, Webb, p.825.
questions.explanation:
乳突狀纖維彈性瘤(papillary fibroelastoma)最常見起源部位為主動脈瓣(約29%)，其次為二尖瓣(25%)、三尖瓣(17%)、肺動脈瓣(13%)。

見 [[papillary-fibroelastoma]]

questions.questionText: Which is not an imaging feature of malignant cardiac tumors?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.155；Thoracic Imaging 2nd edition, Webb, p.832.
questions.explanation:
惡性心臟腫瘤之影像特徵包含：侵犯超過一個心腔或心腔加附著血管、侵犯至肺靜脈/腔靜脈/肺動脈/主動脈、心腔壁上寬廣附著點、合併壁內與心腔內成分、腫瘤內壞死、侵犯至心腔外、出血性心包積液、肺轉移，共8項；「附壁血栓增厚」並非惡性心臟腫瘤之影像特徵清單項目。

見 [[cardiac-tumors]]

questions.questionText: In patients with cancer treated with VEGF inhibitors (Bevacizumab, sorafenib, sunitinib), which major complications are included?

options.text: Bleeding or hemorrhage due to the decreased renewal capacity of endothelial cells.
Thrombosis due to tissue factor activation secondary to exposure to subendothelial collagen.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.157；Thoracic Complications of Precision Cancer Therapies: A Practical Guide for Radiologists in the New Era of Cancer Care. RadioGraphics 2017;37:1372.
questions.explanation:
VEGF抑制劑(Bevacizumab、sorafenib、sunitinib)可同時造成出血(因血管內皮細胞更新能力下降)與血栓(因暴露內皮下膠原致組織因子活化)兩種看似矛盾的併發症，兩者皆為主要併發症。VEGF抑制劑治療其他常見胸腔併發症尚包括肺栓塞與氣胸。

見 [[vegf-inhibitor-thoracic-complications]]

questions.questionText: Which is the typical CT feature of lymphoid interstitial pneumonitis?

options.text: diffuse lung consolidation with ground-glass opacities
ground-glass opacities, often in combination with cystic lesions

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.160；What Every Radiologist Should Know about Idiopathic Interstitial Pneumonias. RadioGraphics 2007;27:595.
questions.explanation:
淋巴球性間質性肺炎(LIP)典型CT表現為毛玻璃樣混濁(ground-glass opacities)，常合併囊性病灶(cystic lesions)——雙側毛玻璃、邊界不清之小葉中心性結節、小葉間隔輕度增厚、支氣管血管束增厚(約85%)、周邊小結節(約85%)、薄壁囊腫(約70%)為其特徵組合。

見 [[lymphoid-interstitial-pneumonia]]

questions.questionText: 根據revised ATS/ERS/JRS/ALAT diagnostic criteria for idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis，有關inconsistent with UIP pattern下列何者錯誤?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.164；Respir Res. 2013;14(Suppl 1):S2.
questions.explanation:
Subpleural、basal predominance為UIP典型分布特徵之一，並非「與UIP不符(inconsistent with UIP)」之表現，故本敘述錯誤。廣泛毛玻璃異常(範圍多於網狀異常)、肺葉/肺段內實質化(consolidation)、支氣管血管周圍為主分布，皆為與UIP不符、指向替代診斷(alternative diagnosis)之特徵。

見 [[ipf]]

questions.questionText: 根據2017 Fleischner society guidelines for management of incidental pulmonary nodules，有關solid nodules下列何者錯誤?

options.text: Solitary nodule size<6 mm，low risk patients須於12months後追蹤電腦斷層。
Solitary nodule size>8 mm，low or high risk patients均須3 months後追蹤電腦斷層, and/or CT-PET, and/or biopsy。
Solitary nodule size 6-8 mm, high risk patients須於6-12 months後追蹤第一次電腦斷層，若無變化於18-24 months後追蹤電腦斷層。
Multiple nodules size 6-8 mm, high risk patients須於3-6 months後追蹤第一次電腦斷層，若無變化於18-24 months後追蹤電腦斷層。

questions.explanation:
依2017 Fleischner Society指引，單發<6mm低風險結節「不需常規追蹤」（非須12個月後追蹤），故本敘述錯誤。單發>8mm須3個月追蹤/PET-CT/切片、單發6-8mm高風險先6-12個月後18-24個月追蹤、多發6-8mm高風險先3-6個月後18-24個月追蹤，皆為正確描述。

見 [[fleischner-pulmonary-nodule]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following HIV related chest manifestation would NOT cause hilar lymphadenopathy?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.166；Primer, 6th ed.
questions.explanation:
肺諾卡氏菌病(Nocardia infection)不造成肺門或縱膈淋巴結腫大，典型表現為肺葉性實質化、可能空洞化(約30%)、孤立肺結節/腫塊。分枝桿菌感染、卡波西氏肉瘤、淋巴瘤皆為HIV相關且可造成肺門淋巴結腫大之病變。

見 [[hiv-chest-manifestations]]

questions.questionText: 請問以下何者"非"為自體顯性多囊腎（autosomal dominant polycystic kidney disease）的超音波影像診斷標準？
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.175；J Am Soc Nephrol. 2009 Jan;20(1):205-12.
questions.explanation:
依Pei/Ravine統一診斷標準(有陽性家族史前提)，15-39歲應為「總共≥3顆」腎囊腫，而非≥1顆，故本敘述錯誤。15-39歲≥3顆、40-59歲每側≥2顆、≥60歲每側≥4顆皆為正確描述。

見 [[adpkd-diagnostic-criteria]]

questions.questionText: 請問以下何者"非"多發性結節症（tuberous sclerosis）常見及常須鑑別診斷的超音波影像發現？
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.176；Pediatr Neurol. 2013 Oct;49(4):243-54.
questions.explanation:
泌尿上皮癌並非結節性硬化症常見或常需鑑別診斷之超音波影像發現。腎囊腫、AML、RCC皆為TSC病人腎臟常見或常需鑑別之超音波發現。

見 [[tuberous-sclerosis-renal]]

questions.questionText: 請問以下何者"非"超音波彈性影像常見的功能？

options.text: 偵測血管內是否有血栓

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.177；Ultrasound Elastography: Review of Techniques and Clinical Applications. Theranostics. 2017;7(5):1303-1329.
questions.explanation:
偵測血管內血栓並非超音波彈性影像常見功能，血栓偵測主要依賴傳統灰階/都卜勒超音波。彈性影像常見功能包括分辨良惡性病灶(硬度差異)、評估肝臟硬化程度(纖維化分期)、評估脂肪肝程度。

見 [[liver-elastography]]

questions.questionText: When performing biliary sonography, what is the anatomical relationship of the following structures at hepatic hilum, from anterior to posterior? 1. Hepatic artery, 2. Main portal vein, 3. Common bile duct.
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.178；Ahuja, A. Diagnostic Imaging: Ultrasound. Salt Lake City, Utah: Amirsys; 2007. p 2-4.
questions.explanation:
肝門處由前至後解剖排列順序為：總膽管(3)在最前方、肝動脈(1)居中、主門脈(2)在最後方，故排列順序為312。

見 [[hepatic-hilum-anatomy]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT a typical ultrasound finding of intussusception?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.179；Ahuja, A. Diagnostic Imaging: Ultrasound. Salt Lake City, Utah: Amirsys; 2007. p 8-26~8-29.
questions.explanation:
「Coil spring appearance（彈簧狀外觀）」為鋇劑灌腸(barium enema)之典型影像描述，非超音波典型表現。超音波典型表現為靶徵(target sign)、假腎徵(pseudokidney sign)、套入腸段壁血流(mural vascularity in intussusceptum，反映腸段是否仍存活)。

見 [[pediatric-intussusception-types]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT a typical ultrasound finding of chronic cholecystitis?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.180；Ahuja, A. Diagnostic Imaging: Ultrasound. Salt Lake City, Utah: Amirsys; 2007. p 2-28~2-29.
questions.explanation:
膽囊壁充血性變化(hyperemic changes)較典型見於急性膽囊炎(反映急性發炎充血)，非慢性膽囊炎之典型超音波表現。慢性膽囊炎典型表現為膽囊壁增厚(纖維化，多平滑均勻)、膽囊縮小(contracted)、膽結石(幾乎必有)。

見 [[chronic-cholecystitis]]

questions.questionText: Which is not an acoustic variable?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.181。
questions.explanation:
聲學變數(acoustic variables)共有四項：壓力(pressure)、密度(density)、粒子振動/距離(particle vibration/distance)、溫度(temperature)。強度(intensity)不屬於此四項聲學變數之一(intensity為能量相關參數，非直接的聲學變數)。

見 [[ultrasound-physics-basics]]

questions.questionText: If the frequency of an US wave is doubled, what happens to the period?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.181。
questions.explanation:
週期(period)與頻率(frequency)互為倒數關係(T=1/f)，故頻率加倍時週期減半。

見 [[ultrasound-physics-basics]]

questions.questionText: If the transducer diameter increases, the lateral resolution at its smallest dimension is:
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.182。
questions.explanation:
探頭直徑(孔徑)增加時，聚焦區(focal zone)波束最窄處之側向解析度(lateral resolution)會提升(改善)，故答案為increased。

見 [[ultrasound-physics-basics]]

questions.questionText: 在OECD國家2012年「健康與安全」這項調查中，台灣1-4歲兒童死亡率由低到高的排名大約如何？
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.182；http://www.who.int/healthinfo/statistics/mortality_rawdata/en/
questions.explanation:
依OECD國家2012年「健康與安全」調查，台灣1-4歲兒童死亡率（每十萬人口，2006-2010五年平均約30.6，24國平均值21.9、標準差4.3、最低為芬蘭15.30），排名由低到高（死亡率越低排名越前）屬「倒數前三名」，即死亡率偏高、排名接近最差之列。

見 [[taiwan-child-mortality-oecd]]

questions.questionText: Which one of the followings related to abusive children is correct?

options.text: Physically abused children, particularly infants, may present with nonspecific symptoms and signs, such as vomiting or apnea.
Physical findings, such as bruising of the face, neck, or torso, or intraoral lesions, such as torn frenula, in infants should not arouse suspicion of non-accidental trauma.
The evaluation of infants and young children for suspected inflicted trauma should include imaging of the brain and regional radiographs of symptomatic extremities.
the shaken-baby syndrome are attributable to shaking alone

questions.explanation:
受虐兒童(尤其嬰兒)可能以嘔吐、呼吸暫停等「非特異性」症狀表現，此為正確敘述。臉部/頸部/軀幹瘀傷或口腔內損傷(如舌繫帶撕裂)於嬰兒應「高度」懷疑非意外傷害(B錯，非「不應懷疑」)；評估應包含腦部影像與「全身」骨骼調查(skeletal survey)而非僅症狀肢體之局部攝影(C錯)；嬰兒搖晃症候群並非僅歸因於搖晃本身，常合併撞擊等其他機轉(D錯)。

見 [[child-abuse-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Which one of the followings related to abusive children with head injury is correct?

options.text: MRI is recommended if acute neurologic symptoms or signs, even nonspecific, are present.
Subdural hemorrhages frequently account for severe neurologic sequelae of head trauma
A short fall may still frequently cause child’s severe intracranial injury.
Retinal hemorrhages are reported in approximately 85% of children with abusive head trauma.

questions.explanation:
視網膜出血於受虐性頭部創傷兒童中約85%可見，為正確敘述。急性神經學症狀/徵象出現時應優先安排CT（非MRI，A錯）；硬腦膜下出血雖可見但「通常不」是造成嚴重神經學後遺症的主因(B錯)；低處跌落極少造成兒童嚴重顱內損傷，非常見機轉(C錯)。

見 [[child-abuse-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Which one of the followings related to use of contrast medium in breastfeeding women is correct?

options.text: ought to discontinue breastfeeding after using all contrast media.
clear encouragement to continue breastfeeding after imaging with the iodine-containging contrast media.
no need to discontinue breastfeeding after imaging with MRI contrast media.
all breastfeeding mothers should temporarily discontinue breastfeeding after contrast media imaging.

questions.explanation:
靜脈注射含碘顯影劑後，血液中僅約1%進入母親乳汁，嬰兒消化道中乳汁內含碘對比劑再約1%進入嬰兒血液，故嬰兒實際吸收量僅約母親所接受劑量的0.01%，因此應明確鼓勵哺乳期婦女於注射含碘對比劑後「繼續」哺乳，不需暫停。並非所有顯影劑皆需停止哺乳(A、D錯)；含釓MRI對比劑則有微量(<0.04%)進入乳汁，為避免嬰兒吸入微量含釓對比劑，仍可建議暫停哺乳24小時(C錯，並非完全不需暫停)。

見 [[contrast-media-safety]]

questions.questionText: Which one of the followings about TB infection in pediatric patients is correct?

options.text: Children are amongst the low-risk groups for developing tuberculosis worldwide.
Diagnostic and treatment algorithms of tuberculosis for children are similar to those of adults.
Subpleural nodules (“tree-in-bud” appearance) on CT scan are suggestive of active tuberculosis.
Radiologists have an important role to play in early diagnosis of TB infection because bacteriologic confirmation of the disease is often difficult in children

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.186；Pediatr Radiol (2017) 47:1260-1268.
questions.explanation:
兒童結核病之細菌學確診(如痰液採檢、培養)常較成人困難，故放射科醫師於早期診斷上扮演重要角色，為正確敘述。兒童實為全球結核病發展之「高」風險族群之一(A錯)；兒童結核病之診斷與治療流程與成人「不」完全相同(B錯)；「tree-in-bud」表現實為「小葉中心性(centrilobular)」結節，非subpleural結節(C錯，此為考點常見混淆處)。

見 [[pediatric-tuberculosis]]

questions.questionText: Which should be included in the differential diagnosis of dural-based masses in AIDS patients?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.187；Mass Lesions of the Dura: Beyond Meningioma—Radiologic-Pathologic Correlation. RadioGraphics 2014;34:295-312.
questions.explanation:
EBV相關平滑肌腫瘤(EBV-associated smooth muscle tumors, EBV-SMT)源自硬腦膜或腦血管之間質細胞，AIDS病人因免疫低下與EBV共感染而好發此類腫瘤(常稱EBV-SMT)，故應列入AIDS病人硬腦膜基底腫塊之鑑別診斷。生殖細胞瘤、神經源性腫瘤、神經膠質瘤皆非AIDS相關硬腦膜基底病灶之典型鑑別診斷。

見 [[dural-based-masses-aids]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is WRONG about intracranial lipoma.

options.text: Tissue from all 3 embryonic germ layers.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.189；Diagnostic Imaging, Brain, Third edition, p.22.
questions.explanation:
顱內脂肪瘤成因主流理論為「meninx primitiva（腦膜原基，即蛛網膜下腔前驅組織）之持續存在與分化不良」，此組織主要為「間質(mesenchymal)」來源(主要屬中胚層，僅軟膜最內層可能屬神經外胚層)，並非「來自所有3個胚層」之組織，故本敘述錯誤。約20%位於天幕下、可有廣泛鈣化、約40-50%位於大腦半球間裂，皆為正確描述。

見 [[intracranial-lipoma]]

questions.questionText: Which one is wrong about second impact syndrome?

options.text: Disproportionate mass effect of the acute subdural hemorrhage.
Repeated head trauma within “window of vulnerability”.
Can result catastrophic brain swelling with permanent disability or death.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.190；Diagnostic Imaging, Brain, Third edition, p.206-207.
questions.explanation:
二次撞擊症候群(second impact syndrome)之顱內急性硬腦膜下出血通常「薄(thin，<0.5cm)」，但可合併與其血腫大小不成比例(disproportionate)之嚴重中線偏移與腫塊效應，故「通常>0.5cm」為錯誤敘述。反覆頭部創傷發生於「易感窗期(window of vulnerability)」內、可致災難性腦腫脹合併永久失能或死亡、硬腦膜下出血合併不成比例腫塊效應，皆為正確描述。

見 [[second-impact-syndrome]]

questions.questionText: Which one is not lysosomal disorder?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.191；Diagnostic Imaging, Brain, Third edition, p.773.
questions.explanation:
Kearns-Sayre症候群為粒線體疾病(mitochondrial disorder)，非溶酶體儲積症；粒線體疾病影響範圍較侷限，僅在特定組織(多為肌肉與中樞神經系統)發現粒線體基因缺失，病人常見外眼肌麻痺與眼底色素沉積。黏多醣症(mucopolysaccharidoses)、異染性腦白質失養症(metachromatic leukodystrophy)、Krabbe氏病皆為溶酶體儲積症。

見 [[lysosomal-storage-disorders-cns]]

questions.questionText: Which one is WRONG about idiopathic intracranial hypertension?

options.text: Intraocular protrusion of optic nerve head.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.191；Diagnostic Imaging, Brain, Third edition, p.896.
questions.explanation:
原發性顱內壓升高(IIH)常見表現為橫竇「狹窄/血栓/web」(stenosis/thrombosis/web)，而非橫竇「擴大」——硬腦膜靜脈竇擴張反而見於「低顱內壓」情境，兩者方向相反，故本敘述錯誤。空蝶鞍或部分空蝶鞍、視神經頭眼球內突出、後眼球扁平化，皆為IIH正確之影像表現。

見 [[idiopathic-intracranial-hypertension]]

questions.questionText: Which one is WRONG about schwannomatosis?

options.text: Multiple schwannomas of peripheral nervous system with involvement of vestibular nerves.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.192；Diagnostic Imaging, Brain, Third edition, p.130-131.
questions.explanation:
神經鞘瘤病(schwannomatosis)之診斷準則要求「不合併」前庭神經(vestibular nerve)侵犯，若合併前庭神經腫瘤則應歸類為NF2，而非schwannomatosis，故本敘述錯誤。其發生率與NF2相近、可有SMARCB1基因生殖細胞突變、好發年齡通常>30歲(30-60歲區間)，皆為正確描述。

見 [[schwannomatosis]]

questions.questionText: Which one is non-SAH cause of vasospasm?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.192；Diagnostic Imaging, Brain, Third edition, p.308.
questions.explanation:
血管痙攣(vasospasm)之非蛛網膜下腔出血(non-SAH)成因包含腦膜炎、急性高血壓腦病變、偏頭痛等多種病因，皆可造成血管痙攣，故答案為「以上皆是」。

見 [[non-sah-vasospasm]]

questions.questionText: Which one is wrong about fibromuscular dysplasia?

options.text: Type I (85%): Classic "string of beads" = medial fibroplasia.
Type II (10%): Long, tubular stenosis = intimal fibroplasia.
Type III (5%): Asymmetric outpouching from 1 side of artery = periadventitial fibroplasia.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.193；Diagnostic Imaging, Brain, Third edition, p.328.
questions.explanation:
依Olin et al. 2012年447例病人資料，纖維肌肉發育不良(FMD)最常侵犯動脈依序為腎動脈(79.7%)、肋外頸動脈(74.4%)與椎動脈(36.6%)、腸繫膜動脈(26%)、顱內頸動脈(17%)——並非「外頸動脈>內頸動脈>椎動脈」之排序(內頸動脈非典型好發部位)，故本敘述錯誤。Type I(85%，classic string of beads=medial fibroplasia)、Type II(10%，長管狀狹窄=intimal fibroplasia)、Type III(5%，單側不對稱外突=periadventitial fibroplasia)皆為正確描述。

見 [[fibromuscular-dysplasia]]

questions.questionText: Which is most commonly involved in dural AV fistula?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.195；Diagnostic Imaging, Brain, Third edition, p.401.
questions.explanation:
硬腦膜動靜脈瘻(dural AV fistula)最常侵犯之部位為橫竇與乙狀竇(transverse sinus and sigmoid sinus)。

見 [[cerebrovascular-malformations]]

questions.questionText: Which one is WRONG about remote cerebellar hemorrhage?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.196；Diagnostic Imaging, Brain, Third edition, p.267.
questions.explanation:
遠端小腦出血(remote cerebellar hemorrhage)之出血位置可為手術部位之對側或同側，亦可雙側，甚至可侷限於小腦蚓部——並非「僅侷限於蚓部」，故本敘述錯誤。典型發生於天幕上開顱術後、可呈現斑馬徵(zebra sign，血液沿小腦葉層狀分布)、無潛在病理病灶(良性、罕見之術後併發症，因CSF低容積致小腦下垂壓迫上方穿通靜脈引發出血性梗塞)，皆為正確描述。

見 [[remote-cerebellar-hemorrhage]]

questions.questionText: Which site is most involved in Behçet's disease?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.197；Diagnostic Imaging, Brain, Third edition, p.324.
questions.explanation:
⚠️官方詳解標示答案為A(midbrain)，惟頁緣紅筆加註「應該B才對」，對此答案表達存疑。依原始文獻，neuro-Behçet disease病灶好發部位依序為：腦幹(brainstem，最常見)＞基底核(basal ganglia，約1/3雙側)＞視丘＞皮質下白質(較少見)＞脊髓(較少見)。「腦幹」為最常見侵犯部位，但選項並未列出廣義「腦幹」，僅細分中腦(midbrain)與橋腦(pons)供選——官方答案認定中腦，惟考官加註質疑應為橋腦，此細分於原始文獻未明確區分，建議醫師對照原文獻確認。

見 [[behcet-disease-neuro]]

questions.questionText: Which one is correct about pial AV fistula?

options.text: About 10% of all brain vascular malformations.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.198；Diagnostic Imaging, Brain, Third edition, p.404.
questions.explanation:
軟膜動靜脈瘻(pial AV fistula)之出血風險較動靜脈畸形(AVM)為高，為正確敘述——瘻管本身較脆弱，長期高流速血流增加破裂出血風險。軟膜動靜脈瘻為罕見病灶，約僅佔所有顱內血管畸形之1.6%(非10%，A錯)；其病灶為單一動靜脈直接相通、「無」中介之nidus(此為與AVM之關鍵鑑別點，C錯，AVM才有nidus)；病灶小且血流量較低時仍可能自發性阻塞(非「無法」自發阻塞，D錯)。

見 [[cerebrovascular-malformations]]

questions.questionText: Which one is WRONG about paraneoplastic syndromes of the brain?

options.text: Immune-mediated by autoantibodies or cytotoxic T cell-related mechanisms.
Limbic encephalitis is most common clinical paraneoplastic syndrome.
About 10% of patients with systemic cancers develop paraneoplastic syndrome.
Most common tumor is small cell lung carcinoma.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.198；Diagnostic Imaging, Brain, Third edition, p.598.
questions.explanation:
副腫瘤症候群(paraneoplastic syndrome)發生於高達「15%」（非10%）之癌症病人，故本敘述錯誤。機轉為自體抗體或細胞毒性T細胞相關之免疫媒介反應、邊緣系統腦炎(limbic encephalitis)為最常見之臨床副腫瘤症候群、最常見相關腫瘤為小細胞肺癌，皆為正確描述。

見 [[paraneoplastic-syndromes-brain]]

questions.questionText: Which one is correct about colloid cyst?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.199；Diagnostic Imaging, Brain, Third edition, p.612-613.
questions.explanation: 膠樣囊腫(colloid cyst)大多位於Monro氏孔(foramen of Monro)、約2/3於非顯影CT呈高密度、約2/3於T1WI呈高訊號，三者皆為正確描述。

questions.questionText: What is the most common benign tumor of hand?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.200；Diagnostic Imaging of Benign and Malignant Osseous Tumors of the Fingers. RadioGraphics 2014;34:1954-1967.
questions.explanation: 內生軟骨瘤(enchondroma)為手部最常見之良性骨腫瘤。

questions.questionText: Which of the following statement regarding "Bizarre Parosteal Osteochondromatous Proliferation" is incorrect?

options.text: Medullary continuity between the normal bone is uncommon.
Most lesions are asymptomatic, but may progressively enlarge.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.200；Diagnostic Imaging of Benign and Malignant Osseous Tumors of the Fingers. RadioGraphics 2014;34:1954-1967.
questions.explanation:
BPOP(Bizarre Parosteal Osteochondromatous Proliferation)為罕見「良性」病灶(非惡性)，屬局部侵襲性且常復發之骨膜性骨軟骨性外生骨疣，源自皮質，故本敘述錯誤。又稱Nora lesion、與正常骨之髓腔連續性不常見、多數病灶無症狀但可漸進性增大，皆為正確描述。

見 [[hand-bone-tumors]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following imaging findings not typical for rickets?

options.text: A peripheral rim of long bone along metaphysis.
Transverse sclerotic lines paralleling the growth plates.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.201；Imaging Findings of Metabolic Bone Disease. RadioGraphics 2016;36:1871-1887.
questions.explanation:
遠端指骨骨吸收(acro-osteolysis)並非佝僂病(rickets)之典型表現，其鑑別診斷(口訣PINCHFO)包含乾癬/緻密性骨發育不全、外傷、神經病變、膠原血管病、副甲狀腺機能亢進、家族性、其他(氯乙烯暴露/早老症)——皆與rickets機轉不同，故此敘述為佝僂病非典型表現。佝僂病典型影像特徵含rachitic rosary(肋軟骨交界處膨大)、長骨幹骺端周邊透亮環(peripheral rim)、與生長板平行之橫向硬化線(healing rickets徵象)。

見 [[metabolic-bone-disease-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following imaging findings not typical for hypophosphatemia? (應該是指Hypophosphatasia)
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.202；Imaging Findings of Metabolic Bone Disease. RadioGraphics 2016;36:1871-1887.
questions.explanation:
低磷酸酶症(hypophosphatasia)之典型骨骼表現為「瀰漫性骨質疏鬆(generalized/usually irregular osteoporosis)」而非「瀰漫性硬化性變化」，故本敘述錯誤。顱骨敲擊銅樣外觀(beaten-copper appearance，因功能性顱縫早閉、若嬰兒存活顱縫可能永久融合致顱內壓升高)、身材矮小、長骨假性骨折，皆為正確描述。

見 [[metabolic-bone-disease-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following imaging findings not typical for renal osteodystrophy?

options.text: Transverse sclerotic lines paralleling the growth plates.
Salt and pepper appearance of skull.
Bone resorption and cortical tunneling of long bone.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.203；Imaging Findings of Metabolic Bone Disease. RadioGraphics 2016;36:1871-1887.
questions.explanation:
與生長板平行之橫向硬化線為「佝僂病(rickets)」之典型表現，非腎性骨營養不良(renal osteodystrophy)之典型影像特徵，故本敘述錯誤。顱骨鹽和胡椒樣外觀(salt and pepper skull)、長骨骨吸收合併皮質隧道化(cortical tunneling)、棕色瘤(brown tumor)形成，皆為腎性骨營養不良(常合併續發性副甲狀腺機能亢進)之正確典型表現。

見 [[metabolic-bone-disease-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Which one of the following carpal arcs will be disrupted during the lunate dislocation?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.204；Orthopedic Imaging – A Practical Approach 5th Edition, p.213 & 216.
questions.explanation: 月狀骨脫位(lunate dislocation)時，會破壞腕骨弧線中的Arc II(通過近排腕骨遠端凸面之弧線)之連續性。

questions.questionText: Which one of the following radiographic features on radiography is NOT usually seen in patients with an enchondroma?

options.text: Annular or punctate calcifications in the matrix
Scalloping of the inner cortical margin

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.205；Orthopedic Imaging – A Practical Approach 5th Edition, p.614-621.
questions.explanation:
邊緣硬化緣(sclerotic rim)並非內生軟骨瘤(enchondroma)之典型平片表現，故本敘述錯誤。基質內環狀或點狀鈣化、內側皮質緣扇形凹陷(scalloping)、於短骨(如手指骨)完全呈透亮性表現，皆為內生軟骨瘤之正確典型表現。

見 [[hand-bone-tumors]]

questions.questionText: Which one of the following radiographic features on radiography is NOT usually seen in patients with hyperthyroidism? (應該是問hyperparathyrodism)
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.206；Orthopedic Imaging – A Practical Approach 5th Edition, p.847.
questions.explanation:
鈕扣狀死骨(button sequestrum)——溶骨性病灶內殘存之中央骨密度區，周圍環繞透亮帶——典型見於骨髓炎(osteomyelitis)與嗜酸性肉芽腫(eosinophilic granuloma)，偶見於纖維肉瘤與淋巴瘤，並非副甲狀腺機能亢進(hyperparathyroidism)之典型表現，故本敘述錯誤。指骨骨膜下骨吸收、長骨皮質內骨吸收、骨內囊狀透亮病灶(棕色瘤)，皆為副甲狀腺機能亢進之正確典型表現。

見 [[metabolic-bone-disease-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Which one of the following cervical spine injuries is NOT an unstable injury?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.207；Orthopedic Imaging – A Practical Approach 5th Edition, p.377.
questions.explanation:
Clay-shoveler骨折(下頸椎棘突骨折)為「穩定」骨折。屈曲型淚滴骨折(flexion teardrop fracture)反映廣泛韌帶損傷合併脊椎不穩定，常合併脊髓損傷(尤其前脊髓症候群)，為不穩定骨折；Hangman骨折(C2椎弓根雙側骨折，即創傷性樞椎脫位)為過度伸展合併牽張所致之不穩定骨折；Jefferson骨折(C1爆裂性骨折，前後弓雙處或多處骨折)為不穩定骨折。

見 [[cervical-spine-fracture-stability]]

questions.questionText: Which ONE of the following image findings is NOT commonly seen in a Brodie abscess on the radiograph?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.208；Orthopedic Imaging – A Practical Approach 5th Edition, p.800.
questions.explanation:
Brodie abscess(亞急性骨髓炎)典型呈「界線清楚(well-demarcated)」病灶，而非邊界不清(ill-defined)，故本敘述錯誤。周圍反應性硬化緣、中心位於幹骺端、可延伸跨越生長板，皆為正確典型描述。

見 [[brodie-abscess]]

questions.questionText: Which of the statement regarding to adnexal tumor is false.

options.text: When searching for ovary, it is often useful to follow the round ligament away from the tapered cornual region of the uterus because this often points toward the ovary.
The claw sign is not useful in determining whether a mass originates from the ovary or the uterus
Pedunculated lesions from the uterus (usually a fibroid) should have a vascular pedicle extending from the uterus to the mass that can usually be found with imaging.

If ovarian follicles are not visible, or if an abnormality is so large as to distort normal anatomy, tracing the ovarian veins from the inferior vena cava (right) or left renal vein (left) down into the pelvis is often effective.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.211；Problem Solving in Abdominal Imaging, CHAPTER 21, 599-635.
questions.explanation:
爪徵(claw sign)「有助於」判斷腫塊是否源自子宮(而非卵巢)——腫塊與正常子宮肌層間呈爪狀交界，提示子宮來源(如平滑肌瘤)，故「爪徵無助於判斷」為錯誤敘述。尋找卵巢時沿圓韌帶自子宮角錐狀區向外追蹤常指向卵巢、帶蒂之子宮病灶(通常為肌瘤)應有可見之血管蒂連接子宮與腫塊、卵巢濾泡不可見或異常過大扭曲正常解剖時可沿卵巢靜脈(右側自下腔靜脈、左側自左腎靜脈)向下追蹤至骨盆，皆為正確描述。

見 [[adnexal-tumor-claw-sign]]

questions.questionText: 當尿液從膀胱排出時，依序經過哪些構造？(1)membranous urethra (2)Bulbous urethra (3)Pars Nuda (4) prostatic urethra
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.212；Problem Solving in Abdominal Imaging, CHAPTER 19, 530-565.
questions.explanation:
尿液自膀胱排出依序經過：(4)前列腺部尿道(prostatic urethra) → (1)膜部尿道(membranous urethra) → (3)Pars Nuda(壓迫肌，近端球部尿道與膜部尿道交界之錐狀構造) → (2)球部尿道(bulbous urethra)，其後再接續陰莖部尿道。

見 [[male-urethra-anatomy]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following statement regarding to nonobstructive mimics of obstructive hydronephrosis is false?

options.text: Renal AVM could be differentiated from hydronephrosis on Doppler ultrasonography.
Renal sinus cyst could be differentiated from hydronephrosis on delayed phase contrast-enhanced ultrasonography (CEUS).
Staghorn calculus typically accompanys xanthogranulomatous pyelonephritis
Hydronephrosis is commonly seen in pregnant woman in 3rd trimester.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.213；Problem Solving in Abdominal Imaging, CHAPTER 18, 485-529.
questions.explanation:
腎竇囊腫(renal sinus cyst)可模擬水腎症，主要應以CT IVP等排泄性影像鑑別(顯示集尿系統正常或受壓變窄/移位但「未」擴張)，而非以延遲期對比增強超音波(CEUS)鑑別，故本敘述錯誤。腎臟動靜脈畸形可以都卜勒超音波與水腎症鑑別、鹿角狀結石常伴隨黃色肉芽腫性腎盂腎炎、妊娠第三孕期常見水腎症(右側較明顯)，皆為正確描述。

見 [[hydronephrosis-mimics]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following ultrasonographical finding is true when we try to differentiate between epididymitis and testicular torsion?

options.text: Both epididymitis and testicular torsion shows enlarged epididymis size
Both epididymitis and testicular torsion shows enlarged testis size.
Both epididymitis and testicular torsion shows increased flow to epididymis.
Both epididymitis and testicular torsion shows increased flow to testis.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.214；Problem Solving in Abdominal Imaging, CHAPTER 20, 566-598.
questions.explanation:
⚠️官方答案標示B，惟頁緣加註「A應該也對」——因扭轉(torsion)本身即會造成睪丸「與」附睪皆腫大(increase in the size of the testis and epididymis)，故理論上A(附睪腫大)與B(睪丸腫大)皆為兩者共同表現，考官對單一正解B表達存疑，建議醫師對照原文獻確認。附睪炎(epididymitis)特徵為附睪血流增加(epididymal PSV>15cm/sec，患側/健側比值>1.7，RI<0.5)；扭轉(torsion)特徵為睪丸與附睪血流皆下降、RI>0.75，兩者血流方向相反，故C、D(血流皆增加)不成立。

見 [[testicular-torsion]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following imaging finding favors malignancy in adrenal gland?
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.214；Problem Solving in Abdominal Imaging, CHAPTER 17, 464-484.
questions.explanation:
腎上腺腫塊大小>4公分傾向惡性表現，為腎上腺病灶評估惡性風險的重要影像特徵之一。巨觀脂肪(如myelolipoma/腺瘤)、維持腺體外形之鈣化(adreniform shape calcification)較傾向良性；單純CT高密度(>50HU非顯影)於本題並非首選惡性指標(需搭配其他脂肪含量/washout特徵綜合判斷)。

見 [[adrenal-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is correct considering androgen insensitivity syndrome?

options.text: All of the above are correct

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.215；Hricak, H. Diagnostic Imaging: Gynecology. Salt Lake City, Utah: Amirsys; 2007. p 4-14~4-17.
questions.explanation: 雄性素不敏感症候群(androgen insensitivity syndrome, AIS，又稱睪丸女性化症候群)之病人子宮通常缺如或呈殘跡狀態(absent or rudimentary uterus)，為正確描述。核型為46,XY(非46,XX)、性腺為雙側隱睪(非正常卵巢)，兩者皆為錯誤描述。

questions.questionText: Considering cystic lesions in female pelvis, please list these lesions according to the anatomical relationship, from superior to inferior. 1. Gartner duct cyst. 2. Bartholin cyst. 3. Nabothian cyst.
questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.216；Hricak, H. Diagnostic Imaging: Gynecology. Salt Lake City, Utah: Amirsys; 2007. p 3-60, 4-26, 4-58.
questions.explanation: 女性骨盆囊性病灶由上至下排列順序：(3)Nabothian囊腫(子宮頸表面) → (1)Gartner氏管囊腫(陰道側壁上段) → (2)Bartholin氏腺囊腫(陰道口/會陰最下段)。

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT correct about Meigs syndrome?

options.text: Presence of ascites and pleural effusion
Tumor is typically hypointense on T2WI

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.216；Hricak, H. Diagnostic Imaging: Gynecology. Salt Lake City, Utah: Amirsys; 2007. p 7-198~7-201.
questions.explanation:
Meigs症候群為良性病程，「不」合併腹膜結節(peritoneal nodules，該表現提示惡性/腹膜轉移)，故本敘述錯誤。合併腹水與肋膜積液、與卵巢腫瘤(典型為fibroma)相關、腫瘤(fibroma)因富含膠原纖維組織於T2WI典型呈低訊號，皆為正確描述。

見 [[meigs-syndrome]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT correct about Krukenberg tumor?

options.text: Metastases to ovary from signet ring cell adenocarcinoma

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.218；Hricak, H. Diagnostic Imaging: Gynecology. Salt Lake City, Utah: Amirsys; 2007. p 7-150~7-153.
questions.explanation:
Krukenberg腫瘤之多數影像表現非特異性，主要呈「實質為主」或「囊實混合」腫塊，並非「以囊性為主」，故本敘述錯誤。轉移自印戒細胞腺癌至卵巢、最常見原發部位為胃、常侵犯雙側卵巢，皆為正確描述。

見 [[krukenberg-tumor]]

questions.questionText: 有關於成人腸套疊，下列何者敘述錯誤：

options.text: It is often a transient benign incidental finding, largely unappreciated before the widespread availability of CT
Terminal ileum to cecal segment is the most common site of involvement in adults.
Proximal obstruction often accompanies clinically significant intussusception.
If the length of the intussusception measures less than 3 to 5 cm and no proximal dilatation is present in an adult, it is unlikely to be of clinical significance.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.219；Problem Solving in Abdominal Imaging, CHAPTER 16, 416-463 Gastrointestinal Tract.
questions.explanation:
成人腸套疊「無」固定好發部位分布模式——絕大多數病例存在導引點病灶(lead point lesion)，套疊發生位置取決於該病灶所在位置，故「迴腸末端至盲腸段為最常見侵犯部位」之敘述錯誤。常為短暫良性偶然發現(CT廣泛應用前多未被察覺)、臨床顯著套疊常合併近端阻塞、若套疊長度<3-5公分且無近端擴張則不太可能具臨床意義，皆為正確描述。

見 [[adult-intussusception]]

questions.questionText: Regarding to acute upper gastrointestinal tract bleeding, which of the following statement is true?

options.text: For acute nonvariceal upper gastrointestinal tract bleeding with correctable unstable vital sign, trans-arterial embolization is the first-line treatment.
For acute nonvariceal upper gastrointestinal tract bleeding with stable vital sign, trans-arterial embolization is the first-line treatment.
For acute nonvariceal upper gastrointestinal tract acute rebleeding after endoscopic treatment, trans-arterial embolization is the first-line treatment.
For acute upper gastrointestinal tract bleeding with suspected esophageal varices rupture, endoscopy treatment is the first-line treatment.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.220；Gralnek IM, et al. Diagnosis and management of nonvariceal upper gastrointestinal hemorrhage: European Society of Gastrointestinal Endoscopy (ESGE) Guideline. Endoscopy 2015;47(10):a1-46.
questions.explanation:
疑似食道靜脈瘤破裂之急性上消化道出血，內視鏡治療為首選第一線治療，為正確描述。生命徵象可矯正之不穩定病人仍應先嘗試內視鏡治療(非TAE為首選，A錯)；生命徵象穩定之非靜脈瘤性上消化道出血首選為內視鏡治療(非TAE，B錯)；內視鏡治療後急性再出血，首選應先「重複內視鏡治療(repeat endoscopy)」，而非直接TAE(C錯)。

見 [[upper-gi-bleeding-management]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following statement regarding to TIPS(Transjugular intrahepatic portosystemic shunt) is false?

options.text: The main purpose of performing TIPS is to prolong the survival of patient with end stage cirrhosis.
Patient with severe hepatic encephalopathy, decompensated hepatic failure or severe heart failure is contraindicated for TIPS.
After performing TIPS, the porto-systemic pressure gradient decreases.
The most common course of shunting is from right hepatic vein to right portal vein.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.221；Image-Guided Interventions, Chapter 112, 822-828.e1.
questions.explanation:
TIPS置放之主要目的為降低與門脈高壓相關併發症之門脈壓力(如控制靜脈瘤出血、頑固性腹水)，並非以「延長末期肝硬化病人存活期」為主要目的，故本敘述錯誤。重度肝性腦病變、失代償肝衰竭或嚴重心衰竭為TIPS之禁忌症、術後門體壓力梯度下降(目標<12 mmHg)、最常見分流路徑為右肝靜脈至右門脈，皆為正確描述。

見 [[tips-portosystemic-shunt]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is less likely to be the indications of CEUS(contrast-enhanced ultrasound) on FLL(focal liver lesion.)?

options.text: CEUS is performed to characterize observations detected at surveillance US.
CEUS can be performed to characterize observations detected on prior CT / MRI if the observations are visible as distinct nodules on pre-contrast gray-scale ultrasound.
To characterize observations (generally >10mm and visible as distinct nodules at pre-contrast grayscale US) in patients at risk for HCC and establish a diagnosis of HCC.

questions.reference: 2018 交換考題 詳解 p.222；LI-RADS CEUS 2016.
questions.explanation:
區分「不同種類轉移病灶彼此之間」並非CEUS於局部肝病灶(FLL)之常見適應症，故較不可能為適應症。CEUS常見適應症為：確認監測超音波所偵測到之異常表現、確認先前CT/MRI偵測到且於灰階超音波上呈明顯結節之異常表現、於HCC高風險病人中確認一般>10mm且灰階超音波呈明顯結節之異常表現以建立HCC診斷。

見 [[li-rads-ceus]]

questions.questionText: Which disease does not show T1 shortening at basal ganglia
questions.reference: RadioGraphics 2011; 31:5–30
questions.explanation:
B: hypoglycemia造成bilateral areas of increased signal on both T2 and FLAIR，侵犯posterior limb of internal capsule、cerebral cortex（尤其parieto-occipital與insula）、hippocampus與basal ganglia，並非T1 shortening；restricted diffusion可為更早期敏感之表現，多可回復。
T1 shortening at basal ganglia之常見原因：肝硬化(manganese沉積)、長期全靜脈營養(manganese)、出血(methemoglobin)等。

見 [[basal-ganglia-t1-shortening]]

questions.questionText: Which statement about MR spectroscopy is correct?

options.text: Lactate resonates at 1.3 ppm chemical shift with a double peak at short TE
Choline is a precursor of acetylcholine (ACH), a component of cell membranes

questions.reference: Radiographics. 2006;26 Suppl 1 (suppl_1): S173-89.
questions.explanation:
A: Lactate為double peak出現在long TE（非short TE），且與lipid band重疊，可用intermediate TE如144ms使lactate反轉以資鑑別，故A錯。
B: NAA共振於2.02 ppm（非3.0 ppm），B錯。
C: Canavan disease為NAA增加（非減少），C錯。
D正確：Choline為acetylcholine（細胞膜成分）之前驅物。

見 [[mr-spectroscopy-brain]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following statement regarding to contrast medium used in liver imaging is false?

options.text: SPIO uptake by Kupffer cells, hypointense on MRI
Sonazoid microbubbles uptake by Kupffer cells, hyperechoic on US
Gadoxetate disodium (Primovist) uptake by Kupffer cells, high signal on MRI
Extracellular gadolinium-based contrast distributes in liver sinusoid, high signal on MRI

questions.reference: Gandhi SN, Brown MA, Wong JG, Aguirre DA, Sirlin CB. MR contrast agents for liver imaging: what, when, how. RadioGraphics 2006;26(6):1621-1636; LI-RADS CEUS 2016
questions.explanation:
C為偽：Gadoxetate disodium (Primovist)實際由hepatocytes（非Kupffer cells）經OATP1（organic anion transporting polypeptide-dependent transporter）攝取。

見 [[mr-contrast-agents-liver]]

questions.questionText: Which statement about IVC leiomyosarcoma is incorrect?

options.text: Upper-segment IVC involvement (hepatic vein to right atrium) causes Budd-Chiari syndrome
Middle-segment involvement (hepatic vein to renal vein) causes nephrotic syndrome
Lower-segment involvement (infrarenal) causes lower extremity edema

questions.reference: RadioGraphics 2015;35:616-620
questions.explanation:
以上敘述皆正確，A/B/C三段分類與對應症候群描述皆為正確配對。

見 [[ivc-leiomyosarcoma]]

questions.questionText: Which one is relative rarely affected by posterior mediastinum tumor?
questions.reference: Cummings KW, Sridhar S, Parsons MS, et al. Cross-sectional imaging anatomy and pathologic conditions affecting thoracic nerves. RadioGraphics 2017; 37:73–92
questions.explanation:
Phrenic nerve走行於前縦隔（沿心包外側），不在後縦隔路徑內，故後縦隔腫瘤相對少侵犯。

見 [[posterior-mediastinum-nerves]]

questions.questionText: 請問 lobular carcinoma in situ (LCIS) 於AJCC 8th breast cancer T stage 為何?

options.text: T stage is not necessary because LCIS is considered a risk factor rather than a malignancy.

questions.reference: AJCC 8th cancer stage
questions.explanation:
LCIS屬原位癌，與DCIS、不伴侵犯之乳頭Paget同歸類為Tis。

見 [[breast-cancer-staging]]

questions.questionText: Regarding to retrievable IVC filter, which one of the following statements was not true?

options.text: There were less adversed events than permanent IVC filter when prolonged IVC filter implanted.
Tilting of IVC filter do not decrease the thrombus-trapping efficiency.
The complications of prolonged IVC filter implantation include filter migration, fracture, IVC perforation.
When an atretic diminutive IVC caudal to the level of the IVC filter is found on abdominal CT, the diagnosis of filter-related chronic iliocaval thrombosis can be made.

questions.reference: Radiographics. 2017 Jul-Aug;37(4):1236-1245.
questions.explanation:
實際上Tilting會降低血栓捕捉效率，非「不影響」。

見 [[ivc-filter-retrievable]]

questions.questionText: The development of extrahepatic collateral (EHC) arteries can interfere with the therapeutic efficacy of TACE for hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC). About EHC arteries, which statement is incorrect?

options.text: There is a positive correlation between development of a parasitic arterial supply to HCC and the number of previous TACE procedure.
The right inferior phrenic artery directly contacts with bare area of liver, and contributes up to 70% of HCCs with a parasitic supply.
Selective angiography of the right internal mammary artery should be performed in patient with large HCC abutting the dorsal aspect of the diaphragm.
TACE of the intercostal artery is contraindicated if the microcatheter cannot be advanced distally, owing to high risk for spinal cord infarction and skin necrosis.

questions.reference: RadioGraphics 2017; 37:963–977
questions.explanation:
正確應為ventral（腹側）aspect，非dorsal。

見 [[tace-extrahepatic-collateral]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following description about cryoablation is NOT true?

options.text: The mechanism of cell death with freezing is associated with cell membrane disruption and an associated release of intracellular contents.
The temperature necessary to cause reliable cellular necrosis depends on the cell type and thermal history of the tissue, with estimates of -35°C to -20°C
The bleeding risk of cryoablation for patients with liver cirrhosis and hepatocellular carcinoma obviously equals to that of heat ablation.
The precision that is possible with cryoablation can be important for treatment of tumors adjacent to vulnerable structures

questions.reference: RadioGraphics 2014; 35:1344–1362
questions.explanation:
Heat is the preferred method for treating HCC in patients with cirrhosis because of the increased bleeding risk and disseminated intravascular coagulation-like reaction, called cryoshock, associated with cryoablation. Heat-based ablation provides improved hemostasis compared with cryoablation and essentially no risk for cryoshock; 實際上cryoablation出血風險高於heat ablation，非相等。

見 [[tumor-ablation]]

questions.questionText: 關於 paradoudenal hernia(PDH)下列何者敘述為錯?

options.text: PDHs constitute approximately 53% of all internal hernias. Approximately three-fourths of these hernias occur on the left and are more predominant in men than in women.

Left PDH develops through the fossa of Landzert into the descending mesocolon and left of the transverse mesocolon and results from failure of fusion of the inferior mesentery to the parietal peritoneum.
CT demonstrates superior mesenteric vein and left colic artery, as a landmark above the encapsulated bowel loops for left PDH.
The superior mesenteric artery and right colic vein are located at the anterior-medial border of the encapsulated small bowel loops and are a landmark for right PDH

questions.reference: RadioGraphics 2005; 25:997–1015
questions.explanation:
正確地標應為IMV（下腸繫膜靜脈）與ascending left colic artery，非SMV/left colic artery。

見 [[paraduodenal-hernia]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following in false concerning hematological malignancy of liver?

options.text: The possible symptoms of primary hepatic lymphoma (PHL) includes right upper quadrant pain, jaundice, fever and weight loss.
The most common imaging manifestation of PHL is a solitary discrete lesion. Diffuse infiltration is uncommon in PHL and indicates a poor prognosis.
Secondary liver involvement of non-Hodgkin lymphoma is seen in at least 50% of patients, whereas PHL of non-Hodgkin lymphoma is rare.
In patient with multiple myeloma, the involvement of liver is not a common extraosseous manifestation.

questions.reference: RadioGraphics 2015; 35:71-86
questions.explanation:
Radiologically detectable extraosseous manifestations occur in 10%–16% of patients with multiple myeloma. The lymph nodes, pleura, and liver are the most commonly involved organs；實際上肝臟侵犯並不罕見。

見 [[hepatic-lymphoma-myeloma]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following MR contrast agents have significant amount excreted from hepatobiliary system?
questions.reference: Cancer Imaging (2013) 13(4), 567-579
questions.explanation:
Gd-EOB-DTPA（gadoxetate disodium）為肝膽特異性對比劑，約50%經肝膽排泄；其餘皆為一般細胞外對比劑，主要經腎排泄。

見 [[hepatobiliary-mri-contrast]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following regarding struma ovarii is incorrect?

options.text: may associate with hyperthyroidism or carcinoid syndrome.

questions.reference: Abdominal Imaging (2008) 33:740–743
questions.explanation:
The vast majority of strumae ovarii are benign, but malignant disease is found in a small percentage of cases, the most common being papillary thyroid carcinoma.

見 [[struma-ovarii]]

questions.questionText: About dural arteriovenous fistula (DAVF), which statement was "wrong"?

options.text: Most common site is cavernous sinus (CS).
Best diagnostic clue is "Network of tiny vessels in wall of thrombosed dural venous sinus".
Enlarged cortical draining veins means aggressive DAVF
Acquired direct shunt between dural artery and dural venous sinus or cortical vein

questions.reference: STATdx → Dural Arteriovenous Fistula
questions.explanation:
實際上最常見部位為transverse/sigmoid sinus，非cavernous sinus。

見 [[dural-av-fistula]]

questions.questionText:
Which location is the predilection of internal carotid artery (ICA) dissection?
(1) Just distal to the common carotid bifurcation
(2) Between C2 and the skull base
(3) Petrous ICA
(4) Cavernous ICA
(5) Terminal ICA
questions.reference: Practical Neuroangiography, 2nd edition, P321
questions.explanation:
ICA剝離好發於頸總動脈分叉遠端及C2至顱底之間之頸段ICA；petrous/cavernous/terminal ICA相對少見。

見 [[ica-dissection-sites]]

questions.questionText: About autoimmune encephalitis, which statement is correct?

options.text: Autoimmune encephalitis is a relatively new category of immune-mediated disease that demonstrates a widely variable spectrum of clinical presentations, ranging from the relatively mild or insidious onset of cognitive impairment to more complex forms of encephalopathy with refractory seizure.
Antibody-mediated CNS disorders can be classified into 2 broad categories, paraneoplastic or nonparaneoplastic, based on the presence or absence of an underlying malignancy, respectively.

Recognizing characteristic findings within limbic structures suggestive of autoimmune encephalitis can be a key step in alerting clinicians to the potential diagnosis and ensuring a prompt and appropriate clinical work-up.

Paraneoplastic syndromes are most often seen in small-cell lung cancer but can also be seen in a variety of other cancers as well, such as neuroblastoma, germ cell tumor of the testis, breast cancer, Hodgkin lymphoma, thymoma, and immature ovarian teratomas.

questions.reference: American Journal of Neuroradiology 2017, 38 (6) 1070-1078
questions.explanation:
四項敘述皆正確：臨床光譜廣泛、抗體媒介CNS疾病依有無惡性腫瘤分paraneoplastic/nonparaneoplastic、邊緣系統影像表現為關鍵診斷線索、副腫瘤症候群好發於small-cell lung cancer但亦見於多種其他腫瘤。

見 [[autoimmune-encephalitis]]

questions.questionText: Which is not the factor included in intracranial hemorrhage (ICH) score?
questions.reference: Hemphill JC 3rd, Bonovich DC, Besmertis L, Manley GT, Johnston SC. Stroke. 2001 Apr;32(4):891-7.
questions.explanation:
正式因子為更具體之「infratentorial origin」而非泛稱的「location of ICH」。ICH score五因子：GCS score、ICH volume(≥30cm³)、IVH、infratentorial origin、age≥80，總分0–6。

見 [[ich-score]]

questions.questionText: According to AJCC 8th edition, what is the clinical staging of HPV-associated oropharyngeal cancer with one 3.6cm tumor mass at tongue base, extending to lingual surface of glottis and one 4.5cm metastatic lymph node at right neck level III?
questions.reference: AJCC 8th edition
questions.explanation:
腫瘤侵犯會厭舌面使T分期升至T3（不受3.6cm大小限制）；單一同側4.5cm淋巴結（未超過6cm）為N1。

見 [[hpv-oropharyngeal-staging]]

questions.questionText: Stener lesion is when the ulnar collateral ligament of thumb is superficial to _____, which may need surgery
questions.reference: Lee Patrick, Tim B. Hunter and Mihra Taljanovic. "Musculoskeletal Colloquialisms: How Did We Come Up with These Names?" Radiographics 24, no. 4 (July 2004): 1009-1027.
questions.explanation:
UCL斷端回縮並移位至內收肌腱膜（adductor aponeurosis）淺層，被腱膜阻隔卡住無法癒合，故需手術。

見 [[gamekeeper-thumb]]

questions.questionText: Which one is not for evaluation and measurement for developmental dysplasia of hip?

options.text: Slope of lateral edge of acetabulum

questions.reference: Bone and Joint Imaging. Resnick. Elsevier Sauners. 3rd Edition. p. 1268
questions.explanation:
Meary's angle為足部(1st metatarsal與talus軸線)測量方法，非DDH評估項目。Hilgenreiner's line、center-edge角、acetabulum外側緣斜率皆為DDH標準評估測量項目。

見 [[developmental-dysplasia-hip]]

questions.questionText: About the use of ultrasound in trauma, which following statement is not true?

options.text: The first and easiest view to obtain is of the right-upper quadrant hepatorenal space, also known as Morison's pouch.
The goal of the FAST examination is to visualize intraperitoneal fluid in dependent areas of the abdominal cavity.
Intraperitoneal blood is anechoic (black) on ultrasonography.
Ultrasonography has a high sensitivity for detecting parenchymal injury of liver or kidney.

questions.reference: Ultrasound-guided procedures and investigations, p. 77-79
questions.explanation:
實際上FAST對肝/腎實質損傷之敏感度有限，非高敏感度；孤立實質器官損傷但無游離液時FAST無法偵測。

見 [[fast-exam]]

questions.questionText: 下列關於醫用超音波的基本物理何者有誤?

options.text: 超音波是一種人耳聽不到的聲音，頻率大於20000赫茲(Hertz, Hz)
超音波的影像由回波所組成
超音波的顯示方式裡A mode目前已幾乎不用
側向或橫向解析度是區分音波前進方向的兩個反射點的能力

questions.reference: 一般超音波診斷學 p. 1-9
questions.explanation:
此為軸向解析度(axial resolution)之定義；側向/橫向解析度應為區分垂直於音波前進方向的兩個反射點之能力。

見 [[ultrasound-physics-basics]]

questions.questionText: Which of the followings can present muscle in muscle degloving pattern of injury?
questions.explanation:
Rectus femoris具雙羽狀(bipennate)構造，中央腱膜位於內側肌腱複合體中央，為此脫套傷型態之好發肌肉。

見 [[muscle-degloving-injury]]

questions.questionText: 下列何者不是甲狀腺結節在超音波下的可疑表徵?

options.text: 邊緣鈣化且有些突出軟組織

questions.reference: 一般超音波診斷學, p33-34
questions.explanation:
海綿狀結節(spongiform)於ACR TI-RADS composition給0分，為良性表徵。微細鈣化、前後軸大於橫軸(taller-than-wide)、邊緣鈣化且突出軟組織皆為可疑表徵。

見 [[thyroid-nodule-us]]

questions.questionText: 關於頸部淋巴結的超音波診斷學，下列何者有誤?

options.text: 局部淋巴結群可依其位置而命名，胸骨上凹部分屬於第六群
消化系器官癌轉移至頸部時多位於左鎖骨上，稱魏孝氏淋巴結（Virchow's node）
非赫金森淋巴瘤（non-Hodgkin lymphoma）侵犯的淋巴結在超音波下通常很大且回音很低，有時酷似囊腫
赫金森淋巴瘤（Hodgkin lymphoma）侵犯的淋巴結在超音波下其內在回音較為不均勻

questions.reference: 一般超音波診斷學 p. 45-49
questions.explanation:
官方答案標示「A (or D?)」未定案。A：level VI介於舌骨至胸骨上凹，胸骨上凹為VI/VII交界，敘述略有爭議。D：與來源「US無可靠準則區分HL與NHL」原則不符，亦可視為錯誤。暫依官方以A為主，D爭議並列待確認。

見 [[neck-lymph-nodes]]

questions.questionText: 下列哪個MRI掃描參數與掃描時間無關?
questions.reference: R. H. Hashemi, et al., MRI the basics, 3rd Ed., Lippincott Williams & Wilkins, 2010. P.165
questions.explanation:
Scan time = TR·Ny·NSA/ETL。頻率編碼步數Nx於單一讀出內採樣完成，不影響掃描時間；TR、phase-encoding Ny、NEX皆直接乘入。

見 [[mri-scan-time-parameters]]

questions.questionText: 執行血管攝影診療時，下列何種機器設定可降低病人所接受到之劑量?

options.text: 使用低畫面更新率之脈衝式透視攝影模式 (low frame rate pulsed fluoroscopy)
縮短X光管到病人皮膚表面的距離
若需使用放大功能，應增加影像接收裝置與病人間距離。

questions.reference: Bushberg JT et al., The Essential Physics of Medical Imaging, 3rd Ed., Lippincott Williams & Wilkins, 2011. P.309-310
questions.explanation:
低畫面更新率脈衝式透視直接減少單位時間曝光。縮短X光管到病人皮膚距離增加皮膚劑量(B)、放大時應縮短接收器與病人距離(C)、應使用X光濾片減低能光子劑量(D)。

見 [[fluoroscopy-radiation-safety]]

questions.questionText: 在放射診斷的X光能量範圍內，下列哪個效應是X光光子與軟組織間之主要作用(interaction)方式?
questions.reference: Bushberg JT et al., The Essential Physics of Medical Imaging, 3rd Ed., Lippincott Williams & Wilkins, 2011. P.38-39
questions.explanation:
診斷X光能量範圍與軟組織作用主要為康普頓散射。光電效應於低能/高原子序顯著、瑞利散射佔少數、成對發生需>1.022 MeV遠超診斷範圍。

見 [[xray-tissue-interactions]]

questions.questionText: Which of the description about retropharyngeal abscess is wrong?

options.text: Retropharyngeal abscesses in children commonly result from suppurative lymphadenitis associated with tonsillitis, as well as with sinonasal and dental infections.
The retropharyngeal space was the most common location of abscess in the deep neck and second most common location was the peritonsillar space.
Abscesses extending below the T4 vertebra cause concern with regard to danger space infections, which have a high rate of morbidity.
Grisel syndrome is inflammation-induced laxity of the atlantoaxial joint, which may result in atlantoaxial rotatory subluxation.

questions.reference: Caffey's Pediatric Diagnostic Imaging 12th ed. P137-138
questions.explanation:
Tonsillitis and peritonsillar abscess are the most commonly encountered deep neck infections, among adolescents and young adults, with peritonsillar abscess accounting for one-third of all soft-tissue abscesses of the head and neck. 咽後間隙非最常見。

見 [[retropharyngeal-abscess]]

questions.questionText: A 2-year-old infant presents with a history of developmental delay, seizures and subcutaneous lesions. The clinicians suspect tuberous sclerosis. Which one of the following radiological findings are consistent with this diagnosis?
questions.reference: Pediatric Imaging: The Essentials (2016) p.405-408
questions.explanation:
鈣化室管膜下結節為TSC典型中樞神經影像。leptomeningeal angiomas=Sturge-Weber、multiple meningiomas=NF2、pilocytic astrocytoma=NF1、retinoblastoma皆非TSC。

見 [[tuberous-sclerosis]]

questions.questionText: 關於slipped capital femoral epiphysis (SCFE)何者為非?

options.text: Obesity is a significant risk factor.
SCFE is essentially a type I Salter-Harris growth plate injury
line of Klein is helpful for diagnosis

questions.reference: Boles CA, El-khoury GY. Slipped capital femoral epiphysis. Radiographics. 17 (4): 809-23.
questions.explanation:
SCFE男孩多於女孩(more common in boys than girls)。肥胖為重要危險因子、本質為Salter-Harris第一型生長板損傷、Klein線有助診斷皆為正確。

見 [[slipped-capital-femoral-epiphysis]]

questions.questionText: 關於Perthes disease何者為非?

options.text: An idiopathic avascular necrosis (AVN) of the femoral epiphysis seen in children.
coxa magna present in the late stage of disease
MRI can help early diagnosis, before the onset of x-ray findings

questions.reference: Dillman JR, Hernandez RJ. MRI of Legg-Calve-Perthes disease. Am J Roentgenol. 2009;193 (5): 1394-407.
questions.explanation:
Boys are five times more likely to be affected than girls. Perthes disease男孩多於女孩(約5倍)。

見 [[sufe-vs-perthes-disease]]

questions.questionText: Which is true for Le Fort I fracture?

options.text: Fracture of the inferior orbital rim.
Fracture of anterolateral margin of the nasal cavity.

questions.reference: How to simplify the CT diagnosis of Le Fort fracture. AJR 2005;184:1700-1705.
questions.explanation:
Le Fort I為水平上頜骨折(floating palate)，骨折線通過齒槽脊、鼻腔外側壁(鼻腔前外側緣/梨狀孔)、上頜竇下壁。A鼻額縫=III、B下眶緣=II、C顴弓=ZMC非Le Fort。

見 [[le-fort-fracture]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is thought to have different embryonic origin from the rest?
questions.reference: Chapter 27, Imaging of the brain. Elsevier/Saunders, Philadelphia
questions.explanation:
A, B, D為endodermal origin；dermoid cyst為先天性包涵囊(畸胎瘤性、含發育成熟實質組織)，胚胎來源不同。

見 [[intracranial-cystic-lesions]]

questions.questionText: Which of the followings is not reducing radiation exposure of the patient during angiography?

options.text: Minimize the use of geometric magnification
Keep filming rates as low as possible.

questions.reference: Practical neuroangiography (2nd Edition); page 107
questions.explanation:
官方標示答案A。⚠️惟增加濾片(beam filtration)通常會降低病人劑量，此標示物理上存疑；B減少幾何放大、C盡量準直、D降低攝影張數皆明確降劑量。待醫師確認。

見 [[fluoroscopy-radiation-safety]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following MR imaging technique or image is the BEST for differentiating Epidermoid cyst and Arachnoid cyst located in the cerebellar pontine angle cistern?
questions.reference: Expert Differential Diagnosis: Brain and Spine 2009 1st edition, Section 4, page 28.
questions.explanation:
epidermoid cyst於DWI呈高訊號(限制擴散)，arachnoid cyst隨CSF無限制擴散，DWI為兩者鑑別最佳序列。

見 [[intracranial-cystic-lesions]]

questions.questionText: 關於hemichorea hemiballism syndrome，下列敘述何者有誤?

options.text: Usually due to nonketotic hyperglycemia secondary to diabetes mellitus.
Generally unilateral affecting caudate nucleus and putamen
Hypodensity on non-contrast CT, hyperintensity on T1WI
Causes of MR abnormalities: presence of gemistocytes, microbleeds, calcium, demyelination, macrophages

questions.reference: Hemichorea-hemiballism: an explanation for MR signal changes. Shan, D M Ho, C Chang, H C Pan and M M Teng. American Journal of Neuroradiology May 1998, 19 (5) 863-870
questions.explanation:
非顯影CT應為高密度(hyperdense in non contrast CT)，非低密度(T1WI高訊號正確)。

見 [[hemichorea-hemiballism]]

questions.questionText: 關於青少年運動員的運動傷害，影像判讀的注意事項，以下敘述何者為非?

options.text: X光片可以探查到創傷性骨折，但是無法看出chronic overuse、infection、inflammation、或neoplasm的線索
輕微的physeal widening可歸因於acute Salter-Harris fracture或chronic overuse；與對側關節的比較和追蹤X光片的變化能夠幫助診斷
雙側關節的影像對稱並無法保證毫無異常，尤其像是體操選手的手腕和長跑選手的下肢
MRI的fluid-sensitive sequences尤其是STIR與T2WI fat saturated影像可以偵測出未成年孩童的physeal & epiphyseal injuries

questions.reference: Radiology. 2017 Jul; 284(1):25-42. Sports and Growing Musculoskeletal System: Sports Imaging Series.
questions.explanation:
X光片亦能提供chronic overuse/感染/發炎/腫瘤之線索(骨膜反應、生長板變化等)，非僅能看創傷性骨折，此敘述為非。

見 [[pediatric-sports-injury-imaging]]

questions.questionText: 有關spondyloarthropathy，下列何者為非?

options.text: Spondyloarthropathy的定義涵蓋一大群慢性發炎的風濕免疫疾病，包括ankylosing spondylitis, reactive arthritis, arthritis or spondylitis associated with inflammatory bowel disease, psoriatic arthritis, 還有undifferentiated spondyloarthritis
在大多數的axial spondyloarthropathy疾病裡, sacroiliac joints是最常被攻擊的，sacroiliitis也是最初的表現
現今axial spondyloarthropathy已有anti-TNF藥物可供治療，但是疾病發作時往往X光片並無異常，目前的診斷主流已轉由MRI來做診斷標準
在sacroiliac joint，因為它的上背部屬於syndesmosis，而且iliac side的軟骨厚度較厚，所以在sacroiliitis發作時，sacral alae往往比較嚴重

questions.reference: Radiographics. 2013 Jul-Aug; 33(4):933-56. Sacroiliitis Associated with Axial Spondyloarthropathy: New Concepts and Latest Trends.
questions.explanation:
前方關節透明軟骨薦骨側較厚、髂骨側較薄；正因髂骨側軟骨薄，結構性變化從髂骨側開始且較嚴重(more profuse on iliac facet)。D之方向顛倒為非。

見 [[sacroiliitis-spondyloarthropathy]]

questions.questionText: In injuries of the knee, the medial meniscus is frequently torn because it is firmly attached to which structure?
questions.reference: University of Michigan Medical School, musculoskeletal quiz
questions.explanation:
內側半月板牢固附著於脛側副韌帶(tibial collateral ligament/MCL)，活動度低故受外力時易撕裂。

見 [[medial-meniscus-attachment]]

questions.questionText: While performing an arthrogram to study an apparent rotator cuff injury, it was noted that the contrast material had spread from the shoulder joint onto the anterior lateral surface of the scapula near the joint. When asked, the first year resident responded that this was due to an anterior tear in the cuff. Having just studied the shoulder joint you respond that the contrast is in a normal extension of the joint cavity called the:
questions.reference: University of Michigan Medical School, musculoskeletal quiz
questions.explanation:
subscapular bursa為盂肱關節腔之正常延伸(經關節囊纖維層開口相通)，非anterior cuff tear。

見 [[synovial-bursa-communication]]

questions.questionText: Which muscle contributes to the "rotator cuff"?
questions.reference: University of Michigan Medical School, musculoskeletal quiz
questions.explanation:
旋轉肌袖為SITS四肌(supraspinatus/infraspinatus/teres minor/subscapularis)。deltoid、latissimus dorsi、pectoralis minor、teres major皆非。

見 [[rotator-cuff-muscles]]

questions.questionText: About adrenal adenoma, which of the following is wrong?

options.text: Absolute percentage washout > 60% (at 15-min delayed enhanced CT images)
Signal drop on T1-weighted out-of-phase image

questions.reference: Radiology Review Manual 6th ed., p919; AJR 1998; 170(3), 747-752.
questions.explanation:
官方標示答案C，惟附註「錯在哪?」——四選項皆為腺瘤正確特徵(APW>60%高度提示腺瘤)，官方詳解自身存疑，可能為瑕疵題，待醫師確認。

見 [[adrenal-adenoma]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following may cause adrenal hemorrhage?
questions.reference: Radiology Review Manual 6th ed., p918
questions.explanation:
blunt abdominal trauma(成人單側最常見)、adrenal vein sampling、早產缺氧(新生兒)、潛在腎上腺腫瘤皆可造成腎上腺出血。

見 [[adrenal-imaging]]

questions.questionText: About varicocele, which of the following is wrong?

options.text: Varicocele is one of the causes of infertility.
Primary varicocele is most commonly located on the right side.
Varicocele may cause scrotal pain and swelling.
Venous valve incompetence is one of the cause of varicocele.

questions.reference: Radiology Review Manual 6th ed., p991
questions.explanation:
The left testicle is affected much more commonly (~85%) than the right，因左睪丸靜脈行程長、直角匯入左腎靜脈。孤立右側varicocele罕見，須評估次發性原因。

見 [[varicocele]]

questions.questionText: In a 67-year-old female patient with jaundice and gallbladder wall thickening on ultrasound scan, which feature on CT favors a diagnosis of xanthogranulomatous cholecystitis rather than gallbladder carcinoma?

options.text: intramural hypoattenuating nodules throughout the gallbladder

questions.reference: Chun KA, Ha KH, Yu ES, et al. Xanthogranulomatous cholecystitis: CT features with emphasis on differentiation from gallbladder carcinoma. Radiology 1997; 203: 93-7.
questions.explanation:
膽囊壁內低衰減結節(intramural hypoattenuating nodules，壁內肉芽腫/膿瘍)傾向XGC。其餘徵象於XGC與膽囊癌皆可見無法區分。

見 [[xanthogranulomatous-cholecystitis]]

questions.questionText: During MRCP, which substance may be administered to improve visualization of the pancreatic ducts?
questions.reference: Akisik MF, Sandrasegaran K, Aisen AA, et al. Dynamic secretin-enhanced MR cholangiopancreatography. Radiographics 2006; 26:665-77.
questions.explanation:
Secretin刺激胰管細胞分泌碳酸氫鹽液體使胰管充盈顯影。glucagon/Buscopan為抗蠕動劑、cholecystokinin刺激膽囊收縮、gastrin刺激胃酸，皆非使胰管顯影。

見 [[mrcp]]

questions.questionText: On contrast-enhanced CT of the abdomen, what is the most common abnormality of the spleen seen in sarcoidosis?
questions.reference: Warshauer DM, Lee JKT. Imaging manifestations of abdominal sarcoidosis AJR Am J Roentgenol 2004; 182: 15-28.
questions.explanation:
脾腫大(splenomegaly)為肉樣瘤病脾臟受累最常見之CT異常；多發低衰減結節具特徵性但較不常見。

見 [[abdominal-sarcoidosis]]

questions.questionText: In the staging of rectal cancer by MRI, which sequence provides optimum visualization of the tumour?
questions.reference: Hricak H, Husband J, Panicek DM, eds. Oncologic Imaging: Essentials of reporting common cancers. Philadelphia: Saunders, 2007; 30-1.
questions.explanation:
官方標示答案C(FLAIR)。惟直腸癌局部分期標準最佳序列為高解析度T2WI，FLAIR非直腸MRI常規分期序列、四選項亦無T2W，疑瑕疵題，待醫師對照原卷確認。

見 [[rectal-cancer-mri]]

questions.questionText: 以下選項何者錯誤?（含碘對比劑分類）

options.text: 以在水溶液中之分解為陽離子與陰離子與否及分子結構中之含苯環數目，分為四種：離子性單體型、離子性二聚體型、非離子性單體型及非離子性二聚體型對比劑。
以滲透壓分為高滲透壓、低滲透壓及等滲透壓對比劑。
離子性單體型及離子性二聚體型對比劑乃高滲透壓對比劑。
非離子性單體型為低滲透壓對比劑；非離子性二聚體型為等滲透壓對比劑，其滲透壓相近於人體血清之滲透壓。
目前台灣健保署已給付「電腦斷層造影及血管造影」使用之低滲透壓或非離子性含碘對比劑之費用。

questions.reference: 2017 中華民國放射線醫學會對比劑手冊, p.2
questions.explanation:
離子性單體型為高滲透壓(5-8x血漿)，但離子性二聚體型為低滲透壓(~2x血漿)，非高滲透壓，故C錯。

見 [[iodinated-contrast-media]]

questions.questionText: 以下選項何者錯誤?（含碘對比劑與甲狀腺核醫/放射碘時效）

options.text: 含碘對比劑注射後至少兩個月需避免甲狀腺核醫造影。
接受放射線碘-131治療者需至少在治療前一個月不曾使用含碘對比劑。
甲狀腺癌病人，如已計畫接受治療，需考慮使用含碘對比劑(口服或血管內注射)檢查之必要性，並考慮與開立檢查之醫師商議，是否不施行含碘對比劑檢查。
接受骨骼及紅血球核醫造影者需至少在造影前24小時避免使用含碘對比劑。(2020年已刪除)

questions.reference: 2017 中華民國放射線醫學會對比劑手冊, p.25
questions.explanation:
官方標示B(有爭議)：手冊建議放射碘-131治療者最好治療前『兩個月』內不曾使用含碘對比劑(非一個月)。時效性爭議，flag待醫師確認。

見 [[iodinated-contrast-media]]

questions.questionText: 關於含碘對比劑腎病變(contrast-induced nephropathy)，以下何者錯誤?

options.text: 對比劑腎病變是因施打含碘對比劑而造成的腎功能變差，其確切病生理學並不清楚。
在腎功能正常受檢者，使用常規診斷劑量(少於300ml或90grams含碘對比劑)時，對比劑之劑量與毒性之間並沒有相關連。
透析且無尿的受檢者接受含碘對比劑不會有額外腎損傷的風險，但受檢後需緊急洗腎。
大量高滲透壓的含碘對比劑可能造成透析且無尿的受檢者全身水腫及肺水腫。
對比劑腎病變之常用診斷標準為施打含碘對比劑三天內，在無其他原因下，腎功能變差達到血清肌酐(serum creatinine)增加0.5 mg/dL。

questions.reference: 2017 中華民國放射線醫學會對比劑手冊, p.18
questions.explanation:
透析無尿病人接受一般劑量IV含碘對比劑通常不需因此緊急洗腎，「受檢後需緊急洗腎」錯誤。

見 [[contrast-induced-aki]]

questions.questionText: 孕婦及哺乳婦女使用含釓對比劑，以下何者錯誤?

options.text: 加拿大安大略省2003-2015年大規模健保資料庫研究顯示孕婦在懷孕任一期間曾接受含釓對比劑者和胎兒之罕見病況如類NSF異常(包含免疫風濕、發炎、皮膚浸潤性病變等)以及死胎率及新生兒死亡率有相關性。
孕婦施行磁振造影時，需謹慎評估含釓對比劑注射之必要性及風險，並盡量避免含釓對比劑注射。
必須使用時，建議孕婦使用標準劑量之低風險之含釓對比劑。
哺乳婦女接受含釓對比劑後，24小時內乳汁中有微量(< 0.04%)含釓對比劑，而嬰兒從消化道只吸收小於1%之乳汁，估計進入嬰兒循環為原對比劑之0.0004%以下。
有研究報告指出分泌乳汁口感可能改變。

questions.reference: 2017 中華民國放射線醫學會對比劑手冊, p.37
questions.explanation:
必須使用時應使用達到診斷目的之最小劑量(非標準劑量)、並選低風險含釓造影劑；2020版建議孕婦除非有極強適應症否則不使用含釓對比劑。(詳解表格選項顯示低劑量但答案欄註記標準劑量，以答案欄邏輯為準)

見 [[contrast-media-safety]]

questions.questionText: 請問下列何者最不可能在影像中表現出左心室心肌肥厚的現象?
questions.reference: Diagnostic imaging, Cardiovascular. 2nd Edition
questions.explanation:
iron overload cardiomyopathy多描述為擴張型心肌病(左心室重塑併腔室擴大、LVEF下降)，非肥厚。

見 [[lv-hypertrophy-ddx]]

questions.questionText: 關於Hereditary haemorrhagic telangiectasia的描述，下列何者為非?

options.text: It may affect mucous membranes, skin, lung, brain, GI tract.
Up to 60% of patients with pulmonary AVMs have hereditary hemorrhagic telangiectasia.
Less than 10% of patients with hereditary hemorrhagic telangiectasia have pulmonary AVMs.

questions.reference: Dahnert W. Radiology review manual. Lippincott Williams & Wilkins. (2007); UpToDate.
questions.explanation:
at least half of HHT patients have pulmonary involvement；實際上至少一半HHT病人有肺部侵犯/PAVM，非少於10%。

見 [[hereditary-hemorrhagic-telangiectasia]]

questions.questionText: 有關Aortic stenosis (AS)，下列何者為非?

options.text: 好發於超過70歲以上老人。
Severe AS是指開口不超過100mm²，經常伴隨嚴重鈣化。
用電腦斷層評估狹窄程度時，需要用ECG-gated cardiac CTA，舒張期取像。
最新的治療技術是經皮穿刺以導管技術去放一個新的人造瓣膜TEVI。

questions.reference: Diagnostic Imaging Cardiovascular, p.I-2-8
questions.explanation:
CT評估瓣口應於收縮中期(midsystole，瓣膜開啟相對靜止)取像，非舒張期，故C錯。

見 [[aortic-stenosis]]

questions.questionText: 關於Myocarditis的敘述，何者為非?

options.text: Best imaging tool is cardiac MRI.
T2WI可以看見myocardial edema for three months.
疾病早期因inflammation，即可以看見post-contrast enhancement.
MRI的LGE (late Gd enhancement)常發生在心肌表層或中層(subepicardium or mid-wall) of inferior lateral wall of LV.

questions.reference: Diagnostic Imaging Cardiovascular, p.I-5-15
questions.explanation:
心肌水腫/發炎不會持續三個月(組織發炎不應超過2-3週、病毒清除數日內完成)，故B錯。

見 [[myocarditis-mri]]

questions.questionText: Which one of the followings is the wrong description about endoleak after endovascular aneurysmal repair?

options.text: Type 1 endoleak reaches the aneurysm around the end of stent graft
Type 2 endoleak reaches the aneurysm by retrograde flow through lumbar or inferior mesenteric branches
Type 3 endoleak reaches the aneurysm through a defect in the wall of stent-graft
Type 2 endoleak should be treated as soon as possible

questions.reference: Vascular Surgery, 7th edition, p1974
questions.explanation:
type II endoleak多為良性、常自行消退，僅在瘤囊持續增大(>5mm)時才介入，非「盡快治療」。

見 [[endoleak]]

questions.questionText: Which one of the following statements about Paget disease is wrong?

options.text: Paget disease is a rare malignancy of the breast characterized by infiltration of the nipple epidermis by adenocarcinoma cells.
More than 90% of cases of Paget disease are associated with an additional underlying breast malignancy.
Temporary resolution of the eczematous changes is possible with the application of topical corticosteroids.
Breast conservation therapy is not a treatment of choice for Paget disease.

questions.reference: Paget Disease of the Breast: Mammographic, US, and MR Imaging Findings with Pathologic Correlation. RadioGraphics 2011
questions.explanation:
隨MRI界定範圍，保乳治療(切除NAC+放療)已漸增使用，非「非治療選項」。

見 [[paget-disease-nipple]]

questions.questionText: Which of the followings about contrast-enhanced ultrasonography is wrong.

options.text: The contrast agent are microbubbles, composed by high-solubility gas surrounded by phospholipid shells.
The contrast agents are not nephrotoxic.
The enhancement after IV injection of the contrast agent may persist about 5 minutes.
The contrast agent can be injected into physiologic or pathologic cavities, for example, renal pelvis, biliary tracts, or even abscess cavity.

questions.reference: Contrast-enhanced US–guided Interventions: Improving Success Rate and Avoiding Complications Using US Contrast Agents. RadioGraphics 2017; 37:0001–0013
questions.explanation:
UCA微泡由低溶解度氣體(如sulfur hexafluoride六氟化硫)外包磷脂質殼組成，非高溶解度氣體，故A錯。

見 [[ceus-microbubble-agents]]

questions.questionText: Which of the followings about ultrasound transducer is wrong?

options.text: The transducers contain materials with piezoelectric properties, for example: lead zirconate titanate.
A thicker element produces a lower frequency oscillation while a thinner element produces a higher frequency oscillation
The phased array probes make image fields of curved shape at the top and also curved shape at the bottom.
To perform ultrasound exam of the thyroid gland needs high frequency probes, for example, frequency about 10 MHz.

questions.reference: Radiopaedia – Ultrasound transducer
questions.explanation:
phased array影像上緣與下緣形狀『不同』(上下緣形狀相同者為sequential array)，故C錯。

見 [[ultrasound-transducer-physics]]

questions.questionText: 某個側面胸部照射使用110 kVp/10 mAs，產生強度為32 mR的X光，如果將電壓改變成125 kVp時，其X光強度是?
questions.reference: 102年第一次專門職業及技術人員高等考試 放射師考試
questions.explanation:
X光強度與電壓平方成正比：32×(125/110)²≈41 mR。

見 [[xray-tube-output]]

questions.questionText: 下列何者為正確的輻射防護目的?

options.text: 輻射工作人員不得接受輻射劑量
抑低確定效應發生的機率

questions.reference: 102年第一次專門職業及技術人員高等考試 放射師考試
questions.explanation:
確定效應有閾值→防護目標為完全避免(防止發生確定效應)；機率效應無閾值只能限制發生率(C錯用防止)、確定效應為嚴重度隨劑量而非機率(B錯)、工作人員可在限值內接受劑量(A錯)。

見 [[radiation-deterministic-effects]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following about congenital posterior fossa abnormalities is wrong?

options.text: The cystic structure over posterior fossa of Dandy-Walker malformation is dilated fourth ventricle.
Blake pouch cyst is caused by lack of fenestration of the Blake pouch which communicated between fourth ventricle and subarachnoid space.
Rhombencephalosynapsis is characterized by absence of cerebellar vermis and leading to discontinuity of bilateral cerebellar hemispheres.
Hydrocephalus is less associated with mega cisterna megna.

questions.reference: Congenital Abnormalities of the Posterior Fossa. RadioGraphics 2015; 35:200–220.
questions.explanation:
rhombencephalosynapsis蚓部缺如導致雙側小腦半球『連續(continuity)』融合，非discontinuity，故C錯。

見 [[posterior-fossa-malformations]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following fracture is with highest susceptibility of child abuse?
questions.reference: The Radiographic Approach to Child Abuse. Clin Orthop Relat Res. 2011 Mar; 469(3): 776-789.
questions.explanation:
肩胛骨骨折(scapular fractures)屬高特異性受虐骨折。linear skull/long-bone shaft/digital fractures特異性較低。

見 [[child-abuse-imaging]]

questions.questionText: 關於胸腺瘤，下列何者錯誤?

options.text: 男性和女性的發生率相當

questions.reference: Radiology review manual 6th ed. P.537
questions.explanation:
The typical presentation is in the 5th to 6th decades, without gender predilection. 胸腺瘤好發於50-60歲成人，非青少年。

見 [[thymoma]]

questions.questionText: 關於Marfan syndrome，下列敘述何者為非?

options.text: Is a genetic disorder of connective tissue
Dilatation of the aortic root is the leading cause of aortic valve insufficiency
Stanford type A aortic dissection will not be found

questions.reference: Diagnostic Imaging Cardiovascular, p.II-4~37; http://pubs.rsna.org/doi/full/10.1148/rg.274065171
questions.explanation:
Marfan好發升主動脈/主動脈根部擴張，為Stanford type A(升主動脈)剝離之重要危險因子，故「不會出現type A剝離」錯誤。

見 [[marfan-syndrome]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following about adrenal infections is wrong?

options.text: The infection sources including tuberculosis, histoplasmosis, and blastomycosis.
Early stage infection presented as bilateral enlarged adrenal glands.
Chronic infection may cause adrenal gland atrophy, but never calcification.

questions.reference: RadioGraphics 2001; 21:995–1012
questions.explanation:
慢性腎上腺感染(尤其結核)可造成鈣化，「never calcification」錯誤。

見 [[adrenal-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following about gestational trophoblastic disease (GTD) is correct?

options.text: 46 chromosomes in partial hydatidiform mole (PHM), and 69 chromosomes in complete hydatidiform mole (CHM).
Both PHM and CHM are surrounding by myometrium, and myometrium is relatively low signal to the mass on T2WI.
Under ultrasonography, the CHM looks like a cluster of grapes, and some fetal parts may present in it.
Under contrast-enhanced CT, moles are strong hyperintensity mass than myometrium.

questions.reference: RadioGraphics 2017; 37:681–700
questions.explanation:
PHM與CHM皆被肌層包繞、肌層於T2WI相對mole呈低訊號。A染色體顛倒(CHM 46/PHM 69)、C(CHM胎兒部分應缺如)、D(CECT mole為低衰減併薄強化分隔非強強化)皆為偽。

見 [[gestational-trophoblastic-disease]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following about penile fracture is wrong?

options.text: Penile fracture is defined as rupture of tunica albuginea and corpus spongiosum.
The common mechanism is impulsion with high intracorpus pressure and rupture happened.
The characteristic of penile fracture in MRI is discontinuity of the low-signal-intensity tunica albuginea.
Urethral involvement is often with higher rate of complication.

questions.reference: MR Image of Acute Penile Fracture. RadioGraphics 2000; 20:1397–1405
questions.explanation:
陰莖骨折為rupture of corpus cavernosum及其tunica albuginea，非corpus spongiosum，故A錯。

見 [[penile-fracture]]

questions.questionText: About MRI of prostate gland, which of the following is correct?

options.text: To define the junction of peripheral zone and transitional zone, T1WI has higher resolution than T2WI.
Focal areas of low intensity in peripheral zone in T2WI are always cancer.
When performing dynamic contrast-enhancing MRI of prostate, fast T1-weighted sequence has higher spatial resolution than slow T1-weighted sequence.
On ADC maps, prostate cancer often shows lower ADC than the surrounding healthy peripheral zone tissue.

questions.reference: Radiology: Volume 261: Number 1—October 2011
questions.explanation:
攝護腺癌於ADC map呈較周邊帶健康組織更低之ADC。A(應為T2WI高空間解析度)、B(PZ的T2低訊號不一定是癌)、C(DCE快速T1強調時間解析度非空間解析度)皆為偽。

見 [[prostate-mri]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following about retroperitoneal fibrosis is wrong?

options.text: About 56-100% of idiopathic retroperitoneal fibrosis cases will suffer from obstructive uropathy.
In T1WI, the fibrosis area is low signal intensity. After administration of gadolinium contrast material, some early soft-tissue enhancement may happen.
Carcinoid tumor can induce retroperitoneal fibrosis without direct metastasizing to the retroperitoneal area.
In benign retroperitoneal fibrosis, anterior displacement of aorta and IVC is usually seen.

questions.reference: RadioGraphics 2013; 33:535–552
questions.explanation:
良性RPF為浸潤性包繞而非移位，貼脊椎不前抬主動脈；主動脈前移(floating aorta sign)反而提示惡性/淋巴瘤，故D錯。

見 [[retroperitoneal-fibrosis]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following about scrotal emergencies is correct?

options.text: The epididymal tail is caudal to the epididymal head, and when epididymitis happened, the tail will be involved early than head.
The term "Fournier's gangrene" only can be used in male.
To initial evaluation of scrotal trauma, the MRI is better than the ultrasonography.
Males who with bell-clapper deformity of the testicle will never suffer from testicular torsion.

questions.reference: RadioGraphics 2013; 33:721–740
questions.explanation:
附睪尾位於附睪頭尾側，附睪炎多由尾部開始較頭部早受累。Fournier gangrene非男性專屬(B錯)、陰囊外傷首選超音波非MRI(C錯)、bell-clapper deformity為扭轉危險因子非「不會扭轉」(D錯)。

見 [[scrotal-emergencies]]

questions.questionText: Which statement of solid pseudopapillary tumor of pancreas is wrong?

options.text: Greater predilection location at pancreatic head and body.
Tend to present at young female.

questions.reference: 放射科基本學理; radiopaedia.org/articles/solid-pseudopapillary-tumour-of-the-pancreas-1
questions.explanation:
There is a greater predilection to occur at pancreatic tail. SPN好發於胰尾，非頭/體，故C錯。

見 [[solid-pseudopapillary-neoplasm]]

questions.questionText: Which statement of innominate artery compression syndrome artery is wrong?

options.text: Also known as brachiocephalic artery compression syndrome.
May cause tracheal stenosis in pediatrics.
Suggested surgical repair if tracheal luminal stenosis exceeds 70% in symptomatic patients.

questions.reference: 放射科基本學理/Radiopaedia; radiopaedia.org/articles/innominate-artery-compression-syndrome
questions.explanation:
A/B/C皆為正確描述(別名brachiocephalic artery compression syndrome、嬰幼兒可致氣管狹窄、症狀性氣管狹窄>70%建議手術修補)，故答案為D none of above(無錯誤選項)。

見 [[innominate-artery-compression]]

questions.questionText: Which one is the predisposing factor of contrast-induced nephropathy :
questions.reference: 放射科基本學理
questions.explanation:
congestive heart failure、liver cirrhosis、dehydration皆為CIN易感因子(併既存腎功能不全為最重要因子)。

見 [[contrast-induced-aki]]

questions.questionText: According to Fleischner 2017 guideline for pulmonary nodules, which statement is wrong?

options.text: High risk of malignancy included non-upper lobe location.
Suggest apply for subjects 35 y/o or older.
Single solid nodule and sized < 6mm with low risk could accept no routine follow up.

questions.reference: Fleischner 2017 guideline
questions.explanation:
上肺葉位置(upper lobe location)才是惡性高風險因子，非「非上肺葉」，故A錯。

見 [[fleischner-pulmonary-nodule]]

questions.questionText: Which one is the common tumor for anterior mediastinum?
questions.reference: 放射科基本學理
questions.explanation:
前縱膈常見腫瘤為4 T's：thymic tumor(胸腺瘤)、teratoma(畸胎瘤)、thyroid tumor(甲狀腺腫)、terrible lymphoma，故答案D all of above。

見 [[anterior-mediastinal-masses]]

questions.questionText: Which statement about male gynecomastia is wrong?

options.text: The most common male breast abnormality.
Presents as a soft mobile tender subareolar mass.
May be tender sensation at acute phase.

questions.reference: Radiopaedia; radiopaedia.org/articles/gynaecomastia
questions.explanation:
A(最常見男性乳房異常)、B(柔軟可移動觸痛之乳暈下腫塊)、C(急性期可有觸痛)皆正確，故答案D none of above。

見 [[gynecomastia-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Disregard of different pathologies, cardiac thrombi may occur in any cardiac chamber, which of the below descriptions about cardiac thrombi is not true?

options.text: It responsible for about 15% of all ischemic strokes
Artificial devices(e.g pacemakers) is a leading risk factor
Crescent-shape thrombi located next to infarct or abnormal myocardial wall segments.
All of the cardiac thrombi are round or oval in appearance.

questions.reference: Multi-slice and Dual-source CT in Cardiac Imaging (Bernd M. Ohnesorge) P291 7.12.3.2; Direct Diagnosis in Radiology-Cardiac Imaging (C.D Claussen) P140
questions.explanation:
鄰近梗塞或異常心肌壁之附壁血栓常呈新月形(crescent-shape)，非全為圓/卵圓形，故D不正確。

見 [[cardiac-thrombus]]

questions.questionText: Which statement is false for Ulcerative Colitis:

options.text: Colon may appear smooth, tubular, with loss of usual transverse folds and haustra.

questions.reference: Expertddx series – Abdomen (Michael P. Federle), Section 7, page 26
questions.explanation:
官方標示答案D(Results in neuromuscular damage)但附註「A?」。A/B/C皆為慢性burned-out UC正確影像描述；D之機轉描述存疑，flag待醫師對照原卷。

見 [[inflammatory-bowel-disease]]

questions.questionText: 關於 Normal pregnancy 與 ectopic pregnancy 的描述下列何者錯誤?

options.text: In normal pregnancy, β-HCG level doubles every 48-72 hours until it reaches 10,000-20,000mIU/mL.
If serum β-HCG level was 1600 mIU/mL and no gestational sac within the uterus seen under abdominal ultrasonography, normal pregnancy could be excluded.
Direct sign of ectopic pregnancy on CT or MR is ectopic gestational sac.
Indirect signs of ectopic pregnancy on CT or MR include adnexal hematoma, hemosalpinx and hemoperitoneum.

questions.reference: Ectopic pregnancy, UpToDate, eMedicine
questions.explanation:
腹部超音波判別區約6000-6500 mIU/mL，β-HCG 1600遠低於此門檻，未見妊娠囊不能排除正常懷孕，故B錯。(transvaginal判別區1500-1800)

見 [[ectopic-pregnancy]]

questions.questionText: Which one listed below about the descriptions of ureteritis cystica is not true?

options.text: The lesion is a malignant condition has high potential for degeneration.
Related to transformation of the epithelial nest of Brunn.

questions.reference: Diagnostic Imaging—Abdomen—by Michael P. Federle-AMIRSYS, III:4-10 to III:4-11
questions.explanation:
Ureteritis cystica為良性黏膜下多發小囊病變(非惡性、無高度惡性轉化潛能)，故選項2為非。

見 [[ureteritis-cystica]]

questions.questionText: Concerning hemimegalencephaly, which of the followings is INCORRECT?

options.text: defect of cellular organization and neuronal migration
enlargement of a part or all of a hemisphere
decreased signal of white matter on T1-weighted MR images caused by reduced myelination

questions.reference: Diagnostic Imaging: Pediatric Neuroradiology (2007) by A. James Barkovich, Kevin R. Moore, Blaise V. Jones, et al. P.20-23
questions.explanation:
hemimegalencephaly因加速髓鞘化，白質於T1呈增高訊號、CT值增高(非減少)，故D不正確。

見 [[hemimegalencephaly]]
