questions.questionText: The most common extracranial solid neoplasm in children is:
questions.reference: Radiol Clin N Am 49 2011;49:711-727
questions.explanation:
Neuroblastoma為最常見兒童顱外實質腫瘤(第三常見兒童癌症，次於白血病與腦瘤)。

見 [[pediatric-neuroblastic-tumors]]

questions.questionText: Which of the followings is not the medullary neoplasm of adrenal glands in children?
questions.reference: Radiol Clin N Am 49 2011;49:711-727
questions.explanation:
Teratoma為生殖細胞腫瘤，非腎上腺髓質/神經母細胞腫瘤。neuroblastoma/ganglioneuroblastoma/ganglioneuroma皆為neuroblastic(髓質)腫瘤譜系。

見 [[pediatric-neuroblastic-tumors]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following statements about adrenocortical tumor of adrenal gland in children is false?

options.text: Most of the patients are below 5 years old.
Most of the patients are hormone active.
Most associated with Beckwith-Wiedemann syndrome, Li-Fraumen syndrome (mutation of p53 tumor supressor gene) & developmental abnormalities of urinary tract

questions.reference: Radiol Clin N Am 49 2011;49:711-727
questions.explanation:
兒童腎上腺皮質腫瘤好發年輕女性(predominance in young female)，非男性，故C為false。

見 [[adrenocortical-carcinoma]]

questions.questionText: The most common incidental adrenal mass in children is:
questions.reference: Radiol Clin N Am 49 2011;49:711-727
questions.explanation:
Neuroblastoma為最常見兒童偶見腎上腺腫塊。

見 [[pediatric-neuroblastic-tumors]]

questions.questionText: 下列何者為Kienböck disease在MRI的表現?

options.text: Scaphoid, low signal on T1 and T2
Scaphoid, low signal on T1 and high signal on T2
Lunate, low signal on T1 and T2
Lunate, low signal on T1 and high signal on T2

questions.reference: Musculoskeletal MRI, Second Edition, CH12, p264
questions.explanation:
Kienböck disease為月狀骨(lunate)缺血性壞死，進展期T1與T2皆呈低訊號。Preiser disease才是舟狀骨(scaphoid)AVN。

見 [[kienbock-disease]]

questions.questionText: 下列關於Gamekeeper's Thumb敘述何者錯誤?

options.text: Abduction injury to the first metacarpophalangeal joint
May injure the ulnar collateral ligament
Stener lesion means ulnar collateral ligament is retracted proximally and displaced superficial to the abductor aponeurosis
Stener lesion prevents healing and lead to chronic laxity, loss of grip, and degenerative joint disease.

questions.reference: Musculoskeletal MRI, Second Edition, CH 12, p253
questions.explanation:
應為adductor aponeurosis(內收肌腱膜)，非abductor(外展肌腱膜)，故C錯。

見 [[gamekeeper-thumb]]

questions.questionText: 下列關於Sclerosing Bone Dysplasias何者錯誤?

options.text: Osteopoikilosis shows numerous small foci of sclerotic bone in medullary cavity
Osteopathia striata shows linear pattern of medullary sclerosis and adjacent soft tissues
Melorheostosis means bone formation is along the cortex and/or adjacent soft tissues
The three type of Sclerosing Bone Dysplasias mention above can appear together in mixed patterns

questions.reference: Problem Solving in Musculoskeletal Imaging, CH6, p267-268
questions.explanation:
Osteopathia striata僅呈線狀髓質硬化條紋，不侵犯鄰近軟組織(軟組織受累為melorheostosis特徵)，故B錯。

見 [[sclerosing-bone-dysplasias]]

questions.questionText: 關於髓質空洞與尿路攝影顯影，下列何者錯誤?

options.text: Medullary cavities resulting from papillary necrosis fill with contrast at retrograde pyelography.
Medullary cavities resulting from papillary necrosis fill with contrast at antegrade pyelography.
Cavities presenting with medullary sponge kidney opacify during retrograde pyelography
Cavities presenting with medullary sponge kidney opacify during antegrade pyelography

questions.reference: Genitourinary Imaging: The Requisites, CH2 p57
questions.explanation:
海綿腎之擴張集尿小管於排泄性/順行(antegrade)尿路攝影顯影(firework/paintbrush)，非逆行(retrograde)，故C錯。

見 [[medullary-sponge-kidney]]

questions.questionText: Which uterus anomaly is associated with in utero diethylstilbestrol (DES) exposure?
questions.reference: Genitourinary Imaging: The Requisites, CH7, p260
questions.explanation:
子宮內DES暴露特徵為T形子宮腔(T-shaped endometrial cavity)。didelphys/bicornuate為融合缺陷、MRKH為Müllerian發育不全，皆非DES相關。

見 [[uterine-mullerian-anomalies]]

questions.questionText: Which one of the following usually involves the proximal small bowel?
questions.reference: Herlinger H, Ekberg OT. Other Inflammatory Conditions of the Small Bowel. In: Gore RM, Levine MS, eds. Gastrointestinal Radiology, 2nd ed. Philadelphia: W.B. Saunders 2000; 746-758
questions.explanation:
Giardiasis好發十二指腸-空腸(近端小腸)。lymphoma好發迴腸、Yersinia好發末端迴腸。

見 [[small-bowel-disease-distribution]]

questions.questionText: The small bowel feces sign suggests which of the following diagnoses?
questions.reference: Fuchsjager MH. The small-bowel feces sign. Radiology. 2002;225(2):378-9.
questions.explanation:
小腸糞便徵(腔內氣泡混雜微粒狀物質)提示低度/亞急性小腸阻塞。

見 [[small-bowel-obstruction-ct]]

questions.questionText: Concerning Meckel's diverticula, which one of the following is true?

options.text: Usually asymptomatic in the first years of life
Tc99m scintigraphy is 20-30% sensitive in detecting gastrointestinal bleeding.

questions.reference: Thurley PD, Halliday KE, Somers JM et-al. Radiological features of Meckel's diverticulum and its complications. Clin Radiol. 2009;64(2):109-18.
questions.explanation:
Diverticulitis為已知併發症。為真性diverticulum(非false)、Meckel scan對出血敏感度兒童85%/成人54%(非20-30%)。

見 [[meckel-diverticulum]]

questions.questionText: Concerning focal nodular hyperplasia, which of the following is an atypical feature?

options.text: Isodensity to the liver on unenhanced and portal venous phase images

questions.reference: Grazioli L, Morana G, Kirchin MA et-al. Accurate differentiation of focal nodular hyperplasia from hepatic adenoma at gadobenate dimeglumine-enhanced MR imaging: prospective study. Radiology. 2005;236(1):166-77.
questions.explanation:
Discontinuous peripheral enhancement為非典型FNH特徵(典型為動脈期均質高強化，不連續周邊強化偏向hemangioma)。

見 [[fnh]]

questions.questionText: 下列何種非pulmonary alveolar microlithiasis的特色?
questions.reference: Thoracic Imaging. P507
questions.explanation:
PAM為雙側中下肺野為主分布，非上肺(apical predominance為metastatic pulmonary calcification特徵)。

見 [[pulmonary-alveolar-microlithiasis]]

questions.questionText: 以下何者不是好發在anterior mediastinum (cardiophrenic angle)?
questions.reference: Thoracic Imaging. P214
questions.explanation:
Neurogenic tumor好發於後縱膈(脊椎旁溝)，非前縱膈/心膈角。pericardial cyst/Morgagni hernia/lymph node masses皆好發於心膈角。

見 [[anterior-mediastinal-masses]]

questions.questionText: A proved non-small cell lung cancer which is 5.1cm in size with visceral pleural involvement and ipsilateral mediastinal lymphadenopathy. What is the TNM staging? (No definite distant metastasis)
questions.reference: AJCC, 7th, lung cancer stage
questions.explanation:
官方依AJCC 7th答B(T2N2)：5.1cm於7th為T2b、同側縱膈LN為N2。AJCC 8th中5.1cm(>5cm)為T3→T3N2(答案C)。時效雙層，flag。

見 [[lung-cancer-tnm-staging]]

questions.questionText: 下列何者不會造成cavitating lung nodule?
questions.reference: Radiology Review Mannual. P.428
questions.explanation:
Lipoid pneumonia多呈含脂肪實質化腫塊，通常不形成空洞。TB/septic emboli/Wegener granulomatosis皆為典型空洞成因。

見 [[cavitary-lung-lesions]]

questions.questionText: 下列何者不是allergic bronchopulmonary aspergillosis的表現?
questions.reference: Radiology Review Mannual. P.466
questions.explanation:
ABPA為中央性(central)支氣管擴張，非周邊。

見 [[allergic-bronchopulmonary-aspergillosis]]

questions.questionText: Which one is true about cardiooncology?

options.text: Cardiotoxicity induced by chemotherapy has been classified into two groups: Type I is related to oxidative with irreversible response ex: anthracyclines; Type II is related to the inhibition of ErbB2 pathway with reversible response, ex: trastuzumab.
3D-STE had significantly reduced global longitudinal strain (GLS) and torsion and greater systolic dys-synchrony index.
Cardiac Magnetic Resonance provide perform a tissue characterization, identifying fibrosis and edema of both early and late stage of cardiotoxicity.
Myocardial biopsy is still considered the most accurate and specific method in identifying the myocardial damage induced by chemotherapy
All of the above is true.

questions.reference: Multimodality Imaging in Cardiooncology, Pizzino F et al. Journal of Oncology Volume 2015
questions.explanation:
四項皆正確：Type I/II心毒性分類、3D-STE GLS/torsion下降、CMR組織特徵化、心肌切片最準確特異。

見 [[cardiooncology-imaging]]

questions.questionText: About the pediatric liver tumor, which the following description is CORRECT?

options.text: Mesenchymal hamartoma of the liver is the most common benign liver mass in children.
Fine needle biopsy is necessary for diagnosis of Infantile hemangioendothelioma.
Hepatocellular adenomas are usually asymptomatic or present with an abdominal mass.
Serum AFP levels are usually elevation in pediatric liver tumors.

questions.reference: Chung EM et al. From the archives of the AFIP: Pediatric liver masses: radiologic-pathologic correlation part 1. Benign tumors. Radiographics. 2010 May;30(3):801-26.
questions.explanation:
Hepatocellular adenomas通常無症狀或以腹部腫塊表現。mesenchymal hamartoma為第二常見(非最常見)、infantile hemangioendothelioma不需FNA、AFP非皆升高。

見 [[pediatric-liver-tumors]]

questions.questionText: About the lesions in the presacral region in children, which the following description is CORRECT?

options.text: Sacrococcygeal germ cell tumors are malignant germ cell tumors.
Anterior sacral meningocele is most common type of congenital spinal meningocoele. It may occur as part of ASP triad (anorectal malformation, sacrococcygeal osseous defect, and presacral mass).
Tailgut cysts only manifested in childhood.
Cystic lymphatic malformations usually appear as fluid-fluid level and heterogeneous high signal intensity on T2-weighted images

questions.reference: Kocaoglu M, et al. Pediatric presacral masses. Radiographics. 2006.May-Jun;26(3):833-57. Review.
questions.explanation:
Anterior sacral meningocele為最常見先天脊椎脊膜膨出、可為ASP/Currarino triad一部分。SC-GCT多為良性teratoma、tailgut cyst可任何年齡、cystic lymphatic malformation為均質高T2。

見 [[pediatric-presacral-masses]]

questions.questionText: About Hereditary Renal Cystic Disorders, which the following description is CORRECT?

options.text: Multiple and/or bilateral macroscopic renal cysts is never occur in the autosomal dominant polycystic kidney disease (ADPKD) while pediatric period.
The cysts in Autosomal Recessive Polycystic Kidney Disease (ARPKD) are more often complicated by hemorrhage than in ADPKD.
Tuberous Sclerosis Complex represent a heterogeneous group of hereditary neurocutaneous multisystem disorders that commonly affect tissues of ectodermal origin (eg, the CNS, eyes, and skin).
Renal cell carcinoma associated with von Hippel-Lindau syndrome is commonly multifocal, may be bilateral, with a competely cystic appearance.

questions.reference: Dillman JR et al. Hereditary Renal Cystic Disorders: Imaging of the Kidneys and Beyond. Radiographics. 2017 May-Jun;37(3).
questions.explanation:
TSC為侵犯外胚層來源組織(CNS/眼/皮膚)之神經皮膚多系統疾病。ADPKD兒童期可出現囊腫、ARPKD囊腫較ADPKD較少併出血/感染。

見 [[hereditary-renal-cystic-disorders]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is not correct about Dandy-Walker Malformation?

options.text: The most common posterior fossa malformation and typically occurs only sporadically, with a low overall risk of recurrence (1%-5%).
The majority of patients with DWM present before 1 year of age with signs and symptoms of increased intracranial pressure.
The key neuroimaging features of DWM are hypoplasia of the cerebellar vermis and dilatation of the cystic-appearing fourth ventricle.
Microcephaly is the most common manifestation, affecting 90%-100% of children during the first months of life.

questions.reference: RadioGraphics 2015; 35:200-220
questions.explanation:
應為Macrocephaly(巨頭)影響90%-100%嬰兒，非microcephaly。

見 [[posterior-fossa-malformations]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is not correct about Moyamoya Disease?

options.text: Progressive occlusion of the terminal segments of the intracranial internal carotid arteries and compensatory development of tortuous, dilated collateral networks.
Moyamoya vessels depict signal voids within the basal ganglia and thalami.
On T2WI, diffuse leptomeningeal collateral vessels may appear as sulcal hyperintensity ("ivy sign")
SW imaging may depict microbleeding in 15%-44% of patients.

questions.reference: RadioGraphics 2014; 34:873-894
questions.explanation:
Ivy sign見於FLAIR及T1增強後(高溝狀訊號)，非典型T2WI。

見 [[moyamoya-disease]]

questions.questionText: Select the one wrong statement about Sturge-Weber syndrome from the list below:

options.text: Blood is shunted through deep collateral to the superficial venous system.
It is characterized by thickened dipole.
It has hypointense subcortical zone on T2-weighted imaging.

questions.reference: ASNR Core Curriculum Course 1995, P.23
questions.explanation:
實際為淺層皮質靜脈缺如、血流改由深部靜脈引流擴大(absent superficial cortical veins with abnormal enlarged deep venous drainage)，方向相反。

見 [[sturge-weber-syndrome]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following venous pathways is not a common outflow connection for arterialized flow in patients with carotid-cavernous fistula?
questions.reference: ASNR Core Curriculum Course 1994, P.49
questions.explanation:
Thalamostriate vein屬深部腦靜脈系統，非CCF常見外流路徑。inferior petrosal sinus/superficial sylvian cortical veins/pterygoid venous plexus皆為常見外流路徑。

見 [[carotid-cavernous-fistula]]

questions.questionText: The term "fogging of a cerebral infarction" refers to:

options.text: Difficulty in diagnosing an infarction on CT scans within the first 24 hours.
The loss in T2 signal on MR or hypoattenuation on CT during the second week post-ictus.
Diffuse parenchymal enhancement of the brain following transient occlusion a cerebral vessel with reperfusion

questions.reference: ASNR Core Curriculum Course 1994, P.62
questions.explanation:
亞急性期(約發病第2週)梗塞區於CT呈一過性等密度、MR T2訊號一過性減低而看似消失。

見 [[cerebral-infarction-evolution]]

questions.questionText: Which is not present in neuropsychiatric systemic lupus erythematosus?
questions.reference: Diagnostic Imaging, Brain, I-4-64
questions.explanation:
Brain abscess非ACR NPSLE定義項目(雖可因心臟瓣膜黴菌性栓子續發)。new infarcts/focal hyperintensity/extensive reversible white matter change皆為NPSLE表現。

見 [[neuropsychiatric-sle]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following pathologic characteristics is the hallmark of Paget disease of bone?
questions.reference: Imaging of Paget disease of bone and its musculoskeletal complications: review. AJR Integrative Imaging 2011;196（2018 交換考題詳解 p.342 引用）
questions.explanation:
Paget disease of bone 的病理標誌為**異常的骨吸收與骨再形成（abnormal bone resorption and apposition）**——破骨與成骨活性皆增加但失序，形成結構紊亂脆弱的織狀骨（woven bone）。故非單純骨吸收增加（A）、大量新骨形成（B）或代償形成優質骨（D）。

見 [[paget-disease-bone]]

questions.questionText: About testicular cancer, which one is **correct**?

options.text: Testicular seminoma is the most common subtype of testicular cancer.
Testicular seminoma is highly curable even at advanced stages. The most common stage at presentation is stage I disease.
At Doppler US, seminoma demonstrates increased vascularity compared with adjacent normal testis.

questions.reference: Radiographics 2017;37:1085-1098（2018 交換考題詳解 p.345 引用）
questions.explanation:
**All of the above（D）**——精細胞瘤（seminoma）為睪丸癌最常見亞型（A對）；即使晚期仍高度可治癒，最常見表現期別為第一期疾病（B對）；杜卜勒超音波上相對於鄰近正常睪丸組織呈血流增加（C對），三者皆正確。

見 [[testicular-seminoma]]

questions.questionText: About PET imaging in prostate cancer, which one is **correct**?

options.text: FDG is limited because of the relatively low glucose metabolism of most prostate tumors.
FDG may have a role in response assessment of osseous disease in metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer and as a prognostic indicator.
11C-Choline and 18F-choline are sensitive and specific for disease detection in high-risk staging and biochemical relapse after radical therapy in patients with high PSA levels.

questions.reference: Radiographics 2017;37（2018 交換考題詳解 p.346 引用）
questions.explanation:
**All of the above（D）**——FDG因多數攝護腺腫瘤葡萄糖代謝相對較低而受限（A對）；FDG於轉移性去勢抗性攝護腺癌骨骼病灶之治療反應評估與預後判斷仍有角色（B對）；11C/18F-choline PET/CT對高風險分期與生化復發偵測敏感且特異（C對），三者皆正確。

見 [[pet-prostate-cancer]]

questions.questionText: Concerning congenital ureteropelvic junction (UPJ) obstruction, which one of the following is **TRUE**?

options.text: It is an uncommon cause of hydronephrosis in children.
Urinary tract infection is the most common presentation.
Females and males are affected equally.
The presence of crossing vessels decreases the success rate of pyeloplasty.

questions.reference: Herts BR. Helical CT and CT angiography for the identification of crossing vessels at the ureteropelvic junction. Urol Clin North Am 1998;25(2):259-269；Davidson & Hartman, Radiology of the Kidney and Urinary Tract；Sandler et al. Textbook of Uroradiology, 3rd ed.（2018 交換考題詳解 p.347 引用）
questions.explanation:
**The presence of crossing vessels decreases the success rate of pyeloplasty（D）**——crossing vessel 僅見於約 15%–20% 病例，但顯著降低 pyeloplasty 成功率，故多主張術前 CT 評估。A 誤（UPJ obstruction 為兒童 hydronephrosis **最常見**病因）；B 誤（最常以腹部腫塊/側腹痛/成長遲滯表現，UTI 非最常見）；C 誤（男性多於女性約 2:1）。

見 [[upj-obstruction]]

questions.questionText: Concerning adrenal adenomas, which one is **TRUE**?

options.text: They are a more common cause of adrenal mass than is metastatic disease.
They typically have non-IV contrast density of more than 20 Hounsfield units.
They typically show no decrease in signal intensity on opposed phase MR imaging.
They typically retain 90% of their immediate contrast value on 10-minute delayed CT exam.

questions.reference: Davidson & Hartman, Radiology of the Kidney and Urinary Tract；Sandler et al. Textbook of Uroradiology, 3rd ed.（2018 交換考題詳解 p.348 引用）
questions.explanation:
**They are a more common cause of adrenal mass than is metastatic disease（A）**——腺瘤為最常見腎上腺病灶（佔人口 2–8%），即使已知惡性者偶發腎上腺病灶仍較可能為腺瘤。B 誤（非顯影密度多 **<10 HU**，非 >20 HU）；C 誤（反相位 opposed-phase 訊號**下降**）；D 誤（10 分延遲 CT 約 **washout 50%**，非保留 90% 初始強化）。

見 [[adrenal-adenoma]]

questions.questionText: What's WRONG about the description of pancreatic cystic lesions?

options.text: Intraductal papillary mucinous neoplasm usually develops at pancreatic head and uncinate process.
Mucinous cystadenoma has a predilection of location at the tail portion with male predominance.
A microcystic lesion with central fibrous scar and calcifications are typical serous cystadenoma.
Neuroendocrine tumor or ductal adenocarcinoma can also present with central cystic change.

questions.explanation:
**Mucinous cystadenoma... tail portion with male predominance（B）**為錯——mucinous cystadenoma 雖好發胰體尾，但為**女性優勢（female predominance）**，非男性。IPMN好發胰頭與鉤突(A對)、serous cystadenoma為微囊病灶合併中央纖維疤痕與鈣化(C對)、神經內分泌腫瘤或胰管腺癌亦可中央囊性變(D對)皆正確。

見 [[pancreatic-cystic-lesions]]

questions.questionText: Which one is NOT correct about GIST (gastrointestinal stromal tumor)?

options.text: Large gastric GIST with central necrosis and ulceration should be differentiated with gastric lymphoma.
The common sites of GIST location are stomach > colon > retroperitoneum > mesentery > small intestine.
GIST responding to Imatinib therapy shows cystic change with myxoid degeneration and scarring.

questions.reference: Acta Radiologica 2009;50(8):837-44（2018 交換考題詳解 p.353 引用）
questions.explanation:
**好發部位排序（B）**錯——正確應為**胃 > 小腸 > 大腸直腸 > 其他 > 食道**，小腸為第二常見，非大腸/後腹腔/腸繫膜。大型胃GIST合併中央壞死潰瘍須與胃淋巴瘤鑑別(A對)、淋巴結轉移少見(C對)、Imatinib反應後可呈囊性變合併黏液樣退化與疤痕化(D對)皆正確。

見 [[gist-imaging]]

questions.questionText: About CAD-RADS, which is wrong?
questions.reference: JACC Cardiovasc Imaging. 2016 Sep;9(9):1099-1113. doi:10.1016/j.jcmg.2016.05.005（2018 交換考題詳解 p.354 引用）
questions.explanation:
**It was newly published in 2017（C）**錯——CAD-RADS 實為 **2016 年**發表（SCCT/ACR/NASCI）。CAD-RADS 3＝50–69% 狹窄(A對)、S＝stent(B對)、4B＝左主幹>50% 或三血管阻塞>70%(D對)皆正確。

見 [[cad-rads]]

questions.questionText: For a case of CAD-RADS 4ASV, what does it mean?

options.text: There is a artery has stenosis > 90%.
There is Positive remodeling > 120% as compared to proximal reference.
There is a stent, in which there is stenosis > 70%.

questions.reference: JACC Cardiovasc Imaging. 2016 Sep;9(9):1099-1113. doi:10.1016/j.jcmg.2016.05.005（2018 交換考題詳解 p.355 引用）
questions.explanation:
**There is a vulnerable plaque（B）**——4ASV＝CAD-RADS 4A（單支 70–99% 狹窄）＋S（stent）＋**V（vulnerable plaque 易損斑塊）**，故含易損斑塊。

見 [[cad-rads]]

questions.questionText: What is the modifier for a vulnerable plaque in CAD-RADS reporting and data system for patients presenting with stable chest pain?
questions.reference: J Cardiovasc Comput Tomogr. 2016 Jul-Aug;10(4):269-81（2018 交換考題詳解 p.356 引用）
questions.explanation:
**"V"（D）**——V＝vulnerability of plaque（易損斑塊）。G＝graft、S＝stent、N＝non-diagnostic 為其他修飾詞。

見 [[cad-rads]]

questions.questionText: What should be the main reason to obtain a chest CT in the setting of possible acute traumatic aortic injury?
questions.reference: Creasy JD, Chiles C, Routh WD et al. Overview of traumatic injury of the thoracic aorta. Radiographics. 17(1):27-45（2018 交換考題詳解 p.357 引用）
questions.explanation:
**Mechanism of trauma（B）**——高能量減速傷之受傷機轉本身即為安排胸部CT評估主動脈損傷的主要理由。異常胸部X光(A)、胸痛(D)僅為輔助線索、敏感度特異度不足；病人要求(C)非臨床適應症。

見 [[traumatic-aortic-injury]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following statement about Bland-White-Garland Syndrome is correct?

options.text: Anomalous origin of right main coronary artery from pulmonary artery (ARCAPA).
In contrast to adult type, the infant type is characterized by abundant interarterial collateral vessels between the RCA and the LCA.
It results in the “coronary steal” phenomenon, in which a right-to-left shunt leads to abnormal left ventricular perfusion.
Patient may present with mitral insufficiency due to ischemic dysfunction of the papillary muscles and adjacent myocardium.

questions.reference: Peña E, Nguyen ET, Merchant N, Dennie C. ALCAPA syndrome: not just a pediatric disease. Radiographics. 2009 Mar-Apr;29(2):553-65（2018 交換考題詳解 p.358 引用）
questions.explanation:
**Mitral insufficiency due to ischemic dysfunction of papillary muscles（D）**——ALCAPA可因乳頭肌與鄰近心肌缺血性功能障礙致二尖瓣閉鎖不全。A誤(為左冠脈異常起源ALCAPA，非右冠脈ARCAPA)、B誤(嬰兒型側支發育**不足**非豐富)、C誤(冠狀動脈竊血為**左向右**分流非右向左)。

見 [[alcapa-bland-white-garland]]

questions.questionText: Oral versus intravenous fluid expansion for CIAKI (contrast induced acute kidney injury), which is wrong?

options.text: Guidelines for prevention of CIAKI: volume expansion by rigid long-term saline infusions.
Intravenous infusions should start 6–12 h before the intervention and be maintained for 4 h after the intervention.
Out patient: can not undergo such protocols → oral hydration.
Oral hydration is at least equally effective as IV saline for preventing CIAKI.

questions.reference: Oral versus intravenous fluid expansion for contrast-induced acute kidney injury. Nat Rev Nephrol. 2017 Mar（2018 交換考題詳解 p.359 引用）
questions.explanation:
**None（E）**——四項敘述皆正確：CIAKI 預防以生理食鹽水靜脈擴容(A)、靜脈輸液術前 6–12 h 開始並維持術後 4 h(B)、門診病人可改口服水化(C)、口服水化在預防 CIAKI 上至少與靜脈生理食鹽水同等有效(D)。故「何者錯誤」答案為「以上皆非（none）」。

見 [[contrast-induced-nephropathy-prevention]]

questions.questionText: 有關 iodinated contrast medium，以下敘述何者有誤?

options.text: CIN (contrast-induced nephropathy) 一般是指在對比劑注射後，48 小時內，serum creatinine 上升，比注射前 ≥50% 以上。
等張性含碘對比劑，會比低張性對比劑，有明顯更好的腎功能保護作用。
CIN 最重要的因素，是之前就有腎功能障礙。
以目前的低張性對比劑注射，除非很大劑量、或用在有心功能障礙患者，否則即使在洗腎的病患，也不需要因為 IV 對比劑注射而必須在檢查後急洗腎。

questions.reference: ACR Manual on Contrast Media – Version 10.2, 2016, pp.33-40（2018 交換考題詳解 p.360 引用）
questions.explanation:
**等張性含碘對比劑比低張性有明顯更好腎保護（B）**為誤——以現行低張性(low-osmolar)對比劑注射，等張性(iso-osmolar)並無明顯更佳腎保護。CIN 定義為注射後48小時內 Cr↑≥50%(A對)、CIN 最重要因素為既存腎功能障礙(C對)、洗腎病人接受一般 IV 對比劑不需檢查後急洗腎(D對)皆正確。

見 [[contrast-induced-aki]]

questions.questionText: Which sites would have greatest concentration of gadolinium deposition?
questions.reference: Radiology 2015;275:772-82（2018 交換考題詳解 p.360 引用）
questions.explanation:
**Dentate nucleus（B）**——釓腦沉積程度依序為 dentate nucleus > globus pallidus > thalamus > pons，以齒狀核濃度最高。

見 [[gadolinium-contrast]]

questions.questionText: Fleischner Society 2017 guidelines assign lung cancer risk by ACCP categories. Which of the following characteristics is NOT associated with a low risk?

options.text: All above are associated with a low risk

questions.reference: MacMahon H et al. Fleischner Society 2017 guidelines. Radiology. 2017 Jul;284(1):228-243（2018 交換考題詳解 p.364 引用）
questions.explanation:
**Location in upper lobe（C）**——依 ACCP 分類，上肺葉位置為惡性**高風險**因子，非低風險。Young age(A)、Less smoking(B)皆為低風險因子，故 D 不成立。

見 [[fleischner-pulmonary-nodule]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following combination of “Radiological sign – Possible etiology” is incorrect?
questions.reference: Rosado-de-Christenson ML. Diagnostic Imaging: Chest, 2nd ed. Lippincott Williams & Wilkins, 2012, p.71-83（2018 交換考題詳解 p.365 引用）
questions.explanation:
**Hilum convergence sign – Sarcoidosis（A）**不正確——hilum convergence sign 用於區分擴大肺動脈與縱膈腫塊（對應**肺動脈擴大**），非 sarcoidosis。Luftsichel–LUL collapse(B)、cervicothoracic–intrathoracic goiter(C)、comet tail–round atelectasis(D)皆正確。

見 [[chest-radiographic-signs]]

questions.questionText: 美國放射線學會(ACR)規定每張乳房攝影之平均乳腺劑量於標準假體下攝影不得超過 3mGy。下列哪一項檢查超過規定劑量?

options.text: 2D 乳房攝影 + 3D 乳房斷層攝影

questions.reference: Comparison of digital mammography alone and digital mammography plus tomosynthesis in a population-based screening program. Radiology 2013;267:47-56（2018 交換考題詳解 p.367 引用）
questions.explanation:
**以上皆未超過（D）**——2D 乳房攝影、3D 斷層攝影、2D+3D 併用（每一模式/每一 view）之平均乳腺劑量皆未超過 3 mGy 規定。

見 [[breast-tomosynthesis]]

questions.questionText: 2D 乳房攝影與 3D 乳房斷層攝影相比，篩檢婦女額外發現乳癌最多的類型為?
questions.reference: Radiology 2013;267:47-56（2018 交換考題詳解 p.367 引用）
questions.explanation:
**侵犯性乳癌（B）**——DBT 額外偵測之乳癌以侵犯性乳癌為主（尤其較多侵犯性小葉癌 invasive lobular carcinoma），非原位癌。

見 [[breast-tomosynthesis]]

questions.questionText: 2D 乳房攝影與 3D 乳房斷層攝影相比，3D 乳房斷層攝影判讀時間為 2D 乳房攝影幾倍?
questions.reference: Radiology 2013;267:47-56（2018 交換考題詳解 p.368 引用）
questions.explanation:
**2 倍（B）**——DBT 判讀時間約為 2D 之 2 倍（45 秒 vs 91 秒，Skaane Radiology 2013）。

見 [[breast-tomosynthesis]]

questions.questionText: 目前你的醫院使用 2D 乳房攝影篩檢，篩檢到乳癌約每千人有 6 個乳癌，改用 3D 乳房斷層攝影後預測每千人篩檢可發現幾個乳癌?
questions.reference: Radiology 2013;267:47-56（2018 交換考題詳解 p.368 引用）
questions.explanation:
**8 人（C）**——由每千人 6.1 例提升至約 8.0 例（Skaane Radiology 2013;267:47-56）。

見 [[breast-tomosynthesis]]

questions.questionText: Tomosynthesis 最可減少何種陽性病灶的 recall rate?
questions.reference: Breast Tomosynthesis E-Book, Page 28（2018 交換考題詳解 p.369 引用）
questions.explanation:
**Focal asymmetry（C）**——DBT 薄層去除組織重疊，最能澄清單純因組織疊影造成的假性局部不對稱，故 focal asymmetry 之 recall rate 降幅最大。

見 [[breast-tomosynthesis]]
